name: Find the Ferns
flavor_text: Unique Ferns are tasty and all, but when people keep eating them, there are no specimens to research! That's why I need you to go out and gather some before they're all gone. Look for them growing among flowers.

name: Due for Dragon Amber
flavor_text: Dragon Amber is incredibly useful for research, but it's also a pain in the neck to get. Well, for these old bones it is. Grab a few pickaxes and get to mining me some from the Jurassic Frontier!

name: Medicinal Moths
flavor_text: A friend of mine told me that there's a medicine that uses Immortal Moths! I'd love to research it, but...sadly I'm a real entomophobe. Could you catch some for me, please?

name: Horns o' Plenty
flavor_text: Eastern medicine believes Kelbi Horns can help heal injuries, so I'd like to keep a stockpile in my house. That means you get to go carve three of them for me! Don't dawdle now!

name: A Fungal Hunt
flavor_text: I've taken an interest in Abyssal Mushrooms. You can only find them deep inside the Jurassic Frontier and they have a very distinct scent. I can't go, but if you could, that'd be great.

name: Wipe Out!
flavor_text: You ever seen a Maccao? You know: big tail, green, bad attitude and totally rude? Seems their alpha has skedaddled off somewhere, so now's a great time to wipe out them pesky pests!

name: Another Pack Attack
flavor_text: In the Frontier there are Felynes in trouble. Gather your things and depart on the double! Once you have saved them from certain defeat, come to see me for a sweet little treat!

name: Harvest Tour: Jurassic Frontier
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering? Then look no further than this Quest, brave Hunter. Gather as much as you like, then deliver a Paw Pass Ticket from the Supply Box to return at any time.

name: Harvest Tour: Dunes
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering? Then look no further than this Quest, brave Hunter. Gather as much as you like, then deliver a Paw Pass Ticket from the Supply Box to return at any time.

name: Harvest Tour: Verdant Hills
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Gatherin' is what sets a livin' hunter apart from a dead one. Without it, ya can't survive! So take all ya want! Just turn in the Paw Pass Ticket from the Supply Box when yer set!

name: Harvest Tour: Arctic Ridge
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Time to do some daytime gathering up on the Arctic Ridge! Just be sure to leave some for the tourists, eh? Once you're all set, just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket that's inside the Supply Box!

name: Harvest Tour: Misty Peaks
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: You are keen to gather materials from the Peaks. The Guild will cover your flight expenses, so gather all you wish. Once finished, you will deliver the Paw Pass Ticket inside the Supply Box.

name: Vaulting Outlaw
flavor_text: We've had a request come in from the Wycademy asking you to hunt a Great Maccao. The beast has been terrorizing their research team. Take care of it and you'll be able to take on more difficult Quests.

name: Rambunctious Rhenoplos
flavor_text: The survey team's been having a lot of trouble -- Rhenoplos keep crashing into everything! All the repairs are takin' a huge chunk out of our budget. Those things have got to go! Can you help us out?

name: On the Rebound
flavor_text: Recently, there have been a lot of Maccao attacks in the Jurassic Frontier. It's becoming a real problem to anyone who ventures out there. Could you put a stop to those hopping hooligans?

name: A Berry Good Idea
flavor_text: My wife has her heart set on eating some Ancient Berries despite them being really hard to get. I heard Larinoths drop them if you "interrupt" them while they eat. Up for some "interrupting?"

name: A Fern is Forever
flavor_text: A Wycademy kiddo found *hiccup* a boutique urn... I mean a *hiccup* Unique Fern! It's bitter, yet sweet, which would go great with my nightly tipple. *hiccup* Be a pal and nab me some of them, won't ya?

name: Jurassic Frontier Accounting
flavor_text: Young Hunter, your hands seem idle. Would you care to busy yourself collecting points for me in the Jurassic Frontier? Any items are fine, as long as you meet the quota. Take care, now.

name: Gendrome Roadblock
flavor_text: I've been ferrying goods for a big deal coming up, only packs of Genprey keep messing things up. I'd bet there's an alpha behind it. Take 'em out so my deal won't fall through!

name: The Land Sharq
flavor_text: Argh, my wagon just got marooned in the Dunes! Now, I haven't seen anything fishy out here -- yet -- but I just know there's something waiting to get at my stuff! Find it and let 'em have it!

name: Slay the Genprey!
flavor_text: Th-thanks to the Genprey in the Dunes *ouch* and their Paralyzing attacks, I can't move a *ouch* muscle! My nose itches so bad. Avenge me -- take out ten of them!

name: Hermit Grab
flavor_text: When me sandskiff up and died on me, I buried all the edible cargo in the sand to preserve it, but some bloomin' Hermitaurs went and sniffed it out! Can someone hold them off while I work on repairs?

name: Birthday Berries
flavor_text: It's nearly my mama's birthday, and I wanna bake her a berry shortcake! It's her favorite. Can you please help me get the ingredients? Please?

name: Liver of Legend!
flavor_text: While doing some business out in the Dunes, I heard about a route where livers go for a really high price. I can't ignore the scent of zenny to be made. Can you sniff out five livers for me?

name: Dunes Accounting
flavor_text: Young Hunter, your hands seem idle. Would you care to busy yourself collecting points for me in the Dunes? Any items are fine, as long as you meet the quota. Take care, now.

name: Hunt Down the Velocidrome!
flavor_text: My lovely wife, bless her heart, knows I love mushrooms, so she went to the Verdant Hills to pick some. On the way, a Velocidrome attacked her! You've got to make it safe so she can go back! Help her, Hunter!

name: Slay the Velociprey!
flavor_text: Lately there's been a lot of Velociprey creeping up closer and closer to the village. Lots of villagers are worried. Can you calm their fears by doin' in some of those pesky critters?

name: Bullfango Tango
flavor_text: We might make a living out in the forest, but even we have a hard time when monsters charge at us, 'specially Bullfango. Make our lives easier and take out 10, won't you?

name: Prime Premium Sashimi
flavor_text: The Village Chief loves his Premium Sashimi so much, he used to make hunters go fish for their "training." Are ya up for a little refresher course?

name: Verdant Hills Accounting
flavor_text: Young Hunter, your hands seem idle. Would you care to busy yourself collecting points for me in the Verdant Hills? Any items are fine, as long as you meet the quota. Take care, now.

name: The Mountain Roughrider
flavor_text: Y'know, the more I think about it, the more I wanna move to the Arctic Ridge. But I gotta find a way to stay warm... I bet a coat made from Bulldrome pelts would be roasty-toasty! You game?

name: Slay the Giaprey!
flavor_text: You know what Giaprey are, yeah? Those buggers went after my Popo, and after I drove them off, more and more keep showin' up. Time to put 'em on the endangered list, if ya know what I mean.

name: A Pack of Blangos
flavor_text: I'd like you to slay some Blangos running around in the Arctic Ridge. Some people have also spotted Bulldrome around there lately, so keep an eye out so they don't ambush you.

name: Medicinal Mountain Herbs
flavor_text: My brother hurt himself. Now he's laid up at home. I heard these Mountain Herbs can get him back on his feet, but I ain't going anywhere near them monster-infested mountains. How 'bouts you going in my stead?

name: Arctic Ridge Accounting
flavor_text: Young Hunter, your hands seem idle. Would you care to busy yourself collecting points for me in the Arctic Ridge? Any items are fine, as long as you meet the quota. Take care, now.

name: Arzuros the Azure Beast
flavor_text: The Arzuros is a creature we're long used to seeing near the village, but lately it's wandering closer and closer, which endangers the kids. I hate to impose, but I can't do much by myself.

name: Bye Bye Jaggia
flavor_text: Jaggi are awful, am I right? Well, Jaggia are even worse! And now a gang of 'em are terrorizing the Misty Peaks! Please, put a stop to them before they come ruin our crops!

name: Howling Harassment
flavor_text: I live on the edge of the village, and late every night, these blasted Jaggi come down and raise hell! Have they no respect for their elders!? Please, make my nights quiet again.

name: Fungal Fad
flavor_text: Oh my gosh! I'm just dying for some Mushroom Juice! All the girls are drinking it, so I gotta get my hands on some, like now! It'd be totally rad if you got me 10 Unique Mushrooms. Pleeeease!

name: Sunsnug Sprout Courier
flavor_text: The Felynes on Sunsnug Isle are hoping to get their paws on some Super Spouts. Deliver us some and you'll be rewarded with some tasty ingredients for cooking. Sounds like a great oppurrtunity, nya?

name: Misty Peaks Accounting
flavor_text: Young Hunter, your hands seem idle. Would you care to busy yourself collecting points for me in the Misty Peaks? Any items are fine, as long as you meet the quota. Take care, now.

name: Harvest Tour: Deserted Island
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering? Then look no further than this Quest, brave Hunter. Gather as much as you like, then deliver a Paw Pass Ticket from the Supply Box to return at any time.

name: Harvest Tour: Marshlands
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering? Then look no further than this Quest, brave Hunter. Gather as much as you like, then deliver a Paw Pass Ticket from the Supply Box to return at any time.

name: Tusked Tantrum
flavor_text: Thanks to the Tetsucabra running loose within the Jurassic Frontier, the Wycademy's research of the area has ground to a halt. If you could, we'd like you to rid us of it.

name: Stomping Grounds
flavor_text: How can I study the flora out in the wilderness when the fauna keeps stomping all over it? Can you hunt the Yian Kut-Ku that is driving me cuckoo? In the name of science, I beg you!

name: Chasing Tail
flavor_text: Truly a wonder of nature the Great Maccao is. Even more remarkable are their tails. I wanted to take a closer look, but I got a bit too close. Now, two of them are hot on MY tail! Help!

name: Jurassic Treasure: The Frog
flavor_text: Gettin' treasure trembles fer this 'ere Tailed Frog I picked up in the Jurassic Frontier? Sorry to say, but if ye want it, ye gotta go work fer it! Capture me a 'uge ol' Tetsucabra!

name: Bit by the Fashion Bug
flavor_text: Did you know Bnahabra clothing is the new in-thing? Cha-ching, right? Except, I can't seem to get 'em to hold still long enough to sew 'em together! Rude! So, can you make 'em stop squirming, like, permanently?

name: Tumultuous Sprouts
flavor_text: I've run out of Abyssal Mushrooms for my research. Could you pick some for me? There's been talk about odd, blade-sharpening sounds coming from deep in the forest, but I'm sure you'll be fine!

name: Tumultuous Sprouts
flavor_text: I've run out of Abyssal Mushrooms for my research. Could you pick some for me? There's been talk about odd, blade-sharpening sounds coming from deep in the forest, but I'm sure you'll be fine!

name: Fishy Favor
flavor_text: The Meownster Hunters on Sunsnug Island always so kind to me. In return, I want to treat them to some Brocadefish. Could you fish some out of the Jurassic Frontier waters for me?

name: Crustacean Frustration
flavor_text: A buddy of mine went off to the Dunes in search of materials and got pounced on by a Daimew, er, I mean Daimyo Hermitaur! Now we're in a pinch to get him back! Can you crush that crustacean for us?

name: The Desert Gourmand
flavor_text: One minute I was rattlin' along the Dunes in me barrel buggy, mindin' me own. And then, RAAARRR! Cart goes flyin' -- and me with it! What gives!? The barrel business is s'pposed t'be safe, by gum!

name: Konchu Collector
flavor_text: The Konchu is a most fascinating creature -- a bug of many metamorphoses! Attack it and watch it switch into defensive mode for evasive action. I need more specimens for my research!

name: Cancer of the Dunes
goal_text: Slay 10 before time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Grrr! Enough is enough! Those Hermitaurs act like they own the Dunes just beclaws there's more of them than there are of us! Purrlease Hunter, rid the Dunes of this cancer.

name: Deliver the Liver
flavor_text: Have you heard? It's been discovered that Apceros Livers can be used for a variety of medicinal purposes! I'm keen on getting in on the action while demand is high. Mind nabbing me a few?

name: Farming Frustrations
flavor_text: The Velociprey that live up in them there Verdant Hills are a real annoyance, going after our livestock and just being downright ornery. Put a hurtin' on 20 fer me, will ya? Just be careful of their boss!

name: Financial Focus on Fungus
flavor_text: Mushrooms from the Verdant Hills are suddenly in high demand. If you gather me ten, I'll give you a cut of the profits. Oh, I heard that Velocidrome hang around there, so stay sharp!

name: Local Threat
flavor_text: Yian Kut-Ku have been going after people all over the place, and during my patrol earlier, I spotted one wandering close to town. That curious bugger must be after some Konchu. Can you get rid of it?

name: Into the Wyvern's Den
flavor_text: I have a patient back in my village afflicted with a rare disease. It takes two fresh Wyvern Eggs to cure, so I'd like for you to sneak into a Wyvern nest and whisk some away.

name: Into the Wyvern's Den
flavor_text: I have a patient back in my village afflicted with a rare disease. It takes two fresh Wyvern Eggs to cure, so I'd like for you to sneak into a Wyvern nest and whisk some away.

name: Snow with Occasional Lagombi
flavor_text: [REPORT BEGINS] Lagombi spotted in the Arctic Ridge [STOP] Requesting support from all qualified hunters [STOP] We are snowed in and cannot render assistance [REPORT ENDS]

name: Anteka Anticipation
flavor_text: I've gotten my paws on all kinds of monster meat before. You name it, I've grilled it. But I've never tried my paw at grilling up some Anteka. Help me out and we'll have a barbeque for the ages!

name: The Shadow in the Mountains
flavor_text: We were up in the Arctic Ridge -- doing a little research -- when all of a sudden, something really creepy and gross plopped down behind us. We managed to escape, but we can't do any research with that thing up there!

name: No Go on the Popo
flavor_text: Usually I can find Popo pretty easily, but the few I spotted today scampered up the mountain like they were spooked by something. I need some Popo meat, but I'm not going up there! Can you go and get me some?

name: No Go on the Popo
flavor_text: Usually I can find Popo pretty easily, but the few I spotted today scampered up the mountain like they were spooked by something. I need some Popo meat, but I'm not going up there! Can you go and get me some?

name: Bully the Bullfango
flavor_text: Ugh! My backside's seen better days. Blame the Bullfango! My mom sent me to the Misty Peaks to dig up mushrooms, see, and all of a sudden those beasts were behind me! Long story short, my bottom needs avenging!

name: For Whom the Egg Yolks
flavor_text: I want...I mean, this TOWN could do with some Gargwa Eggs. They are a hot commodity right meow that people are willing to trade fur. Could you sneak me...er, US, definitely US, three Gargwa Eggs?

name: Royal Spit Take
flavor_text: Ick! I got splattered with weird gunk that sapped my Stamina, so I couldn't even run! Luckily, a Felyne came by and saved me, but now whenever I see anything yellow...urgh!

name: A Forest Fracas
flavor_text: Something's afoot, er, ahoof in the forest, Hunter. A Bulldrome suddenly showed up and leveled our crops. Strange happenings 'round here. Can you check it out and take care of that Bulldrome while you're at it?

name: A Forest Fracas
flavor_text: Something's afoot, er, ahoof in the forest, Hunter. A Bulldrome suddenly showed up and leveled our crops. Strange happenings 'round here. Can you check it out and take care of that Bulldrome while you're at it?

name: Royal Honey Hunt
flavor_text: The name "Royal Honey" makes it sound like a divine treat that has to be tasted to be believed! I have to know how I can get my bees to make this "nectar of the gods."

name: Current Events
flavor_text: What a twist! People on land suddenly soaked to the bone! The soggy victims insist they saw something yellow before their drenching. What could it have been? Hunter, please, help me solve this riddle!

name: The Crabbiest Catch
flavor_text: You know, Hunter, Moga Mussels found on the Deserted Island are a world famous delicacy, but a Daimyo Hermitaur keeps messin' with their breedin' grounds. Could you capture that crabby critter for me?

name: Pack Woes
goal_text: Slay a total of 20 Jaggi or Jaggia
flavor_text: Oh, dear me! I heard about a pack of Jaggi roaming closer and closer to the village lately. I'm worried my son might get mauled out there! Put my fears to rest and make sure it's safe for my son to play.

name: The Fungus Among Us
flavor_text: I've got a real mushroom problem, Hunter! I need to get my hands on some Ripened Mushrooms for a cookout, but I'm not going anywhere near those creepy Altaroth! Could you get some for me? Pleeease!?

name: Moofah Must-haves
flavor_text: We need to make warm clothing for our babies, but to make them, I need some Moofah wool from the Moofah on the Deserted Island. If you've got a Cutting-type weapon, it should be easy!

name: Deserted Island Accounting
flavor_text: Young Hunter, your hands seem idle. Would you care to busy yourself collecting points for me on the Deserted Island? Any items are fine, as long as you meet the quota. Take care, now.

name: Sunsnug Isle Rescue!
flavor_text: Oh, it's a catastrophe! The Sunsnug Isle Meownster Hunters were in the Marshlands when an Iodrome kitty cornered them! Purrlease rescue them, Hunter!

name: Robbed Blind
flavor_text: I hear that Gypceros take a real shine to shiny objects. They've been known to swipe stuff from people! If we can hunt one down, I bet we'll get our hands on some serious booty! Cha-ching!

name: Pest Control
goal_text: Slay a total of 20 Vespoid or Hornetaur
flavor_text: Work is tough enough as it is, but I can't even get a wink of sleep with all these bugs buzzing around! And now my boss is angry because my work is behind schedule! Make these bugs buzz off!

name: Travelers in Trouble
flavor_text: Some travelers came all the way from Dundorma to visit Bherna, but on their way home they got attacked by Ioprey! This is terrible! They'll probably give us terrible scores on the questionnaire!

name: Royal Rhinos Gone Wild
flavor_text: I've had enough of being on the losing side of the Royal Rhino Royale! That's all going to change this year, and that's where you come in! Go out and get me ten. If I win, we can split the prize.

name: Marshlands Accounting
flavor_text: Young Hunter, your hands seem idle. Would you care to busy yourself collecting points for me in the Marsh- lands? Any items are fine, as long as you meet the quota. Take care, now.

name: Harvest Tour: Volcano
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering? Then look no further than this Quest, brave Hunter. Gather as much as you like, then deliver a Paw Pass Ticket from the Supply Box to return at any time.

name: The Nocturnal Enchanter
flavor_text: The survey team ran into a Malfestio in the Jurassic Frontier. Before they knew it, everyone had either passed out or gotten so confused they don't remember a thing. Be on your guard, Hunter!

name: Wyvern of the Wind
flavor_text: The Nargacuga out on the Jurassic Frontier is scarily fast. Blink and you'll miss it. But, Hunter, it's gotta go! There's nothing more important right now than hunting it, so get to it!

name: Jurassic Treasure: The Bug
flavor_text: Gettin' treasure trembles fer this Blossom Cricket I picked up in the Jurassic Frontier? Sorry to say, but if ye want it, ye gotta go work fer it! Earn it by 'untin' me a Volvidon!

name: Unlock the Secret to...
flavor_text: The Eternal Fossil is a super rare type of fossil said to be the key to unlocking... Yes, blah blah blah...I know. You don't care. But I do! I need to know if what they say is true! My research depends on it!

name: A Unique Cuppa
goal_text: Deliver 10 Unique Ferns or a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Hi hi, Hunter-person! Have you ever heard of Bherna's Fern Tea? It's a tried and true recipe, but I think I can improve it with some Unique Ferns! That's sure to make it a hit!

name: Hunt-a-thon: Gendrome
goal_text: Hunt 2 before time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: A merchant friend of mine got jumped by a bunch of Gendrome lurkin' out in the desert. She's not too worse for wear, but if y'ask me, we should make sure this sort of happenin' is a one-time-only happenin'.

name: Mining: The Final Frontier
flavor_text: Ore that falls from the sky is really rare. While we don't know how to refine it yet, it's still a valuable resource. As a forger, I'm keen to learn all that I can. Think you're able to get some for me?

name: Wrath of the Rathian
flavor_text: Dang Rathian! Ambushed my caravan and tore my business a new one! But I ain't the gettin' mad type, I'm the gettin' even type! Time for some ice cold revenge, and I want you to dish it out!

name: Noise Violation
flavor_text: The Najarala around the village is making some pawful sounds! Does it think it's some kind of mewsician? Hunter, make it shut up before it drives me up the wall!

name: Hunt-a-thon: Yian Kut-Ku
goal_text: Hunt 2 before time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Ugh, will those Yian Kut-Ku ever shut up!? They're running around screaming all day, with those stupid faces and those big ears... Someone please hunt them down so I can finally get some sleep!

name: Hunt-a-thon: Velocidrome
goal_text: Hunt 2 before time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Nyaaargh! My pointy little ears hurt from the yowling of those Velocidrome! I pounced on one, but more just followed! I dunno how many there are, but save me from their apawling screeches!

name: The New Tenant
flavor_text: A Blangonga has taken up residence in the Arctic Ridge, which spells trouble for us being able to gather firewood. Hurry and take that ugly ape out before we freeze to death!

name: Lagombi Lair
flavor_text: I'm reporting live from the Arctic Ridge where two Lagombi are making their way across the frozen landscape. I could stand here and watch these graceful creatures all day! ...Wait, are they coming this way!? RUN!

name: Hungry Eyes
flavor_text: Night fishing is pure bliss, I tell ya. It's cool...quiet. You can see the stars reflected in the water. Last night, I saw two red shooting stars streak overhead. Next thing I know, I'm bruised and battered.

name: Royal Pains
flavor_text: You came at just the right time, Hunter! I've got two Royal Ludroth I'd love to see gone from the Misty Peaks. Can't look for Super Sprouts with those spongy varmints sprayin' me down!

name: Peddling Practice
flavor_text: Heya, Hunter! Can we play merchant for a bit!? Um, let's thee... I want you to dee-liver... Yeah! Deliver some Balm-thtone Pie-thes to me! If you do, I'll give ya thomethin' cool I found!

name: Island Menace
flavor_text: Some kids came up to me and said they spotted something real odd-like on the Deserted Island. Could be one of those Malfestio. If that's the case, capture that hootin' hooligan before it hurts someone.

name: Deviled Legs
flavor_text: I've heard stories of frog legs bein' an in-demand delicacy overseas. Imagine the feast we could cook up with those two Tetsucabras over on the Deserted Island. Spring to it Hunter, our beast feast awaits!

name: Hunt-a-thon: Daimyo Hermitaur
goal_text: Hunt 2 before time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Goodness gravy! Whitescruff, bless his heart, has set off to drive away some Daimyo Hermitaurs that have popped up lately. I'm really worried about him. Be a doll and help him drive them away.

name: Marshlands Mission
flavor_text: New orders, priority one: Protect the villagers and increase our deployment options. We can't do either until you hunt that Shogun Ceanataur. This mission is classified, understood?

name: Serpentine Samba
flavor_text: My huntin' is near as bad as my dancin', but my little sis? Best moves in the tribe! I wanna make her a costume of serpent scales for the big festival. Could ya help me bag a big snake!?

name: Lurkin' in the Murk
flavor_text: True horror lurks within the murky Marshlands... Two airborne wyverns, pallid hides gleaming in the dark skies, bodies sparking with electricity. Beware! They're right behind you!

name: Crustacean Infestation
flavor_text: I was just mindin' my own business, mining for some goodies, when a Ceanataur pops out of nowhere and breaks my Pickaxe! I would've yanked it out of its shell, but more of 'em showed up!

name: Tumbling Troublemaker
flavor_text: Holy moly! Have you seen one of those things before? I thought it was a giant boulder tumbling down the mountain, but no, it was a monster comin' to eat me! I'm not going back there until you get rid of it!

name: Crustacean Infatuation
flavor_text: I love Shogun Ceanataurs, don't you!? Their carapaces have so many fine details, their claws are so long and beautiful... *ahem* I want to, er, study one up close, so could you capture one?

name: Rocking the Uroktor
flavor_text: These Uroktor are fascinatin' creatures! They burrow right through volcanic rock. How is that even possible? I wanna find out more about 'em, but they keep spittin' gobs of fire at me. Help me unlock their mysteries!

name: Great Ore Discovery
flavor_text: Great news! A new Coal bed has been discovered in the Volcano, and as much as I'd like to get in on that action, that place is Shogun Ceanataur turf. Care to go mining for me, Hunter?

name: Volcano Accounting
flavor_text: Young Hunter, your hands seem idle. Would you care to busy yourself collecting points for me in the Volcano? Any items are fine, as long as you meet the quota. Take care, now.

name: The Dark Age
flavor_text: Recently, a Yian Garuga has appeared in the Jurassic Frontier. Research in that area can't continue until the threat has been dealt with. Good luck, Hunter.

name: Trifecta of Terror
flavor_text: A trio of Nibelsnarf have been spotted in the Dunes. There's no telling what kind of trouble this triad is up to. One thing is for sure: You need to tackle those three overgrown tadpoles!

name: Garuga of the Hills
flavor_text: I'll let you in on a secret of mine: I managed to track down where a Yian Garuga is hanging out. Don't let anyone else know, but it's in the Verdant Hills as we speak!

name: The Thunderclaw Wyvern
flavor_text: Listen here, kid! Things are lookin' grim out in the Verdant Hills. There's a mean, green, electrocutin' machine out there messin' things up. I need you to get out there and mess IT up!

name: Fungus Fetch
goal_text: Deliver 10 Unique Mushrooms or a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Thanks to you, business is soaring! So much, in fact, that I can't keep up with demand! Hurry back to the Hills and gather me some more. But be careful, I heard there's a Rathian about!

name: Two Roars in the Snow
flavor_text: It all happened so fast... These two Blangongas showed up and just wrecked all I had! I wanna rebuild my life, but there's no way I'm going up there with those things! Help me get my life back!

name: Hunt-a-thon: Khezu
goal_text: Hunt 2 before time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: You look like you could go for a little adrenaline in your day! Well, you're in luck! There's heaps of monsters with electrifying personalities up in the Arctic Ridge! Have at it!

name: The Unwavering Colossus
flavor_text: If we can tame the Gammoth, we'll have an attraction to make us more famous than Bherna and Yukumo com- bined! You can't tame monsters? Bah! Well, at least give it a try!

name: Lagiacrus Fuss
flavor_text: You came at just the right time, Hunter. See, I was on my way back from explorin' the Misty Peaks when I ran into a dagnabbed Lagiacrus! Here's hopin' you make quick work of that varmint.

name: The Entrancing Water Dancer
flavor_text: Heed my words, Hunter: It is said that there is a Mizutsune in the Misty Peaks. You will help rid Yukumo of this slippery devil, and your journey will be a safe one.

name: The Fisherman's Fiend
flavor_text: Yikes, this is horrible! We've just heard from our fishermen out in the sea that a Lagiacrus is here in this region! We need you to stop it before it does any serious damage!

name: Island Heat
flavor_text: How's it hangin', Hunter dude? The Yukumo Gal hooked me up with a Quest request for you to house that Lame-o-los that's lurkin' on the Deserted Island. I'm just gonna chill here and think about these fluffy clouds.

name: Double Vision
flavor_text: Here's an idea: What would happen if you ate the scales of two Malfestio? Would your brain go extra on the fritz or would the second batch cancel the first? Inquiring minds want to know!

name: Hunt-a-thon: Gypceros
goal_text: Hunt 2 before time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: My trade colleagues are in a bit of a jam after some Gypceros showed up on their route! Get rid of a few of them for me, and I'll reward you with some grade-A Yukumo Riceflour!

name: Behind Closed Ores
goal_text: Slay 10 before time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Psst! Hunter! I need you to take care of something for me. My best mining spot is infested with Bullfango. I need you to un-fest it, if you know what I mean. Thing is, the place is a trade secret, so be discreet!

name: A King, Robed in Smoke
flavor_text: I fear the end times are upon us. A blood-colored demon has ascended from the depths to plague the land. I beg of thee, save the shrine that protects the Volcano and send that beast back to the abyss.

name: Fight or Uragaan!
flavor_text: Don't bother readin' any further unless you're a true hunter -- the type who loves that quiver in your guts when you're livin' on the razor's edge. Still with me? Go to the Volcano. Somethin's waitin'.

name: Great Knuckleballs o' Fire!
flavor_text: I'm reporting live from the Volcano, where we're observing two majestic Volvidons. If you look closely, you can see... you can see... them coming this way! Run for your lives!

name: Hunt-a-thon: Iodrome
goal_text: Hunt 2 before time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Some Iodrome are fighting for position as alpha, but their fighting's going to leave the entire ecosystem poisoned! Please take out a couple to help mitigate the damage!

name: Envoy to Disaster
flavor_text: I sense an ill omen that could spell disaster for the Volcano, should it be left unchecked. Slay ten of the serpents to quell the danger before it's too late!

name: A Late Jurassic Excursion
flavor_text: I train the only way a warrior can -- with full abandon! Yet whenever I perform my kata, monsters gather around me. Honorable hunter! Winnow the beasts from this place so that I may hone my body properly!

name: A Sandy Battle Royale
flavor_text: My ship was cruising over the sand when we suddenly ran aground, our cargo spilling hither and yon. Now, the local monsters are really keen on taking it, so I need you to dissuade them!

name: Scientific Method
flavor_text: This island is, like, sooo amazing, don'tcha think? It's got unique evolutionary patterns you can't find aaanywhere else! Sweet, huh? So, like, be a pal and hunt me a monster! For science!

name: The Scorching Blade
flavor_text: That bedeviled Glavenus has reappeared in the Jurassic Frontier, and the Wycademy search team's outmatched. There is no time to waste. It has to be brought down. I'm counting on you!

name: Dark Wings, Dark Work
flavor_text: Beneath the azure skies of the Jurassic Frontier lurks a mysterious monster cloaked in black. Writhing in pain, it glares from unseen eyes. The hunter or the hunted: Which will you be?

name: Tuff Turf
flavor_text: I was training my tail off in the Jurassic Frontier when, uh, I guess I kinda sorta riled up a Zinogre. My bad! No way I can handle that beast. Somebody beat it up for me!

name: From Beyond the Sands
flavor_text: I was roaming the Dunes when I happened to see a Glavenus blocking one of the major trade routes! Normally I keep to myself, but I can't live without my delivery of Moga curry!

name: Tigrex by the Tail
flavor_text: I've got a distress signal from a hunter in the Dunes who's run into a Tigrex! Anyone who finds this message is requested to head there and take it down ASAP!

name: A Thousand Scales of Dread
flavor_text: Breaking news from the Elder Hall: A Seregios has shown up in the Dunes! Any and all skilled hunters are asked to help hunt it as soon as possible. Beware its blades!

name: The Perilous Pair
goal_text: Hunt a Rathalos and a Rathian
flavor_text: Luggage left with Neko still no make it here. Maybe that because there is Rathalos and Rathian in the Verdant Hills? Iya... All this give me bad yokan. "Yokan" means feeling!

name: The Hero's Journey
flavor_text: The Arctic Ridge has materials I need to remake the Hero's Blade, but right now it's home to a nasty Tigrex. Be a dear and clear it out for me so I can go about my work, won't you?

name: The Bellowing Zinogre
flavor_text: Eeek, that Zinogre's at it again, howling away! I get so scared hearing it, I can't move, even when I have customers to serve! Someone, anyone, make it stop so I can do my job!

name: Brachydios Mio!
flavor_text: We recently came across a monster with a dangerous slime on its forelimbs... If any gets on you, it explodes. We've been holding out okay so far, but we could really do with more hands on deck.

name: Under the Gaze of Heaven
flavor_text: My granddad let it slip that he was gonna go watch a "battle of shoguns." He has no place being there, but he won't listen! Look, I'll help, too. I just don't wanna do it alone!

name: Break the Brachydios
flavor_text: There's still much to learn about Brachydios, especially given that it's only just been recently discovered. I simply must know more, so I'd love it if you captured me a specimen to examine!

name: Night Terrors
flavor_text: Some eerie cries have been getting closer to the village every night. It's freaking out the villagers here, so would you mind going out hunting for whatever's behind it?

name: Bristly Fanged Beasts
flavor_text: There're three diff'rent Fanged Beasts out where I'm stayin'. Right now it ain't too big a worry, but even the tiniest spark can cause a big fire, so you'd best put it out soon.

name: Drawing the Waterline
flavor_text: It's a catastrophe! Terrible things came splashing up from the river, and now everything's soaked! Trenya, bring your big-nosed hunter lackey and come punish the purrpetrators right away!

name: The Cankerous Quagmire
flavor_text: I can't believe it -- two Iodrome in the same place? What do they want? What if they fight the local Najarala!? This is bad! If you don't act fast, the Marshlands'll be a miasma of Poison and Paralysis!

name: Volcano Triple Play
flavor_text: I was practicing out by the Volcano when I saw some cool monsters bouncing and leaping around! If you show me how to hit something like that, it'll help me be the world's best slugger!

name: It's Electric
flavor_text: Unexplained natural events have been occurring deep within the Jurassic Frontier. Intriguing, don't you think? I believe it's a sign of mythic beasts, but you should go see it with your own eyes.

name: The White Brute
flavor_text: My friends and I sought out a phantom beast. When we came upon it, we had but a moment before it smote us with thunder, casting us asunder. Please help us, Hunter.

name: Stop the Wheel
flavor_text: I've only known the gods from their legends -- never did I expect to see one in my lifetime. Dare you attempt to halt the cycle of death and etch your own name into legend, Hunter?

name: The Fated Four
flavor_text: O brave, wise, courageous hunter, only you can rise to the challenge that I have set forth. It shall take both all your mind and body to overcome, but I ask you to venture forth.

name: Advanced: Fungus Fetchin'
flavor_text: We're prepurring a new menu at the Tanzinya Grill, and we think a Dish with mushrooms in it would be the cat's meow. Purrhaps you could pick some up for us, Hunter?

name: Advanced: Jurassic Treasure
flavor_text: Gettin' treasure trembles fer this 'ere Kingmeat I picked up in the Jurassic Frontier? Sorry to say, but if ye want it, ye gotta go work fer it! 'Unt me a Glavenus -- then we'll talk!

name: Advanced: Sly Swooper
flavor_text: I was out peddling a little while ago when I saw a Yian Garuga swoop down! I'm scared what'll happen to my friends and everyone else if we leave it alone. Can you make it go away?

name: Advanced: Invoking Rath
goal_text: Hunt a Rathalos and a Rathian
flavor_text: You look like you're in the mood to bump against some tough monsters! There's a Rathalos and a Rathian on the loose in the Verdant Hills. Knowing you, I'm sure you can handle 'em!

name: Advanced: Seismic Scares
flavor_text: Hunter, I must implore you to take arms for me once again. Your target this time is a pair of Tigrex. Steel yourself, and be careful.

name: Advanced: Twinkle Toes
flavor_text: I'm no hunter, but the way I see it, yer only as good as the hardest blow ya can take. An' the hardest of all are the ones Duramboros can deal! Take one down in the Misty Peaks, an' prove your worth!

name: Advanced: Seltas Queen
flavor_text: Hey, there's a Seltas Queen that's giving all the other hunters around here a run for their money. Could you step up and give it a shot? Think of it as a real test of strength! Feh heh!

name: Advanced: The Goliaths
flavor_text: A Wycademy search team's been attacked by some large monsters, and now they're stranded. What's more, some villagers were with them! I'd breathe easier if you'd hunt those beasts.

name: Advanced: Barrage of Blue
flavor_text: Hunter, it looks like the Guild wants you at the Arena. A trio of blue monsters have shown up and is causing a fuss, but I'm sure you can handle it! At any rate, I won't take no for an answer!

name: Advanced: Seeing Red
flavor_text: Looks like another request from the Guild... They want some red monsters hunted down. You'll do it for me and save these hands from getting dirty, of course? Wonderful. Good luck, now!

name: Advanced: Nothing is Sacred
flavor_text: Got word a Shagaru Magala's turned up at the Sanctuary near Cathar. A thing like that'll make short work of anythin' in its path. Ain't many that could face it, but I know you're the one to get it done!

name: Advanced: Snowtal Recall
goal_text: Slay a Kushala Daora or repel it
flavor_text: The Kushala Daora strikes again up in the Arctic Ridge, eh? Now that's a foe I'm all too familiar with: Ol' Stormbringer. It's gonna be cold there, so down some Hot Drinks!

name: Advanced: Invisible Thief
goal_text: Slay a Chameleos or repel it
flavor_text: Urgent wire! "Chameleos approaching village [STOP] All available hunters report ASAP [END MESSAGE]" Please hurry, and mind it doesn't steal your supplies with that blasted tongue!

name: Advanced: Teostra's Return
goal_text: Slay a Teostra or repel it
flavor_text: A Teostra has appeared in the Volcano! Not only are folks in the area in danger, but dragons prowling willy-nilly means I can't grow my world- famous Prismatic Dandelions! Ward it off, would you?

name: Advanced: Might is Right
flavor_text: When you have it all, the Arena is the only thing that can excite you. But lately, it's just been a bunch of weaklings! I need a real hunter to come in and show us how it's done!

name: Advanced: State in Flux
flavor_text: Today's cast of monsters oughta keep you right busy! That's because they come packed with attacks that'll inflict all sorts of Abnormal Statuses! Hope you're up for a wild ride!

name: Advanced: The Field's a Stage
flavor_text: Calling all actors for the role of a lifetime! Everyone's dreamed of standing in the limelight, and the Arena's the limest light of all! Are you the star we need to bring the house down at the finale?

name: Advanced: Wrath of Rath
goal_text: Hunt a Silver Rathalos and a Gold Rathian
flavor_text: You've become a fine hunter, so how 'bout a bigger challenge? Picture this: you, versus a Rathalos AND a Rathian! Whaddaya say? Think you can get the wyvern royalty to bow down to you?

name: Advanced: The Golden Pair
flavor_text: I've got something special whipped up for today: two Rajang sporting shiny gold coats! Hope you're ready to give them all you've got, 'cause they don't know how to go easy on anybody!

name: Advanced: Out of the Fry Pan
flavor_text: You must be the hunter that nobody can shut up about! To hear them tell it, there ain't no one better. But I'll only believe it when I see it myself, so show me proof you're hot stuff!

name: Harvest Tour: Desert
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: I can't help notice you've taken an interest in gathering. Well, the Desert's a fine place for it! Go on -- get stuck right in there! Just remember to deliver a Paw Pass Ticket once you've finished playing in the sand!

name: Harvest Tour: Ruined Pinnacle
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: I see you're interested in doing some gathering up at the Ruined Pinnacle. This Quest will let you gather to your heart's content. Just don't forget to deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're done!

name: Bug Appétit Encore
flavor_text: Legends tell of a faraway land where the people make bugs into burgers. You've cooked me up a Seltas once before, but I just can't get enough of that crunchy insect goodness! Oh, could you? Would you?

name: Azure Azure Can Be
flavor_text: For some weird reason, my little sister thinks monsters are cute. So when she heard about an Arzuros at the Ruined Pinnacle, she was desperate to go see it, but no way am I putting her in harm's way. Could you get rid of it for me?

name: Investment Flanking
flavor_text: Grrr, stupid varmints! There I was mindin' me own business, tryin' ta lug my wares over yonder ridge, 'til those confounded Giaprey come out some hidey-hole an' trash all my stuff! They had a leader, too -- a Giadrome! Take 'er out, I beg ya!

name: Kut-Ku Misunderstood
flavor_text: So, uh, I heard a Yian Kut-Ku showed up at the Ruined Pinnacle. I'm sure it's totally, absolutely 100% fine, but let's say -- hypothetically speaking -- that it actually turns out to be some terrifying mutant deathbird...you could handle it, couldn't you?

name: Enough Monkeying Around
flavor_text: Oof... That mischievous monkey in the Ancestral Steppe really got me good. It's starting to stretch my patience. In fact, I've a good mind to put this boot up its... *ahem* Please, teach it a lesson before I do something incredibly rash...

name: The Killer Rabbit of Arctic Ridge
flavor_text: Don't tell my brother, but I snuck up the mountain to see the bunny. It looked so darn...ANGRY! Where is my cute fluffybuns!? I can't sleep at night like this! Put that abomination somewhere I can't see him, ever!

name: Poisoned for Action
flavor_text: An old pal of mine says the rubbery hide of a Gypceros is great for shipbuilding, thanks to its water-resistant properties! I hear one of 'em's roaming the Primal Forest right now. Could you haul it in for me?

name: Spit It Out
flavor_text: Grrrr! I am reawy, reawy upset! A big, nasty Tetsucabwa in the Juwassic Fwontier ate my pwecious dowwy wowwy in one big guwp! My worthwess butwer cawwied me away befowe I could save it... Somebody, avenge my dowwy!

name: Fashion Victim
flavor_text: I just can't keep my line of Crab Couture accessories in stock! Their wild success has caused an unforeseen issue: a lack of materials. Hunt a Daimyo Hermitaur for me, and for the sake of fashion!

name: Research Team's First Rodeo
flavor_text: As the name implies, the Ruined Pinnacle is way up high and covered in ruins. Now we have the Soaratorium, we can launch a proper expedition! ...But first, we'll need to help the advance team, as they've been beset by a Congalala!

name: Ruined Pinnacle, RUINED
flavor_text: Th-This is terrible! Because of the intense methane buildup from all the Congas, the Ruined Pinnacle stinks! They just won't stop farting! How are we supposed to do any research under these conditions!? Can you thin their numbers a bit? ...Puaah!

name: Brave New Ore
flavor_text: We discovered special ore at the Ruined Pinnacle that we can't get anywhere else! We still have much to learn about this place, but maybe if you collect some, we could analyze it and see where that takes us. Can you help us?

name: Taking Royal Liberties
flavor_text: The Misty Peaks near our village are currently undergoing some hardship in the form of a Royal Ludroth. It has taken a liking to the trees, attacking our lumberjacks when they need to work. You will humbly protect our wonderful peaks by slaying the fiend.

name: A Friend in Need
flavor_text: One of the top staff at the Wycademy is under attack from a Barroth on the road to the village. He's more than just an official -- he's my dear friend. I've known him for most my life. Please, Hunter, save him.

name: March of the Genprey
flavor_text: Pesky Genprey attacks are obstructing my research into the Desert's ecosystem. Could you hunt 12 of them? Hahaha, what are you talking about? I'm an expert, I'm fairly sure Genprey aren't necessary to the ecosystem!

name: On Burrowed Time
flavor_text: Ughhh! How's anybody supposed to cross the Desert with those darn Cephalos burrowing about the place!? Now every step I take I'm scared something's gonna jump out and get me! Go take care of five of 'em, will you?

name: A Berry Dubious Idea
flavor_text: Hunter, Hunter! Are you familiar with the Tropical Berries that grow in the Desert? I just came up with a way to make them really tasty! They're going to be HUGE! I think I smell money... I'll split the profits with you if you collect some for me. 70-30?

name: Harvest Tour: Ancestral Steppe
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: So you're interested in what you can find on the Ancestral Steppe, eh? Then have I got a Quest for you! Collect as much as you like, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket from the Supply Box when you want to return.

name: Harvest Tour: Primal Forest
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: I see that steely glint in your eye. You want to see if you can find something primal in the Primal Forest, don't you? Then have I got a Quest for you! Collect as much as you like, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket from the Supply Box when you want to return.

name: Harvest Tour: Jurassic Frontier
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: I've always thought the Jurassic Frontier must be a haven for gathering. Haven't you? Hey, you should take this Quest! Collect as much as you like, and just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket from the Supply Box when you want to return.

name: Harvest Tour: Dunes
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: I can see you're interested in stuff that can be gathered in the Dunes. I've got just the Quest for this eventuality! Go! And gather to your heart's content! Just deliver a Paw Pass Ticket when you're done, and back you'll come.

name: Harvest Tour: Verdant Hills
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: You've got that wanting-to-gather- -stuff-in-the-Verdant-Hills look about you, if I ever saw it. Well, here's a Quest tailor-made for you! Go and gather till you drop. When you're done just deliver a Paw Pass Ticket to return!

name: Harvest Tour: Arctic Ridge
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Oh, I can see you're hankering to go a-gathering at the Arctic Ridge! Here's a Quest you'll love! Gather till your arms o'erflow, and when you can't carry anymore, deliver a Paw Pass Ticket.

name: Harvest Tour: Misty Peaks
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: I have a Quest right here that will allow you to fulfill your long-cherished desire to gather on Misty Peaks. I know, you don't have to tell me! Who wouldn't want to gather in the Misty Peaks? Once you've had your fill of gathering, just deliver a Paw Pass Ticket.

name: Defiant Maccao
flavor_text: Um, excuse me, there's a Great Maccao up at Ruined Pinnacle, causing havoc. Came flying at me, so I fled. Beat me black and blue. Isn't it your job to keep the wildlife in line? Would you mind doing something about it? I mean seriously, I can't work like this.

name: Wyvern Egg Delivery: Breakfast
flavor_text: Ah, a nice Wyvern Egg would be just the thing for a royal breakfast. In fact, I'll probably be for the chop if I don't manage to lay my hands on one. If you could source a couple for me, I'll be sure to make it worth your while!

name: Husk Hunter
flavor_text: You know, when comets stain the sky red, there are comet fragments to be had on the ground beneath! The Wycademy calls these Burned Husks, and they're important subjects for study. Do you think you can find us some at the Ruined Pinnacle?

name: Dune the Honors
goal_text: Hunt a Daimyo Hermitaur and a Barroth
flavor_text: My liege lord certainly has a lot of possessions... All of them necessary, I'm sure, but they do slow things down a tad. Not to mention the Hermitaurs and Barroths that plague the Dunes! Could I prevail upon you to clear the way for us a smidgen?

name: Eau de Congalala
flavor_text: Keep your distance! I got hit with a stink that could peel paint! A Congalala got me good when I went to the Jurassic Frontier. Seize the beast that dealt what I smelt, Hunter! I gotta get payback!

name: Bag a Barroth!
flavor_text: I've found the most fascinating specimen in the Dunes that I want you to trap! Even from far away I was able to spot some weird and wonderful behavioral patterns, so imagine what I can find up close! Oh, and naturally I'll let it go when I'm done.

name: Verdant Hills Horror
goal_text: Hunt a Yian Kut-Ku and a Gypceros
flavor_text: So I was...ulp...after a Yian Kut-Ku in the Verdant Hills, then this...urk... Gypceros flew through the air. First a weird big-eared bird, then a weird poisonous bird... I can't take it! Somebody take 'em out so I can get back to normal... Ulp.

name: Season's Eatings
flavor_text: Right. There are some seasonal ingredients in the Misty Peaks which are ripe for the taking. Naturally, two brutish Arzuros have to turn up and ruin everything. I need to grab the ingredients while they're fresh, so you need to fell those beasts.

name: Harvest Tour: Jungle
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Looks like you're interested in the wonderful bounty of materials you can get in the Jungle. Well then, have I got just the Quest for you! Gather as much as you like, then deliver a Paw Pass Ticket from the Supply Box to return at any time.

name: Perfectly Normal Rock
flavor_text: Bloomin' 'eck I got a right old surprise! I heard there was a big rock needin' movin' out in the Marshlands, but when I went to move it wi' my prodigious strength, turned out ter be a Basarios... I think this might be a job fer you!

name: Dazed and Confused
flavor_text: Malfestio's weird mojo got us all befuddled and we lost our way. We were lucky that we ran aground on the Ruined Pinnacle, to be honest. Could you hunt the Malfestio and make sure nobody else falls foul of it?

name: Bloof!
flavor_text: Ahhh, I want to see one so badly. What? A Zamtrios, of course! What else would I want to see? One second it's spiky and mean, the next...BLOOF! Completely round! Hunt one down and I'll, er, just watch from the sidelines.

name: Khezu Deserve It
flavor_text: Oooof. Me shoulders are givin' me trouble again. You know what I need? One of them electric shock sacs. Yes, a nice electric massage should do the trick. Could you hunt me a Khezu at the Arctic Ridge?

name: Primal Forest Arachnids
flavor_text: I'm gonna do what I can as Pokke Chief to strengthen the Soaratorium and help mine ore! Thing is, the ore's hard to get, thanks to a little Nerscylla infestation in the Primal Forest. Sounds like a job for you, Hunter!

name: Grapes of Rathian
flavor_text: Oh, please hear me out! I was doing research at the Ruined Pinnacle, when I was set upon by a Rathian. If I can't finish my work, I won't be able to submit my report to my client before the deadline... Hunter, could you take care of that rotten Rathian for me?

name: It's Gonna Eat Me!
flavor_text: Hey, somethin' pretty bad's going down! I was out fishin' in the Desert, when some Nibelsnarf jerk shot out of the ground at me! Can't fish with one of those goofs hanging round. Take care of it for me, will ya? I'll see you right if you do!

name: Airship Upgrade: Plesioth
flavor_text: The Plesioth's ability to move quickly through the water could be used to enhance the Soaratorium. Rumor has it that there's one flitting about at the Ruined Pinnacle. Hunter, can you do the honors? Just take it down and we'll harvest the materials.

name: Whiteout
flavor_text: Hey, Hunter! I got a message from a noble from my country, who's hemmed in by a Blangonga, and out of food and fuel. I need you to go and take care of that monstrosity. Can you help me, Hunter?

name: Airship Upgrade: Lavasioth
flavor_text: Lavasioth live in molten rock, so their shells are just the thing for insulating the outer parts of the Soaratorium. You're sure to find some up at the Volcano. If you take care of the hunting, we'll take care of the gathering!

name: Naked Aggression
flavor_text: There was a hunter in town walking about in only his drawers! Naturally I had to protect the townspeople, so I questioned him. He claims a Ceanataur ripped up his clothes! I need you to verify his claims, and eliminate the monster. If there is one.

name: The Perils of Commerce
flavor_text: A Felyne helping my sister out has got himself in a bit of a pickle! At the Verdant Hills he gathered up some goods for her to sell, but stumbled into a Najarala's neighborhood! I don't like to press you, but could you come to the Felyne's rescue?

name: Airship Upgrade: Nargacuga
flavor_text: The tough yet light scales of a Nargacuga are perfect for reinforcing the main and auxiliary engines! I've got reports of one tearing up the Jungle, so could you hunt it down? We'll take care of recovering what we need.

name: Wrong Bird, Idiots...
flavor_text: I've been under orders from the Guild to train up some youngsters. I thought it was high time they take on a Yian Kut-Ku, so I put out the request and what do I find? They went for a Yian Garuga instead. They're idiots, but I can't leave 'em be. Help out, eh?

name: A Trace of Light
flavor_text: My father used to travel the world, but ever since he went missing all I've had are the notes of all the adventures he used to have... But there's one note about glowing insects... I think he means Great Thunderbugs, and they might be a clue to finding him!

name: Shell Game
flavor_text: Hunter, Hunter! Are you familiar with the Beautiful Shells you can find in the Jungle? How brilliantly shiny they are! Get me some and I'll bash 'em into round shapes, pass 'em off as pearls and watch the moolah roll in! ...Ahem, pretend you didn't hear that.

name: It's Not Uragaan's, It's Mine!
flavor_text: Hiya Hunter! We got a bit of a problem here. It's volcano season, which is better than it sounds, because all the good ore comes out! Yay! Sadly, an Uragaan has come out too, and it's kinda terrorizing the miners! Can you help keep them safe?

name: Harvest Tour: Frozen Seaway
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: I can see that you're interested in what you can harvest from the Frozen Seaway. Am I right? Then take this Quest! Gather to your heart's content, then deliver a Paw Pass Ticket from the Supply Box when you're ready to return and start sifting through your data!

name: Harvest Tour: Volcanic Hollow
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Have you ever wondered what you can gather from the Volcanic Hollow? Me too! Lucky for you, here's the perfect Quest. Gather to your heart's content, then deliver a Paw Pass Ticket from the Supply Box when you're ready to return and see what you found!

name: Harvest Tour: Deserted Island
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Aren't deserted islands great? All that data just lying around! Hey, if you're in the mood to gather stuff, take this Quest! Gather to your heart's content, then deliver a Paw Pass Ticket from the Supply Box when you're ready to return and start sifting through your data!

name: Harvest Tour: Marshlands
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Do you know what's awesome? Fieldwork! You agree, right? Of course! We're best friends! You should take this Quest! Gather to your heart's content, then deliver a Paw Pass Ticket from the Supply Box when you're ready to return and start sifting through your data!

name: Harvest Tour: Volcano
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Oh, you're just itching to go gathering at the Volcano, aren't you? I can tell from the look in your eyes. Well, you're in luck with this Quest! Gather as much as you like, then deliver a Paw Pass Ticket when you're done!

name: Mushroom for Improvement
flavor_text: We're doing some pretty important research here! Namely, how to make every mealtime delicious! That's why we need some Tall Mushrooms from the Ruined Pinnacle. The Wycademy's future depends on it! I admit, it's an acquired taste...

name: I See It Rollin'...
flavor_text: That stupid overgrown fanged tumbleweed! This dumb Volvidon just won't stop trundling around after me. If only there was some brave, strong hunter who could teach it a lesson once and for all... Oh...? You'll take care of it? Seriously? How sweet!

name: Wyvern Egg Delivery: Lunch
flavor_text: Oh bother, I need to find some Wyvern Eggs before the royal luncheon! My position as Royal Cook is at steak! I mean stake! I mean-- look, can you just throw me a bone here? Preferably in egg form?

name: My New Life as a Maccao
goal_text: Hunt a Kecha Wacha and a Great Maccao
flavor_text: On the way to the Ancestral Steppe, I got noticed by a Kecha Wacha and a Great Maccao! Yikes! Luckily, I thought quickly and started jumping around pretending I was a monster too. I think it's working, but my legs are getting tired... Help me!

name: Much Ado about Najarala
flavor_text: O Hunter strong in arm and weapon skill: Seek thou the Primal Forest's cunning serpent; And heed ye well the danger of his coils; That ye may capture this fell beast alive. And in the taking of thy monstrous prize, return thee here to sate my curious eyes.

name: A Seaway Just for You
flavor_text: My acquaintance says that hunters freeze up with happiness when they encounter their target. Naturally, I was inclined to discover whether there was any truth to this. Would you mind going to the Frozen Seaway to demonstrate for me?

name: A Cure for Laziness
flavor_text: I don't wanna get outta bed... Mom yelled at me and the world sucks and no one understands how hard it is. But you know, if someone hunted an Uragaan in the Volcanic Hollow, I might be inspired to get outta bed. (Hehe, maybe if I'm not napping.)

name: The Furtilizer That Time Furgot
flavor_text: The trick to purrlantin' the best veggies, youngster, is not to skimp on the furtilizer! And do you know where the best furtilizer comes from? That's right: the Jurassic Frontier! Immortal moths, 'bout ten should do it. Watch out fur the Nargacuga though!

name: Just Deserts
goal_text: Hunt a Nibelsnarf and a Cephadrome
flavor_text: Well, I say! I was crossing the Dunes when I was accosted by a Nibelsnarf and a Cephadrome! Not only was it jolly scary but now I'm simply COVERED in sand! I can't be seen in public like this! I say, are you in the revenge biz? Fancy slaying some monsters?

name: Fishing's Lure
flavor_text: Nothin' beats fishing. It's just like being a kid again! You should take a load off and catch some Goldenfish. You'll find a glimmer of the good ol' days in the glitter of water in the Misty Peaks!

name: A Royal Rumble
flavor_text: Pardon my discretion, my good hunter, but my liege lord -- who shall remain nameless -- desires a live queen of his own. I fear I am not up to the task, but I cannot refuse his request.

name: The Way of the Nargacuga
flavor_text: I've just had a flash of inspurration for a new technique! But I'll need to take a look at the movements of a Nargacuga... Could you hunt one fur me? I'll watch you fight and that should give me all the refurence I need!

name: Deserted Island Missive
goal_text: Hunt a Malfestio and a Tetsucabra
flavor_text: This is my last hope. Been attacked by a Malfestio and Tetsucabra on Deserted Island. Am hiding in the forest. Have given this note to a friendly Moofah in the vain hope it'll end up in the right hands. Please help. And feed the Moofah, he's a good boy.

name: Marshlands Horror Story
goal_text: Hunt a Shogun Ceanataur and a Congalala
flavor_text: I was walking in the Marshlands when I smelled something really weird. I ran to a cave, but inside there was this strange dry rustling nearby and getting closer. And once it was directly above me, the sound stopped... -- Here the record ends --

name: Volcanic Vexations
goal_text: Hunt a Basarios and an Iodrome
flavor_text: Don't you just hate it when two monsters pop up at once and throw you off your game? I mean, which one do you hunt first!? Anyway, I hate being decisive, so I'm gonna give YOU the chance to get decisive on them...permanently.

name: Airship Upgrade: Barioth
flavor_text: Barioth maintain high levels of energy even in the coldest of environments. If we used the materials from a Barioth to reinforce our ship's hull, it should be able to withstand the extreme altitudes of the Ruined Pinnacle!

name: The Fly in the Ointment
flavor_text: We were investigating whether rumors of giant cooperative insects are true, and our specimens got away. They flew towards the Jungle. Rumors are true! Great day for science! Terrible day for scientists! HELP!

name: You're under a Rath
flavor_text: Nyahoo! That's my stage name, dont'cha know! I had a spangly costume to go with it, but it got stolen. It'll be in Rathalos territory now... But it's okay -- my "totally platonic friend" is getting it back! So, can you hunt us the Rathalos?

name: Lagiacrus x Width x Height
flavor_text: EUREKA! I have it! The volume of any object, no matter how large, can be gauged by how much water it displaces! Yes, even a Lagiacrus! Don't believe me? Then hunt me one and I'll prove it to you!

name: Whatdunnit
flavor_text: A series of assaults on peddlers in the Jungle, each occurring on a cloudless day? With multiple reports of thunderous roaring and an eerie glow? The culprit you are looking for...is a Zinogre! And I shall prove it by having you hunt it!

name: Wish upon a...Gravios?
flavor_text: Well, our able hands went off to look for this fallen star for you Wycademy folk, but it looks like we wound up aggravatin' a Gravios instead! Could ya lend 'em a hand? I'd help ya, kiddo, but I'm busy battling the lumbago myself!

name: Man, Mizutsune Again?
flavor_text: Our prayers do not seem to have repelled these comets' dark designs. Once more, a Mizutsune threat has descended upon our village... You will not hesitate to remove this monster from our vicinity.

name: Alas, Astalos Again
flavor_text: Kokoto has a problem -- we got an Astalos on the asta-loose, and I need it to get asta-lost. I don't know if this is to do with those creepy ancient writings you guys found, but I do know you're the only Wycademy hunter around who can take care of it.

name: Groan, Gammoth Again
flavor_text: I had a bad feeling ever since that Valstrax monster showed up. And now here we are, with a rampaging Gammoth back to finish the job he started earlier... Hunter, I don't like my people being in danger. Can you hunt this Gammoth for me and Pokke?

name: Great, Glavenus Again
flavor_text: Well, Valstrax's coming promised despair and destruction and we're not being disappointed. Another Glavenus is back and terrorizing the Wycademy! We have no one else to rely on, I'm afraid, but we need to get this menace away from my village!

name: You Had One Job
goal_text: Hunt an Agnaktor and a Lavasioth
flavor_text: Turns out those newbie hunters of mine have the worst luck I've ever seen. Sent them to hunt a Lavasioth and they end up aggravating an Agnaktor as well. I mean, they don't look even remotely the same, right? Is it just me? Anyway, can you help them out again?

name: Earn Your Gear
flavor_text: If you want new equipment...you have to prove...prove that you're strong enough... Duramboros...in the Marshlands... If you're not strong enough... you'll fail.

name: Fearful Symmetry
flavor_text: Guah ha ha! We figured you might be interested in picking up some of our slack. It's a Tigrex hunt in the Desert. How about it, Scrawn? We'd go, but our bowels are moving in the opposite direction if ya know what I mean! Bah ha-- hurgh...

name: Impossible Standards
flavor_text: One night, as I left the ballroom, I saw through the mist a silvery creature... And how majestic it was! No dress could hope to match its beauty! Please, somebody hunt that wondrous beast and let me look upon its effulgent radiance again!

name: Ruined and Tarnished
flavor_text: The Wycademy research team that went to the Ruined Pinnacle bumped into a Gore Magala! They're safe for now, but there's no telling for how long! Please, Hunter, you have to do something, for their sake!

name: Rathalos Topping
flavor_text: Calling all elite hunters! I'd like for you to hunt a Rathalos at the recently discovered location we call the Ruined Pinnacle. If it's not too much trouble, that is. And you don't have to be particularly elite either...

name: Taming of the Zinogre
flavor_text: O Hunter sharp in mind and weapon true; Atop the Ruined Pinnacle it lies; A thund'rous beast with claws as sharp as steel, so proud and golden in its regal stride. Take it captive, Hunter, like my heart, and let its bloody splendor here impart.

name: Ore d'Oeuvres
flavor_text: Our team crash-landed on the Ruined Pinnacle, no thanks to a Gravios. Then it started eating our research samples because its primary food source is ore! Could you help us out here? It's actually embarrassing...

name: Desert Death Duel
flavor_text: We set out in pursuit of new land to reclaim, when all of a sudden, THWAM! A Glavenus hit us out of nowhere. But come wind or city- leveling monster, we're not giving up our dream! Come, fellow settlers! Today, we make history!

name: Soap Opera
flavor_text: Hunter, I ask this on behalf of all the chiefs in this region: Please hunt the Mizutsune blocking our trade routes. I hope the reward is of interest to you. (Ugh, the stress. Once the market's back, I'm going on the BIGGEST shopping spree...)

name: Mt. Duramboros
flavor_text: I live to hike. To date, I've climbed to every mountain there is in the known world. But then my friend told me that the Duramboros is basically a moving mountain. She's right, of course. Now, I can't move mountains...but I believe you can, Hunter!

name: A Jungle Just for You
goal_text: Hunt a Yian Garuga and a Plesioth
flavor_text: My acquaintance says that hunters become awfully flustered when fighting two monsters at once. Naturally, I was inclined to discover whether there was any truth to this. So, how about you jaunt along to the Jungle to demonstrate for me?

name: Flappy Pest
flavor_text: Why does this keep happening!? Now there's a big flappy Astalos in the way of the ship! Just...argh! Well, good thing we can outmaneuver it. Quick, to the Ancestral Steppe! And steppe on it!

name: Pheromone Moans
flavor_text: Now, I was lookin' ta inspect me some bug pheromones so I could make my bees down at the apiary happy, but I need 'em fresh. Real fresh. I'm talkin' straight from the Seltas Queen. So I'd be real grateful if ya could rustle her up from the Primal Forest.

name: Primal Panic
flavor_text: Urgently requesting help in Primal Forest. Gore Magala identified near area frequented by villagers. Some injuries sustained. Immediate hunter action required.

name: Distress Signal
flavor_text: Mayday! Mayday! Anyone who can hear my voice, send help to the Primal Forest at once! A pair of Nerscylla have me in their web. Cripes, they're looking right at me! I'm in a sticky situation here!

name: Snow Joke
flavor_text: I got in a fight recently, and I kinda lost. But I heard that if you eat the snow off a Gammoth, you get super strong! I wanna be able to stomp around and make earthquakes too! Can you catch me a Gammoth, Hunter- person? Can you can you can you?

name: Ruler of the Frozen Seaway
flavor_text: What I saw... It was like terror incarnate -- jaws wide open, lunging at a poor Popo. Just thinking about it stiffens my whiskers. Someone put an end to this nightmare!

name: An Ice Surprise
flavor_text: I was tearing up the tundra on my sled in the Frozen Seaway when these two Zamtrios leaped right through the ice. KRACK! I purractically jumped out of my fur! Can some brave hunter skate in to help?

name: Capture the Agnaktor
flavor_text: To understand the Agnaktor, you must understand the volcano. The two are inseparable. You must also understand the havoc it wreaks, and our duty to prevent it from reaching our homes. Yes, we suspect you're really going to need your wits about you for this one!

name: Desert Double Act
goal_text: Hunt a Tigrex and a Volvidon
flavor_text: The Tigrex roars.  The Volvidon rolls. Two girls implore:  Please save our souls! Two Dune-bound hunts.  Two monsters slain. We know you can. So end their reign!

name: Interruption: Eggstra Delivery
flavor_text: Oh what? She's charging off on another Quest and neglecting her Guild Gal duties? Well, I can't say it's a huge surprise. Can you please yank her out of trouble again? She's delivering Wyvern Eggs because she's insane. Sorry to ask this of you again...

name: Once upon a Barioth
flavor_text: I heard a legend when I was a kid of a ghostly wyvern, and I've been following that ghost all these years. My sleuthing tells me that it must live somewhere in a land of ice and snow... What I need you for is to capture it. I'll take care of the songwriting duties.

name: Snowball Skirmish
goal_text: Hunt a Blangonga and a Lagombi
flavor_text: Mi-hao, Hunter! I'm betting with the Wyverian merchant man about which is tougher: a snowball thrown by a Blangonga or one thrown by a Lagombi. Can you go to the Arctic Ridge and hunt them both, maybe take a few snowballs for the team? Miao!

name: Sky Tribe: Rice to the Occasion
flavor_text: Ahoy! I'm thinking of treating the Soaratorium crew to our special Hunting Fleet Fisherman's Rice, and the stuff I need's on the Deserted Island. O' course, a Lagiacrus is lurking there too, so you'll need to take care of that. Cheers, pally!

name: My Kirin for a Horse
flavor_text: My meowster is a tad...deluded. He thinks he's this famous knight, you see. Just earlier he spied a Kirin, said, "that seems like a suitable mount" and tried to drag it off! Could you just slay it so he'll give up already?

name: Disaster on the Steppes
flavor_text: I wandered into a Seltas nest while out looking for Herbs... I chased off an insect blocking my way, which angered a hungry Kecha Wacha... THEN I saw smoke far off and thought I was saved, but it was just Gore Magala scales! Help me, I'll do anything! Heeelp!

name: Jurassic Frontier Fracas
flavor_text: Seriously, what is up with the Jurassic Frontier these days? Monsters tearing about here, rolling all over there... How am I supposed to gather fresh ingredients for medicine with all this going on!? Do you reckon you could thin the numbers a little bit?

name: Just a Mirage...?
flavor_text: You gotta come quick! I spotted a Gendrome in the Dunes, then a Barroth came out of a sandstorm, then I heard a roar and a Tigrex showed up! We don't have enough people to defend the settlement if they attack!

name: Trouble Comes in Threes
flavor_text: We've got three very much unwanted visitors at our mine, in the form of an Iodrome, a Basarios and a Gravios! They started going crazy the moment they arrived, I feel like I'm watching a volcano erupting! Can you hotfoot it over here and help?

name: Thousand-Blade Brouhaha
flavor_text: E-erm... I'm just a novice, but I was in the Desert earlier trying to gather stuff... But there was this big Seregios flapping about and...well, let's just say it was a close call. I think maybe someone with a bit more skill should take care of it?

name: Duel With the Devil
flavor_text: Diablos regularly attack the border wall, but this time the Border Captain was injured! With the chain of command broken we had no choice but to withdraw. Somebody needs to deal with that Diablos!

name: Bad Hair Day: Brachydios
flavor_text: Oh baby, I've found it: the burning inspiration I've been longing for! Let me give you a clue: It has an EXPLOSIVE pompadour. That's right, the Brachydios! Now go do that voodoo that you do!

name: Wheel of Time
flavor_text: There's a song in my village of a traveler who traversed time itself. That traveler, it would seem, is an elder dragon. And it's homecoming time. Protect my home and my people, I beg of you.

name: Beware the Comet of Disaster
flavor_text: Friend, it's time to settle things with Valstrax! Each and every one of us will keep a close eye on you from the Soaratorium. Please...win this thing and come back alive!

name: Roar of the Rajang
flavor_text: Memo to research team. Rajang sighted in the Desert. Subject previously considered too dangerous to apprehend, but research team now requested to proceed to Desert and engage with maximum available force.

name: Deviljho Food Cake
flavor_text: Please, someone help! A Deviljho's taken a liking to our family home and it won't stop eating things! If we can't get it away it'll swallow up the whole house, and my family's in there! I need it to bite the dust before it takes a big bite out of my house!

name: Advanced: Steel Yourself
goal_text: Slay a Kushala Daora or repel it
flavor_text: Hey, have you heard anything about this steel dragon doohickey in the Jungle? I need it. I need to make a sword out of a dragon. I've never needed anything more in my life. I also need you to take care of it while I pick up the materials, okay?

name: Advanced: Empire of the Sun
goal_text: Slay a Teostra or repel it
flavor_text: Some of our hunters haven't shown up at their meeting point after finishing a hunt in the Desert. We've found traces of an explosion nearby, and fear the worst: Teostra. We need an experienced hunter to support the search efforts.

name: Advanced: Wrong One Silver
flavor_text: One of my little hunter newbies has gone off alone to hunt a Rathian. Well, he was totally ready for it. What he wasn't ready for was the Silver Rathalos that showed up instead. Were new hunters always this unlucky!? Please, pull him out of the fire!

name: Advanced: Heart of Gold
flavor_text: Okay, this is embarrassing, but I took this hunt to take care of a troublesome Gold Rathian. Thing is, when I found myself in front of her I was consumed by how beautiful her golden scales were and I couldn't do anything! Please, hide my shame! Hunt it for me!

name: King of Hellfire
flavor_text: Memo to research team. Researchers investigating Ingle Isle under threat from wild Akantor. Threat level extremely high. Research team requested to proceed to Ingle Isle with alacrity and eliminate the Akantor.

name: The Seat of a God
flavor_text: Memo to research team. Large-scale collapse of iceberg reported in Polar Field. Dragonwatch reports collapse due to nesting Ukanlos. Research team requested to remove Ukanlos using all force at their disposal.

name: Stormlord
flavor_text: Memo to research team. Amatsu sighted at Sacred Pinnacle. Reports of it already causing widespread storm damage in the area. Research team requested to proceed to Sacred Pinnacle and eliminate the threat.

name: An Almost-Certainly-Fine Comet
goal_text: Slay a Valstrax or repel it
flavor_text: Oh jeez, a comet fell in the Jurassic Frontier. I'll bet that's the omen of doom everyone's been talking about. I'm sure it's fine, but just in case it's some kind of ancient, vicious dragon, would you mind going to check up on it for me?

name: Turn That Frown Upside Down
goal_text: Slay a Valstrax or repel it
flavor_text: I heard that a comet landed in the Frozen Seaway and thought it might finally be a bit of good news for me. But just my luck -- it turned out to be a merciless dragon from an ancient age. Great. Could you maybe...take care of it for me?

name: The Baleful Comet
goal_text: Slay a Valstrax or repel it
flavor_text: "A baleful comet, crimson-bright:  the terrible Valstrax!  The hunter gathers all his might,  And seeks the monster's tracks-" Well? What are you waiting for? You heard the song! I can't finish it unless the hunter (that's you) actually goes!

name: Grave Peril
flavor_text: Memo to the research team. Nakarkos sighted at Wyvern's End. All available hunters have been mobilized, but to no avail. Research team is requested to proceed to Wyvern's End and eliminate the threat.

name: Advanced: Monster Hunter!
flavor_text: 'Tis truly a wondrous thing to encounter one of such might again. Upon completion of this final hunt, you may find your eyes opened to the true meaning of being a hunter.

name: Advanced: Proof of a Champion
flavor_text: Once upon a time, there was a hunter who sought to be honored as a champion above all others. Do you have the mettle to follow in their footsteps and prove that the spirit of the champion is alive today? Of course you do!

name: Advanced: Wycademy Challenge
flavor_text: This is the culmination of decades of work picking through ancient tomes and tablets and translating forgotten languages. There is a mystery at the heart of this world, Hunter, and we finally know where the key to it lies! Proceed there with haste!

name: Advanced: Guild's Greatest Hit
flavor_text: I honestly never thought anybody could make it this far...but a hunter's journey never ends, and the trial I'm about to give you is just another bump in the road. There's nothing to fear; get to it and show me you have what it takes to succeed!

name: Deviljho Dispossession
