flavor_text: The other merchants and I have been discussing how to source the stone from the Ruined Pinnacle. One of the *ahem* biggest barriers is a Deviljho roaming about. We just can't get near! Commerce demands you hunt the beast so we can get at the stone!

name: Red Dragon, Green Dragon
goal_text: Hunt a Rathalos and a Rathian
flavor_text: My mom's sick, and there's some herbs in the Ancestral Steppe that'll make her better! But I can't go 'cause a Rathalos and Rathian couple just built their nest there! Mom's gonna get worse if we don't do something! Please!

name: Primal Panic
flavor_text: Urgently requesting help in Primal Forest. Rajang identified inflicting destruction on plants and animals alike. Whole ecosystem could be in danger. Immediate hunter action required.

name: A Cure for Idleness
flavor_text: Dad's been flipping out at me, but I just can't put my mind to studying. I don't think I can concentrate until someone hunts down a Seregios at the Volcanic Hollow for me... (Ha! I'll never have to study now!)

name: Bring Me My Sword
flavor_text: Ah, nary a soul who undertook this Quest has returned in success. It's truly tragic that none are up to the task in this day and age. What's the world coming to! Surely, there must be one who will step up to the challenge?

name: Horned and Dangerous
flavor_text: We've confirmed a sighting of the winged, twin-horned Diablos from the watchtower. A caravan will be passing by there soon, too, and it'll be a real mess if they encounter that beast. Can you capture it and make the Dunes safe for commerce?

name: Barioth's Blizzard
flavor_text: Indeed, it was a strange thing. A pair of white devils at the Arctic Ridge... A pair, can you believe! We sent out a party to take care of them, but only one made it back. Someone else can take this job. I don't get paid enough for this...

name: Bag a Brachydios
flavor_text: We've been researching the Brachydios for some time now, but it's still a creature draped in mystery. However, one thing of which we can be certain, is that it's a totally unique beast. Could you capture one for us so that we can press closer to its enigma?

name: Blazing Black of a Dark God
flavor_text: Memo to research team. Unforeseen disaster occurred, total destruction of area imminent without Wycademy intervention. Proceed to Ingle Isle immediately to render aid.

name: Advanced: Ranging Rathalos
flavor_text: Been gettin' word of a Rathalos circling the Verdant Hills, and this one's way stronger than your average Rathalos... Eventually it's gonna approach the village, so I want you to take it out before it causes any damage. Got it?

name: Advanced: Roaring in the Ridge
flavor_text: I've got a report that says a Tigrex was spotted at the summit of the Arctic Ridge, and this one's much stronger than your average specimen. Everybody in the village still has all their body parts, but that doesn't mean we're not still in danger.

name: Advanced: Moonlight Zinogre
flavor_text: There is a Zinogre in the Misty Peaks whose power, I'm told, is much greater than that of a regular specimen. It may be most dangerous, but you would be honored to eliminate it and keep the villagers safe from harm.

name: Advanced: Trial at the Pinnacle
goal_text: Hunt a Silver Rathalos and a Gold Rathian
flavor_text: Hoi, youngster! I can tell you about a place nobody else knows. There the golden sun and silver moon are always shining day and night, and visitors encounter a trial the likes of which they've never seen before! So, wanna give it a shot? Hehehehe...

name: Advanced: Karma Chameleos
goal_text: Slay a Chameleos or repel it
flavor_text: You might think it's impossible to fight an enemy you can't see, youngster, but I'm here to tell you that's not the case! You gotta connect with your life force. Use the eyes in your heart... And then...SMASH IT WITH EVERYTHING YOU'VE GOT! SMASH SMASH SMASH!

name: Coalition of Chaos
flavor_text: Hunter, I ask this on behalf of all the chiefs in this region: Please rid us of the scourges destroying our fields. Our foes number three. A Gypceros, a Rathian, and a Yian Garuga. (Ugh, the stress. Once this is over I'm going to take a nice stroll through the fields.)

name: Verdant Hills Just for You
flavor_text: My acquaintance says hunters cry with happiness whenever they find new prey. Naturally, I was inclined to discover whether there was any truth to this. Would you mind going to the Verdant Hills to demonstrate for me?

name: Misty Peaks Missive
flavor_text: Expedition ruined. Attacked by Royal Ludroth and Plesioth, blown by Duramboros tail into the heart of the Misty Peaks. Have entrusted this note to a friendly Gargwa in the vain hope that it falls into friendly hands. Worst expedition.

name: Deserted Islands Horror
flavor_text: One day as I was on my way to the Deserted Island I heard thunder from a cloudless sky. An unsettling blue light leached color from the forest... What was that sound? ...So sleepy... -- Here the record ends --

name: The Marshlands Morass
flavor_text: While researching in the Marshlands I was attacked by a Congalala, so I ran for it! I felt a tug on my foot and knew I was done for. I find myself caught up in a shadowy spider web. And then I hear slithering all around me. Well, out of the frying pan, into the fire...

name: Advanced: Jurassic Pair
flavor_text: A Glavenus has been sighted at the Jurassic Frontier. According to the observatory, the frontier's been seeing many more formidable monsters than usual. There are also reports of a Yian Garuga up there. A tough pair, no doubt... But if anyone can do it, you can!

name: Advanced: Quarrel Quelling
flavor_text: Are you kidding!? I finally found all the paperwork and they're telling me the trading route into the village has been buried in an avalanche? Now I can't get that delivery of wood to fix the broken roofs! Stop those pesky monsters from fighting and causing avalanches!

name: Beware the Comet of Disaster
goal_text: Slay a Valstrax or repel it
flavor_text: Friend, it's time to finally settle things with Valstrax! Each and every one of us will keep a close eye on you from the Soaratorium. Please...win this thing and come back alive!

name: Wyvern Egg Delivery: Dinner
flavor_text: I have an urgent request! If I do not serve Herbivore Eggs at the upcoming banquet, I'll be fired -- as in literally set on fire! Save me from becoming the main course and you'll be amply rewarded!

name: Advanced: Ultimate Generation
flavor_text: When suitable challengers have appeared, the gate will be opened. The ones you will face are overwhelmingly powerful and fierce. It will be a true test of strength. Take heart, and with weapon in hand, step forth, Hunter. Onwards!

name: Harvest Tour: Jurassic Frontier
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Jurassic Frontier, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Harvest Tour: Dunes
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Dunes, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Harvest Tour: Verdant Hills
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Verdant Hills, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Harvest Tour: Arctic Ridge
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Arctic Ridge, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Harvest Tour: Misty Peaks
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Misty Peaks, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Boot to the Head
flavor_text: Ever taken a jump kick from a Great Maccao? I have! It nailed me, but I got up and wrecked it hard! You jelly? If you think you can do the same, then let me see what you got!

name: Tackling the Tetsucabra
flavor_text: Rock hard! That just about sums up what it's like to fight that thing and see your attacks bounce off those boulders it digs up... I give up! How about you, though? Up for a challenge?

name: Lost in the Jurassic Frontier
flavor_text: My luck is so bad lately. First a Gypceros swipes my Book of Combos, and then a Melynx runs off with my BBQ Spit! At this rate, I'm gonna have to quit hunting! Can you help me out here!?

name: Red-Faced Ruffians
flavor_text: I was taking a walk when a herd of Maccao surrounded me! Those blood-red faces... I was left catatonic for days! I'm too afraid to go out on walks now. Could you purrlease help me, Hunter?

name: A Fern is Forever
flavor_text: A Wycademy kiddo found *hiccup* a boutique urn... I mean a *hiccup* Unique Fern! It's bitter, yet sweet, which would go great with my nightly tipple. *hiccup* Be a pal and nab me some of them, won't ya?

name: Gendrome Roadblock
flavor_text: I've been ferrying goods for a big deal coming up, only packs of Genprey keep messing things up. I'd bet there's an alpha behind it. Take 'em out so my deal won't fall through!

name: In Pursuit of the Sand Wyvern
flavor_text: When a Cephadrome shows up somewhere, a bunch of Cephalos follow suit and wreak havoc on our trade routes! If you take out the Cephadrome, that should get rid of the lot of 'em!

name: Shells of Steel
flavor_text: I hate to ask hunters for help, but there's a huge Hermitaur out in the Dunes that just won't go down nicely. No matter what I do, I can't hurt it. I need you to go after it for me.

name: Hermitaur Party
flavor_text: Hermitaurs are getting to be a real pain... They wait in the sand to ambush us traders, and we can't get anything done! Help us out! Careful, though: A Daimyo Hermitaur's been sighted, too!

name: Ingredient Hunter
flavor_text: I can see the desire in your eyes... The desire for new ingredients, miao! If you purrcure some Tropical Berries for me, I'll paw over some of my special ingredients!

name: Hunt Down the Velocidrome!
flavor_text: My wife was in the Verdant Hills, picking some of my favorite mushrooms, when she was almost attacked by some wyverns! Please, make the woods safe for her again!

name: Local Threat
flavor_text: Yian Kut-Ku have been going after people all over the place, and during my patrol earlier, I spotted one wandering close to town. That curious bugger must be after some Konchu. Can you get rid of it?

name: Financial Focus on Fungus
flavor_text: Mushrooms from the Verdant Hills are suddenly in high demand. If you gather me 20, I'll give you a cut of the profits. Oh, I heard that Gypceros hang around there, so stay sharp!

name: Farming Frustrations
flavor_text: The Velociprey that live up in them there Verdant Hills are a real annoyance, going after our livestock and just being downright ornery. Put a hurtin' on 20 fer me, will ya? Just be careful of their boss!

name: Snow with Occasional Lagombi
flavor_text: [REPORT BEGINS] Lagombi spotted in the Arctic Ridge [STOP] Requesting support from all qualified hunters [STOP] We are snowed in and cannot render assistance [REPORT ENDS]

name: Preying on Giaprey
flavor_text: I've got bad news: A pack of Giaprey is going after our villagers and they need to be stopped! If some kind hunter is up for taking out 20 of the beasts, that'd be great!

name: Special Home Brew
flavor_text: My artisanal home brews steeped in Mountain Herbs are the epitome of liquid refreshment! I want to make more, but I've run out of herbs! I need a refill stat, so go pick me 20, okay?

name: Bulldrome of the Peaks
flavor_text: Gah! I was on my way back from some nice hot springs when BAM! I'm surrounded by Bulldrome -- angry ones! Visiting the inside of a gullet wasn't on my itinerary! Help get me outta here!

name: The Ingredient of Legend
flavor_text: I have tracked down a legendary ingredient in ze Misty Peaks! Keep ze Arzuros busy, and I will purrcure ze ingredient! Then we will be un paw de plus to a legendary dish!

name: Royal Spit Take
flavor_text: Ick! I got splattered with weird gunk that sapped my Stamina, so I couldn't even run! Luckily, a Felyne came by and saved me, but now whenever I see anything yellow...urgh!

name: A Mother's Woes
flavor_text: My son can't stop wetting the bed! I figure I can at least stop having to dry his sheets every day if I can make a cover out of absorbent Ludroth parts... Please get some for me!

name: Jaggi Junket
flavor_text: Are you going to the Misty Peaks? How about we make it interesting, and see how many Jaggi you can slay? I like to make all my retainers compete that way. Come on, it'll be fun!

name: The Next Best Thing
flavor_text: My sweetheart just adores flowers, so it came to me: Why not give him a Balm- stone? The scent of flowers in your pocket! You must find me one! But, I suppose pieces would do just as well.

name: Harvest Tour: Deserted Island
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering at the Deserted Island? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come home.

name: Harvest Tour: Marshlands
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Marshlands, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Insomnia? Meet Hypnotism
flavor_text: My husband's got insomnia. Over the years, I've tried knocking him out to get him to sleep, but it turned out that's not a great idea... So I want you to capture a Malfestio to hypnotize him!

name: Walk 'n Roll
flavor_text: At times a ball of crimson, at times a lumbering, four- legged beast -- one of the Frontier's many terrors: Volvidon! Go now, young hunter. You know what to do!

name: Rocking Rhenoplos
goal_text: Slay 10 before time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: The people here are gettin' rammed by Rhenoplos whenever they leave the village. They told me to take care of them, but you look strong enough. Go hunt some for me!

name: The Desert Gourmand
flavor_text: One minute I was rattlin' along the Dunes in me barrel buggy, mindin' me own. And then, RAAARRR! Cart goes flyin' -- and me with it! What gives!? The barrel business is s'pposed t'be safe, by gum!

name: Tongue-Tied
flavor_text: Yo, Hunter! Long tongues are weird, y'know what I'm sayin'? Especially Volvidon ones! But, y'know, it'd be interesting to see just how long they can get... I know! Go capture me one!

name: The Poison-fanged Duo
flavor_text: Two new alphas joined the Genprey in the Dunes, and now the whole pack of 'em are acting up, and people are gettin' attacked! Time to downsize these bosses -- go wipe the pair out!

name: Konchu Collector
flavor_text: The Konchu is a most fascinating creature -- a bug of many metamorphoses! Attack it and watch it switch into defensive mode for evasive action. I need more specimens for my research!

name: Liver of Legend!
flavor_text: While doing some business out in the Dunes, I heard about a route where livers go for a really high price. I can't ignore the scent of zenny to be made, so hurry and get me eight livers.

name: Noise Violation
flavor_text: The Najarala around the village is making some pawful sounds! Does it think it's some kind of mewsician? Hunter, make it shut up before it drives me up the wall!

name: In Search of the Yian Garuga
flavor_text: In researching the mysteries of the Garuga King, I've come to the theory that the Yian Garuga is the key to solving it all. Hunt me one, and your name will go down in history! Under mine, of course.

name: Finishing the Job
flavor_text: My appurrentice in Pokke Village is in fur a world of trouble! Can't even beat a Velociprey, and she agreed to hunt Velocidrome -- two! To avoid catastrophe, can you go hunt them instead?

name: Fresh is Best
flavor_text: I need you to procure some groceries for me. To be specific, I want meat, and you can get plenty off some Bullfango. Think you can go to the Verdant Hills and hunt me 20 of them?

name: The Shadow in the Mountains
flavor_text: We were up in the Arctic Ridge -- doing a little research -- when all of a sudden, something really creepy and gross plopped down behind us. We managed to escape, but we can't do any research with that thing up there!

name: The New Tenant
flavor_text: A Blangonga has taken up residence in the Arctic Ridge, which spells trouble for us being able to gather firewood. Hurry and take that ugly ape out before we freeze to death!

name: Blango Slaying Tactics
flavor_text: Blango Pelts have so many great uses. In particular, their insulation properties keep you toasty in snow! So could you hunt me 20 Blangos? Thanks! Oh, and watch out for Bulldrome!

name: Operation: Secure Specimen
flavor_text: My boss from hell is making me write up a report on Nargacuga eating habits! No way can I do that on my own! Can you go capture one for me, Hunter? I'll... I'll get the cage ready!

name: Royal Assassination
flavor_text: The Misty Peaks aren't safe for normal travelers now that a Rathian's built her nest there. Can you do something about her so people like me can pass through there in peace!?

name: Ahoy! Royal Ludroth!
flavor_text: Shimpai... I worried because no hear word from Felyne carrying Neko's luggage! If it met Royal Ludroth, all that water would... Taihen! Please shuryo them! "Shuryo" means hunt!

name: Bye Bye Jaggia
flavor_text: Jaggi are awful, am I right? Well, Jaggia are even worse! And now a gang of 'em are terrorizing the Misty Peaks! Please, put a stop to them before they come ruin our crops!

name: Malfestio Festival
flavor_text: selacs s'oitseflaM !gnizamA lortnoc esol uoy ekam yllaer tsum ylpmis I !ydob ruoy fo ,esaelP !selpmas erom evah !em rof emos hctef ...Though the effects seem to be short-lived. *sigh*

name: Wyvern of the Wind
flavor_text: The Nargacuga out on the Deserted Island is scarily fast. Blink and you'll miss it. But, Hunter, it's gotta go! There's nothing more important right now than hunting it, so get to it!

name: Tetsucabra Bounty
flavor_text: Oh, the horror! Oh, the zenny! Apparently, a Tetsucabra is making a mess of some newly developed land. Big reward on its head, I hear. Help me and we'll split it fifty-fifty!

name: Deserted Island Dustup
flavor_text: I'm reporting live from the Deserted Island, where two Arzuros have decided to discuss their differences like civilized monsters. Oh, who am I kidding? Run for your lives! Women and reporters first!

name: Bnahabra Bloodbath
flavor_text: What, you expect me to wear some old sad sack to the big soiree tonight? I wanna feel pretty! I need Bnahabra material to make that happen. So... Uh, hello? Help me make that happen already!

name: Poisonous Pest
flavor_text: Ioprey storming our village, we can handle. But their poison ruining our crops!? That's our livelihood! Take out the big ugly one, and the rest of them should get the hint and leave!

name: Pincer through the Sky
flavor_text: A Shogun Ceanataur's moved into the Marshlands recently and it's attacking people and livestock alike. We're at our wit's end here! We need you to go hunt it down!

name: Serpentine Samba
flavor_text: My huntin' is near as bad as my dancin', but my little sis? Best moves in the tribe! I wanna make her a costume of serpent scales for the big festival. Could ya help me bag a big snake!?

name: Ioprey Hunting
flavor_text: Got a second? I was out working in the Marshlands when a bunch of Ioprey popped up out of nowhere! If you could hunt 20 of them for me, I could get back to work!

name: Attack of the Giant Bugs!
flavor_text: My village is being plagued by giant bugs. If you could squash 50 of them, that'd help us a lot. But keep your guard up! Those bugs are tough in groups and a Najarala's nearby, too!

name: Collect to Combine
flavor_text: Passion is important, but a true combiner knows that the key to quality combining is having fresh materials! So how 'bout you pick me, say, 20 Unique Mushrooms from the Marshlands? Sound good?

name: Harvest Tour: Volcano
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Volcano, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Flames of Glavenus Passion
flavor_text: People only care about the Glavenus's tail, but me? I'm way more into that lava it breathes! How does its body make that stuff!? I want you to hunt it and find that out for me!

name: Tigrex by the Tail
flavor_text: I've got a distress signal from a hunter in the Jurassic Frontier who's run into a Tigrex! Anyone who finds this message is requested to head there and take it down ASAP!

name: Dark Wings, Dark Work
flavor_text: Beneath the azure skies of the Jurassic Frontier lurks a mysterious monster cloaked in black. Writhing in pain, it glares from unseen eyes. The hunter or the hunted: Which will you be?

name: Fossilized Memories
flavor_text: Could you help me gather some Eternal Fossils for a fellow merchant in the Jurassic Frontier? If you do, I'll hook you up with a soft toy that can help you fall asleep!

name: A Thousand Scales of Dread
flavor_text: Breaking news from the Elder Hall: A Seregios has shown up in the Dunes! Any and all skilled hunters are asked to help hunt it as soon as possible. Beware its blades!

name: A Shocking Scoundrel
flavor_text: Sounds like an Astalos showed up in the Verdant Hills. It may be pretty for a monster, but don't be fooled: its attacks are lethal, and it won't hold back. Go prepared.

name: The King's Domain
flavor_text: You hear that, Hunter? It's the roar of a Rathalos, a wyvern that puts fear into even our fearless mercs. We need that thing gone, and it looks like you're the best one for the job!

name: Fury Run Afoul
flavor_text: A shortage of food has got a Gammoth goin' crazy up on the ridge. No one can sleep at night, fearin' it'll come a-chargin' through the walls! I beg ya, put it down so we can rest easy!

name: Lagiacrus Lethargy
flavor_text: The Lagiacrus may be king of the seas, but it's just as scary on land. It was all I could do to distract the beast and hightail it out of there... Think you can fare any better?

name: Moonlit Bubble Bath
flavor_text: What a beautiful creature that Mizutsune is. And the way it uses bubbles to catch its prey... You gotta put a stop to it! What if people slip on those bubbles in the dark? Safety first!

name: Topple the Monarch
flavor_text: Many a poor soul has tried to hunt a Zinogre, only to end up being the one hunted instead. It's truly worthy of its title, "The Hunter." Isn't there anyone who can defy it?

name: Lagiacrushed
flavor_text: The mighty Lagiacrus is feared even by the most hardened men of the sea, and one has shown up where our villagers fish and work! Please, for their safety, hunt the Lagiacrus!

name: Tuff Turf
flavor_text: I was training my tail off on the Deserted Island when, uh, I guess I kinda sorta riled up a Zinogre. My bad! No way I can handle that beast. Somebody beat it up for me!

name: Isle About that Bass
flavor_text: This time, I have a Quest for you. You hear that rumbling sound out of the Deserted Island? I want to know what's causing it. If it seems to be something dangerous, then I want you to eliminate it!

name: Heaven and Earth
goal_text: Hunt a Rathalos and a Rathian
flavor_text: A Rathalos and a Rathian appeared on the Deserted Island. Do you know just how deadly they are when they're together? And during mating season, it's suicide! Still up for the hunt?

name: Fro Shizzle
flavor_text: Oh baby, I just had the grooviest idea: using an Astalos's lightning to style the ultimate 'fro! That's right, so hit the Marshlands and do your thang for me, baby!

name: Bladed Glavenus
flavor_text: I hear there are wyverns in this land that can wield katanas... Where I'm from, no such creatures exist. How do they do it? I'd really like to see one up close. Capture it for me.

name: Fight or Uragaan!
flavor_text: Don't bother readin' any further unless you're a true hunter -- the type who loves that quiver in your guts when you're livin' on the razor's edge. Still with me? Go to the Volcano. Somethin's waitin'.

name: The Shogun's Encampment
flavor_text: Did you hear that two giant Carapaceon appeared at the Volcano!? This is where you hunters leap into action, yeah? If you really are a hunter, then you'll be first in line to take out those beasts!

name: Crustacean Infestation
flavor_text: I was just minding my own business mining stuff when all of a sudden a Ceanataur shows up and bends my Iron Pickaxe clean in half! Rude! Go defeat 20 of them so I can resume my craft!

name: Scavengers United
goal_text: Slay a total of 20 Remobra or Uroktor
flavor_text: I was attacked by some monsters, but I played dead and fooled 'em all! All of 'em...except Uroktor and Remobras! Please, go out and slay them! My pride is at stake!

name: More Coal Please
flavor_text: The giant lance that protects our fortress runs on Coal, and I hear there's plenty at the Volcano! Can you get some for us? If you break all your Pickaxes, you can always combine more!

name: An Early Jurassic Excursion
flavor_text: Every time I try to focus my mind during training, some monster or other always attacks me. Noble Hunter! Clear these beasts from the Jurassic Frontier that I may meditate in peace!

name: Wyvern Sand Runners
flavor_text: On hunts, your footwork must be light, yet sturdy. That's why I always train on the sand! I also look to bird wyverns and Seregios for inspiration. Fight a few so I can study their movements!

name: Zinogre, Bearly Fazed
flavor_text: Did you see that!? An Arzuros totally just picked a fight with that Zinogre! Pretty reckless, I have to say... But whatever, now you should have the chance to get the jump on 'em both!

name: Making it Safe for Swine
flavor_text: Our studies show that the number of Mosswine in the Marshlands has declined due to large monsters in the area! Please, hunt down these beasts and protect the noble Mosswine!

name: Rumble in the Volcano
flavor_text: I saw a Volvidon attacked by a Brachydios at the Volcano! It got away, and now it's roaming dangerously close to my village! Can you hunt it for us? Keep an eye out for the Brachydios, too!

name: It's Electric
flavor_text: Unexplained natural events have been occurring deep within the Jurassic Frontier. Intriguing, don't you think? I believe it's a sign of mythic beasts, but you should go see it with your own eyes.

name: The White Brute
flavor_text: My friends and I sought out a phantom beast. When we came upon it, we had but a moment before it smote us with thunder, casting us asunder. Please help us, Hunter.

name: The Frozen Dictator
goal_text: Slay a Kushala Daora or repel it
flavor_text: I saw it! I know I did! A pair of black wings among a flurry of snow... Then a gust of wind nearly blew me off the mountain! Take my advice and don't even go near that thing!

name: The Elder Dragon of Mist
goal_text: Slay a Chameleos or repel it
flavor_text: I sensed a strong presence and turned around, but there was nobody there. There's no way anything could have sneaked up on us from our vantage point, but still... Keep your guard up, Hunter!

name: Emperor of Flame
goal_text: Slay a Teostra or repel it
flavor_text: I beg of you, help me in carrying out my last task. I've chased a Teostra to the Volcano. Beware its flames, for they may roast you alive if you are careless. Godspeed, Hunter!

name: Stop the Wheel
flavor_text: I've only known the gods from their legends -- never did I expect to see one in my lifetime. Dare you attempt to halt the cycle of death and etch your own name into legend, Hunter?

name: Two-headed Carcass
flavor_text: Attention all hunters. Repelling Nakarkos is now the Wycademy's top priority. Combine your efforts and bring this task to fruition. May luck be with you.

name: Harvest Tour: A. Steppe
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Ancestral Steppe, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Harvest Tour: Primal Forest
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Primal Forest, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Harvest Tour: Jurassic Frontier
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Jurassic Frontier, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Harvest Tour: Dunes
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Dunes, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Harvest Tour: Verdant Hills
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Verdant Hills, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Harvest Tour: Arctic Ridge
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Arctic Ridge, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Harvest Tour: Misty Peaks
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Misty Peaks, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Swing into Action
flavor_text: That danged dirty primate, swinging all over the place, knocking over my cart, hocking up mucus everywhere! I'll be looking for a new line of work if this keeps up. Help me out, Hunter!

name: Ruining the Ruins
flavor_text: Just when I was starting to suspect that something was off about the Steppe, a Yian Kut-Ku sprang from the shadows! Help me secure the area, Hunter, so I can continue my work.

name: Bag the Bounding Bandit
flavor_text: My training is complete, but now, monsters refuse to draw near. My mind and body yearn to test their strength! Honorable Hunter, bring me a Great Maccao that I may challenge!

name: Jaggi of the Steppe
goal_text: Slay a total of 20 Jaggia or Jaggi
flavor_text: We saved up and bought our dream plot of land near the Ancestral Steppe, but it's been overrun by Jaggi! Please drive them off, or I'll never be able to make my dream garden!

name: Ancestral Steppe Fungus Run
flavor_text: Mushroom diets are so hot right now, and I have a lot to lose! Be a dear and bring me some Unique Mushrooms from the Ancestral Steppe. I'll be ready for swimsuit season in no time! Tee hee!

name: Bug Appétit
flavor_text: Legends tell of a faraway land where the people make bugs into burgers. I must partake in this culinary adventure! Someone saw a Seltas in the Primal Forest. Go for it!

name: Gendrome Roadblock
flavor_text: I've been ferrying goods for a big deal coming up, only packs of Genprey keep messing things up. I'd bet there's an alpha behind it. Take 'em out so my deal won't fall through!

name: Lost in the Primal Forest
flavor_text: My luck is so bad lately. First a Gypceros swipes my Book of Combos, and then a Melynx runs off with my BBQ Spit! At this rate, I'm gonna have to quit hunting! Can you help me out here!?

name: Hunt Down the Velocidrome!
flavor_text: My wife, bless her heart, went to the Primal Forest to pick me some of my favorite mushrooms, but was almost attacked by wyverns! Please, make the forest safe for her again!

name: Poison Paralysis Pinch
goal_text: Slay a total of 20 Ioprey or Genprey
flavor_text: Research is my life! I'm currently studying the differences between Poison and Paralysis agents. Ioprey and Genprey are perfect for comparative analysis. Slay me a combined total of twenty!

name: Crystal Bone Collector
flavor_text: Crystal Bones are a source of crucial data about ancient organisms and even modern biological phenomena! Please find me some to further my research, but don't forget to take a Pickaxe!

name: Hair of the Dog
flavor_text: Dad was supposed to play outside with me today, but he said his head hurts! He said that some Slagtoth Oil could cure his "hanged dover" quick! Can you find us some? I wanna go play!

name: Tackling the Tetsucabra
flavor_text: Rock hard! That just about sums up what it's like to fight that thing and see your attacks bounce off those boulders it digs up... I give up! How about you, though? Up for a challenge?

name: So Notable: Great Maccao
flavor_text: You've seen Great Maccao hopping around on their tails and throwing punches, right? My notebook hasn't! At least, not until you go hunt two of them for me so I can make an accurate sketch!

name: The Land Sharq
flavor_text: Argh, my wagon just got marooned in the Dunes! Now, I haven't seen anything fishy out here -- yet -- but I just know there's something waiting to get at my stuff! Find it and let 'em have it!

name: Shells of Steel
flavor_text: I hate to ask hunters for help, but there's a huge Hermitaur out in the Dunes that just won't go down nicely. No matter what I do, I can't hurt it. I need you to go after it for me.

name: Birds of a Feather
goal_text: Hunt a Yian Kut-Ku and a Gypceros
flavor_text: The Verdant Hills are littered with fiery goo and poison. The culprits are obvious, but we can't let them roam around freely. Forgive us, Hunter, but we ask you to please eliminate these two threats.

name: Bullfango Brigade
flavor_text: What's that? A pack of Bullfango in the Verdant Hills!? That would mean no one can approach the area for fear of their lives! Hunter, you're up!

name: Delicious White Livers
flavor_text: There's nothing like sharing a drink with good friends... Only, I forgot to bring food to pair it with! Can you bring me some White Livers? Just remember not to bruise them with bluntified weapons!

name: The Bulldrome Charges
flavor_text: My son wants to be a hunter when he grows up. He tried taking on a Bulldrome, but he lost, of course. As his parent, it's tough seeing him sad like this. Can you hunt this beast roaming the Arctic Ridge?

name: Snow with Occasional Lagombi
flavor_text: [REPORT BEGINS] Lagombi spotted in the Arctic Ridge [STOP] Requesting support from all qualified hunters [STOP] We are snowed in and cannot render assistance [REPORT ENDS]

name: Arzuros Encroaches
flavor_text: I have a field up in the Misty Peaks. Nice and safe... That is, until an Arzuros showed up! Now I'm too scared to harvest my crops! Go beat it up so I can get back to work!

name: Royal Spit Take
flavor_text: Ick! I got splattered with weird gunk that sapped my Stamina, so I couldn't even run! Luckily, a Felyne came by and saved me, but now whenever I see anything yellow...urgh!

name: Netting Neopterons
flavor_text: It's not easy for my son, being the center of the universe and all. The other children are too jealous to join him in his new hobby: bug collecting! You there, help my boy catch some bugs!

name: Clash of Rivals
goal_text: Slay a total of 30 Bullfango or Rhenoplos
flavor_text: The Arena overflow with Bullfango and Rhenoplos. Too much for little Cha- Cha! And if they breaka-lake the place, Cha-Cha be in more of a pickle! Hunt-hunt them for me... Please?

name: A Powerful Team
flavor_text: W-What should I do? There are so many monsters runnin' about in the Arena! Is it 'cause I blew my Field Horn? I mean, I've never even seen this many monsters in the same place before! Help!

name: Enter the Giadrome
flavor_text: Giaprey are clever carnivores. Super-fast on their feet, too. And you know what else? They've got a big, bad boss, called a Giadrome! Can you show me some badass moves that'll teach it a lesson and send 'em all packing?

name: Harvest Tour: Frozen Seaway
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Frozen Seaway, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Harvest Tour: Volcanic Hollow
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Volcanic Hollow, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Harvest Tour: Deserted Island
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering at the Deserted Island? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come home.

name: Harvest Tour: Marshlands
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Marshlands, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: Harvest Tour: Volcano
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering in the Volcano, young Hunter? Take this Quest and you can gather as much as you like! Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come back.

name: So Notable: Kecha Wacha
flavor_text: When two Kecha Wacha meet, do they just carry on as usual, or do they break into the craziest dance the world has never seen? My notebook and I need to know! I'll be waiting for a full report!

name: Ancestral Steppe Accounting
flavor_text: Young Hunter, your hands seem idle. Would you care to busy yourself collecting points for me in the Ancestral Steppe? Any items are fine, as long as you meet the quota. Take care, now.

name: Dragon Lady
flavor_text: Gah! Again my cargo is kaput. What use is guard if he guard nothing? Always, I hire guard! Always, I hear same story: monster too strong! But not immortal, yes? So, you hunt him? I reward. We understand?

name: The Ioprey Leader
flavor_text: A pack of Ioprey ain't nothin' I can't handle, but this was a giant horde. We would've been goners if we didn't call off the hunt. Take 'em down, will ya? Oh, and mind their poison.

name: The Intelligent Malfestio
flavor_text: What a clever creature, confusing its prey before it sinks in its claws... Just like me! A quill pen made of one of its feathers would be the perfect symbol of my intelligence and class!

name: Serpentine Samba
flavor_text: My huntin' is near as bad as my dancin', but my little sis? Best moves in the tribe! I wanna make her a costume of serpent scales for the big festival. Could ya help me bag a big snake!?

name: Spotted Beauty
flavor_text: Beasts with lovely spots roam the Primal Forest. The patterns of Gendrome... Simply breathtaking. Hunt a few so I can see them up close, and I'll reward you with this Rainbow Ore.

name: Primal Forest Accounting
flavor_text: Young Hunter, your hands seem idle. Would you care to busy yourself collecting points for me in the Primal Forest? Any items are fine, as long as you meet the quota. Take care, now.

name: Fin Finder
flavor_text: The uneducated masses call it a "monster Sharq." What nonsense! It's a most magnificent creature, able to shift into so many forms... I must have a specimen for my research!

name: The Walls Have Eyes
flavor_text: I was in the Frozen Seaway, I was, and that's when I felt it -- like me blood turned ta ice. Somethin' was a-spyin' on me. Cross me heart and hope ta die. Mind sussin' out the creepy peeper?

name: Must Love Lagombi
flavor_text: The Frozen Seaway sounds cold. I hate the cold! But, I am curious about the rabbit- like creatures that live there. Could you hunt some for me? No fewer than two, please! Ta-ta, now!

name: Zamite Fight
flavor_text: I was out scouring the Frozen Seaway for harvest supplies when I was blindsided by these big, spiky beasts! I managed to get away, but it haunts me still... Someone dispatch the sneaky savages!

name: Stone-cold Stones
flavor_text: The Frozen Seaway beats any tropical paradise for a geologist like me. Every day brings a new discovery! Did you know it's the only place you can find Bloodstones? I gotta get me some of that.

name: Liver and Let Die
flavor_text: Lightly grilled over charcoal, stir-fried with spicy and sweet sauce, or boiled to the perfect texture... Mmm... I'm hungry just thinking about it! Please, bring me some delicious Monster Guts!

name: Fight or Uragaan!
flavor_text: Don't bother readin' any further unless you're a true hunter -- the type who loves that quiver in your guts when you're livin' on the razor's edge. Still with me? Go to the Volcano. Somethin's waitin'.

name: Worst. Trip. Ever!
flavor_text: Ugh... I think I was a little too ambitious to try climbing the Volcanic Hollow. I forgot my Cool Drinks and ran out of Stamina. Worst of all, I was attacked by a Yian Garuga. Somebody help me, please!

name: Tetsucabra Bounty
flavor_text: Oh, the horror! Oh, the zenny! Apparently, a Tetsucabra is making a mess of some newly developed land. Big reward on its head, I hear. Help me and we'll split it fifty-fifty!

name: Close Coal
flavor_text: If I don't have Coal to roast tonight's feast, my goose is cooked! Actually, it won't be cooked, but I'll still end up in hot water. Er, not literally. Oh, just help me, will you!?

name: Nargacuga Throwdown
flavor_text: This is the kind of Quest that the G Rank hunters that used to come to Pokke would finish in their SLEEP! You look like you're at least half-awake, so it should be no sweat for you! Good luck!

name: Insomnia? Meet Hypnotism x 2
flavor_text: My wife gave me a Malfestio to help me deal with insomnia, but one doesn't seem to be enough. I'm also afraid that using two at once may have some ill side effects. Could you test it out for me?

name: The Desert Gourmand
flavor_text: One minute I was rattlin' along the Dunes in me barrel buggy, mindin' me own. And then, RAAARRR! Cart goes flyin' -- and me with it! What gives!? The barrel business is s'pposed t'be safe, by gum!

name: Line in the Sand
flavor_text: Sandboarding! It's the latest craze! ...Or it will be, as soon as I finish inventing it. But I can't do anything with these darned Cephadrome in the way. Get rid of 'em and I'll give you some Rainbow Ore!

name: Wrath of the Rathian
flavor_text: Dang Rathian! Ambushed my caravan and tore my business a new one! But I ain't the gettin' mad type, I'm the gettin' even type! Time for some ice cold revenge, and I want you to dish it out!

name: Twin Velocidrome
flavor_text: A pair of Velocidrome is leading around a menacing pack of Velociprey. If you can take them out and help restore peace to the Hills, I'll give you this Rainbow Ore!

name: The New Tenant
flavor_text: A Blangonga is wreaking havoc on one of my trade routes. Think you can take care of it for me? Once you do, I can give you gigantic ladybugs that you can use as materials for equipment!

name: A Plesioth in the Misty Peaks
flavor_text: A Plesioth! In the Misty Peaks! And I would have had it, too, if not for its water breath and hiding in the river all the time... I didn't have my bathing suit! I'll let you deal with it!

name: Awful Guest
flavor_text: The Loc Lac Tourism Board will not sit idly by as this Plesioth eats into our tourism revenues. We would like you to deal with this nuisance and help our other guests return home safely.

name: Poisonous Pair
flavor_text: Ioprey ain't nothin' I can't handle, but this pack had two bosses. I couldn't pin 'em down and they got away, but if you can take 'em down for me, I'll give you some Rainbow Ore.

name: Attack of the Giant Bugs!
flavor_text: My village has a huge bug problem. We're talkin' like Bugtopia here! If you can help us out by squashing about 50 of them, that'd help us a lot. Just watch out for any big monsters!

name: You Caught This? I Caught This
flavor_text: So my brother thinks he's the best fisher in our castle. We'll see about that! Catch me a Lavasioth and I can prove him wrong! I'm a genius! Now, off you go. Don't keep me waiting!

name: Tumbling Troublemaker
flavor_text: Holy moly! Have you seen one of those things before? I thought it was a giant boulder tumbling down the mountain, but no, it was a monster comin' to eat me! I'm not going back there until you get rid of it!

name: Shogun in the Flames
flavor_text: Hours of walking through a sweltering cave, only to find ourselves in the Volcano, swooped down upon by a giant Ceanataur! We may make weapons, but we're still merchants. Help!

name: The Most Dangerous Game
flavor_text: Would you fancy a game of Konchu dodgeball? What a marvelous way to pass the time... For me, of course! There may be a red ball tossed in there, too, but pay it no heed, Hunter!

name: Status: Effected
flavor_text: For a year I researched safe hunting practices: Antidotes, anti-Paralysis, you name it. The results of my research? The safest hunt...is one you've pushed off onto someone else! Good luck!

name: Desert Brawlers
flavor_text: The Dunes are crawling with big ol' monsters that won't even let me NEAR the materials I need to make my weapons! Think you can head out and whip 'em for me?

name: The Hunter Games
flavor_text: I've gathered only the most unique monsters to display the best tournament ever hosted. Shockers, rollers, slicers... Expect no shortage of mayhem. Just try not to embarrass yourself out there!

name: Hunt, Sweat, and Tears
flavor_text: I simply love the sight of brave hunters only barely escaping death! And this lineup of five awful beasties is sure to grant me just that. Now, be a dear and give me a good show!

name: Pink Stink
flavor_text: Whaddaya know about the Congas with the pink fur in the Primal Forest? That Congalala ringleader of theirs just trashed 'n' gassed my entire shop. Go clear the air, will ya?

name: Brute of the Sands
flavor_text: My weapon...bounced off its hide like a toy. That thing moved...so fast. Before I knew it...I was knocked cold. The Medicine Man says it's... just a scratch, but the pain! Avenge my flesh wound!

name: Disruptive Eruption
flavor_text: What? Why, that's a... There's a Basarios after me!? I didn't sign up for this, you know. There's much to be said for staying indoors! You take care of the Basarios, Hunter. I'll deal with the, er... Mosswine!

name: Web Sighting
flavor_text: I got webbed up, chewed on, smacked around, and tossed away like garbage! That Nerscylla really put me through the wringer. Someone needs to return the favor to that creepy cave menace!

name: The Lightning Crown
flavor_text: The Astalos's head is so cool! Its crest looks like some kind of crown. Man, I'd love to see it up close! Then I could do some really great research... Can you please hunt one for me?

name: What a Girl Wants
flavor_text: My lil' sis got mad at me for forgetting her birthday. Now the only way she'll forgive me is if I hunt her a Tigrex for a late birthday present! Please, Hunter, you gotta help me!

name: Rathalos Run
flavor_text: That Rathalos flying near the Ancestral Steppe? Yeah, I let him get away. Figured he deserved a break. Now he's too far away for me to bother with. Someone else tackle him for me.

name: Watch Your Steppe
flavor_text: We received reports that a Gore Magala has shown itself in the Steppe. I'd like for you to investigate, and hunt the beast. Do so, and you'll have ensured the safety of many.

name: Bug Buffet
flavor_text: Legend tells of a faraway land where they boil up bugs and swallow them down. Say, I hear a Seltas Queen was spotted nearby. Sounds yummy! Hmm? How was the last bug I ate? ...No comment.

name: A Bewitching Dance
flavor_text: A Mizutsune has laid claim to the Primal Forest. But the forest is not for it alone. You must go and reclaim what is all of ours. Beware its peculiar bubbles, Hunter.

name: Dread Locked
flavor_text: Gore Magala... Its name sends grown men running for their mothers. Don't expect a cheery hunt with this one -- its black mist swallows all. Can you drive away this relentless evil?

name: The Unshakable Mountain God
flavor_text: The beast known as the God of the Mountain is quite a challenge, indeed, but it's certainly nothing that a Wycademy Hunter can't handle! Go, Hunter, and bring honor to our name.

name: Topple the Monarch
flavor_text: I suppose I'm being too harsh on myself. I'm far from the only hunter who has challenged the Zinogre in the Frozen Seaway only to become the hunted. Why else would the monster be known as "The Hunter"? Still...

name: Bedevil a Deviljho
flavor_text: A terrifying beast has appeared in the Frozen Seaway! It's a vicious thing, crueler than anything I've ever seen... Be sure to write up a will before you go out there!

name: Frozen Seaway Accounting
flavor_text: Young Hunter, your hands seem idle. Would you care to busy yourself collecting points for me in the Frozen Seaway? Any items are fine, as long as you meet the quota. Take care, now.

name: Master of the Molten Deep
flavor_text: For the past few years, my people have lived in ever- mounting fear of the wrath of the volcano, and the great wyvern who sleeps in its flames. Please, save my people!

name: Duel in the Volcanic Hollow
flavor_text: I fought a Glavenus in a duel, but I was soundly defeated. To think that such a master of sword- play could exist... You would do well to see it for yourself.

name: Volcanic Hollow Accounting
flavor_text: Young Hunter, your hands seem idle. Would you care to busy yourself collecting points for me in the Volcanic Hollow? Any items are fine, as long as you meet the quota. Take care, now.

name: Bug Bite
flavor_text: Legends tell of a faraway land where the people turn insects into hors d'oeuvres. For my final request, hunt me a Seltas Queen so I can try a taste. This is the last time I'll ask, promise!

name: Heaven and Earth
goal_text: Hunt a Rathalos and a Rathian
flavor_text: A Rathalos and a Rathian appeared in the Jurassic Frontier. Do you know just how deadly they are when they're together? And during mating season, it's suicide! Still up for the hunt?

name: From Beyond the Sands
flavor_text: I was roaming the Dunes when I happened to see a Glavenus blocking one of the major trade routes! Normally I keep to myself, but I can't live without my delivery of Moga curry!

name: Legend of the Monkey King
flavor_text: A legendary priest once embarked on a journey of discovery with three disciples. I tried to copy him, but failed miserably. My disciple turned on me, and is now rampaging in the Dunes. Please help!

name: Astalos Territory
flavor_text: Our caravan wandered into an Astalos's territory, and it didn't seem to like us. I barely escaped with my life, but my friends are still in the Verdant Hills. Please hunt it down and save my friends!

name: Lord of the Skies
flavor_text: A message for all brave hunters. A Rathalos has been seen in our land, and for the safety of my people, we need your help to eliminate it. Your help will be aptly rewarded.

name: The Rajang in the Snow
flavor_text: A crazy monster with two horns and mouth lasers showed up in the Arctic Ridge! What the heck are we supposed to do against something like that!? Help us out, here!

name: Fury Run Afoul
flavor_text: A shortage of food has got a Gammoth goin' crazy up on the ridge. No one can sleep at night, fearin' it'll come a-chargin' through the walls! I beg ya, put it down so we can rest easy!

name: Bl-Bl-Blangongas!
flavor_text: It's bad enough that we've got a gig out in the middle of nowhere for a bunch of lushes, but now we're liable to get stranded in the mountains because of these Blangongas! Help!

name: Surrounded by Bubbles
flavor_text: Covering yourself in Mizutsune bubbles gives you tremendous sliding ability... Fascinating! Hunt one for me so I can study the chemical makeup of its bubbles... For science!

name: The Moving Mountain
flavor_text: That little moss-covered hill at the Misty Peaks was just begging to be painted. But the second I pulled out my easel and brush, it was gone! How can I be a landscape artist if the landscape won't cooperate?

name: The Fisherman's Fiend
flavor_text: Yikes, this is horrible! We've just heard from our fishermen out in the sea that a Lagiacrus is here in this region! We need you to stop it before it does any serious damage!

name: Open Season for Jaggia
flavor_text: This isn't good at all! There's been an unusually high number of Jaggia recently, and at this rate, I don't think the village'll survive the winter! Could you help us thin out the herd?

name: For Whom the Gong Tolls
flavor_text: A friend of mine who rings gongs for a living says she'd like to model her movements after those of a Duramboros. Could you hunt one for her? Then maybe she'll finally get back to work!

name: Quartz Rivalry
flavor_text: I need something classy for the big soirée... Oh, I know! A Quartz Ore brooch! You can help me with that, can't you, Hunter? Ooh, I can already see everyone's faces, green with envy!

name: We Can Dig It
flavor_text: I've been fascinated by how the Agnaktor can easily break through solid rock. As a fellow digger, I have nothing but respect. I'd like to see it up close. Can you capture one for me?

name: Coal Hearted
goal_text: Deliver 10 pieces of Coal or a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Me and Grampaw Maple got somethin' amazin' in the works, but we need some Coal! Gather about ten for us, would ya? Use the Paw Pass Ticket to come back once ya do!

name: River of Fire
flavor_text: Two Lavasioth are ambushing workers near the mine! As if our job wasn't hard enough without these brutes popping out and scaring us half to death. Please, take care of them for us!

name: Dances with Wyverns
flavor_text: Wyverns attacked my airship the other day! Just WHAM, right out of the sky with their claws and fire and... *sigh* My trip was ruined, but you can save others by hunting those beasts!

name: Bugging Out
goal_text: Hunt all large monsters, not including Seltas
flavor_text: I heard the Primal Forest had some big bugs, so I went to check it out, but something put me to sleep and I woke up covered in bubbles! Could you go look for the bugs instead?

name: A Three Hour Tour
flavor_text: This was supposed to be a nice trip to see the aurora, but all we saw here were monsters! Nothing is so beautiful it's worth risking our lives for! Hunt them so we can finish our trip!

name: A Hollow Defense
flavor_text: Just our luck that we go digging for ore, only to dig up a shortcut to a bunch of monsters! We threw up a makeshift barrier, but we can't hold them off anymore... Help!

name: Wild Gunman
flavor_text: I'm a bullet researcher by trade. Yes, we exist. By studying the unique ranged attacks of monsters, I can craft better tools to fight them. By helping me, you'll be doing yourself a favor.

name: Marshlands Rag
flavor_text: Can you hear that...? The perfect melody of wildlife in the Marshlands! Bulldrome footsteps, Najarala rustles through the treetops, and the bass-like drumming of a Duramboros! Bravo! Bravo!

name: Firefight to the Finish!
flavor_text: I heard some monsters were making a mess at the Volcano, so I'm like BAM! Let me at 'em! But then they were like BAM! No way, bro! I can't let them burn me like that, man! Please, avenge me!

name: At the Slayground
flavor_text: We thought we'd found the perfect place to train, but it's been overrun by both a Kecha Wacha and a Rathalos! And now a Rajang is on its way, too! Help us newbies out!

name: It's Electric
flavor_text: Unexplained natural events have been occurring deep within the Jurassic Frontier. Intriguing, don't you think? I believe it's a sign of mythic beasts, but you should go see it with your own eyes.

name: The White Brute
flavor_text: My friends and I sought out a phantom beast. When we came upon it, we had but a moment before it smote us with thunder, casting us asunder. Please help us, Hunter.

name: A Scenic Locale
flavor_text: They say that somewhere in the world, monsters from ancient times roam free. I wanted to find this place, and risked life and limb to do so. Now, I'll show you how to get there too.

name: Miasma Attack
flavor_text: I saw a Gypceros emitting some sort of odd glow... And it made me want to break its face in! So I hit it with all my Hunter Arts, but it got away. Still, I had my fun. You finish it off!

name: Stop the Wacha!
flavor_text: The Kecha Wacha around here's been acting pawfully strange. It's always been a trickster, but now it's glowing and its tricks are getting purrtty unsafe! Purrlease hunt it for us!

name: We Are Not Amused
flavor_text: Mirror, mirror, in my hand, who is the greatest queen in the land? ...What? Who does this "Queen of the Land" think she is!? You, Hunter! Hunt down this abomination at once!

name: Zamtrios Fight!
flavor_text: Y'know, I think Hyper Zamtrios might be the coolest out of all the Hyper ones. That dark, red smoke, on top of its wicked ice armor... I bet you're just dying to see it for yourself!

name: The Frog of War
flavor_text: I received a request to hunt a Tetsucabra in the Volcanic Hollow. I'd never seen a beast with such a powerful aura. You'll understand when you see it yourself.

name: Triple Toady Terror
flavor_text: I hate to ask for even more help, Hunter, but could you take care of a Tetsucabra for us? It's one of 'em Hyper beasties, but if you take it out, we should be able to make some great gear!

name: The Coal Still Burns
flavor_text: My pop seems pretty set on creating the perfect set of armor, but I just want him to get some bed rest! Can you please get him some Coal so he doesn't overexert himself!? Pretty please!?

name: Woe Malfestio
flavor_text: A merchant looking for a Malfestio came to me, and I accidentally pointed her to a Hyper one. Oops! She has a bodyguard, but he's no hunter. Please take out that Hyper Malfestio!

name: Born of Darkness
flavor_text: All we saw were two bright, flashing red eyes and suddenly my friends were unconscious at my feet. Please, help me avenge my friends and find a way to defeat this dark beast!

name: Nibeling on Apples
flavor_text: I've discovered the ultimate apple! If only that Hyper Nibelsnarf weren't keeping me from harvesting more... But, the world must know of its deliciousness! Help me, Hunter!

name: Warning: Hyper Yian Garuga!
flavor_text: Yian Garuga are known for their ill temperaments, and the Hyper anomaly only seems to exacerbate this. One such specimen is loose in the Hills. Not good. Hunter, you know what to do.

name: Hyper for Holes
flavor_text: I was out on the Ridge looking for the perfect place to do some high-quality digging when a Hyper Blangonga attacked me and broke my favorite pickaxe! Argh! Dish out justice for me, Hunter!

name: The Plesioth Adventure
flavor_text: I was walking in the Misty Peaks when I came across a Plesioth all riled up. And you know what? I think that sucker would be perfect practice for you! Now, go get 'em, sport!

name: Daimyo of the Deserted Island
flavor_text: I set out for the Deserted Island to reflect on my life and find ways I might better myself. But before I could get far, a Hyper Daimyo Hermitaur attacked me! Help me, so I can resume my meditation.

name: Where the Wild Manes Are
flavor_text: Royal Ludroth have such lovely, fluffy necks! And I hear that recently, one with an exceptionally fluffy one is up and about! I wonder how soft it is... Please! You must help me find out!

name: Hyper Investigation
flavor_text: We've been receiving reports of fierce monsters in the area that give off a dark red glow. Verify this information, and also take care of the Yian Kut-Kut spotted in the same area. Good luck.

name: The Khezu and the Shadow
flavor_text: I saw a Khezu when I was out fishing. There was something odd about it though. It had some black haze on its face, making it look even creepier than usual. Please, get rid of it for us!

name: Bring On the Shogun
flavor_text: I'm looking for somebody to hunt a Hyper Ceanataur! Its Hyper state makes its pincers dangerously sharp... But they'd be perfect for sharpening my weapons!

name: Unnerving Najarala
flavor_text: I snuck into the Marshlands to check out some of the scary monsters there, and I saw a Najarala giving off some weird black smoke! Honest! Just don't tell my mom I was there!

name: Eruption Embodied
flavor_text: There's a Hyper Uragaan near our village, spewing out so much smoke and molten rocks that I really thought the Volcano was erupting! Our village is in real trouble. You've gotta help!

name: The Magma's Rage
flavor_text: A certain...someone...needs you to complete this highly classified Quest. Even I am not sure why. Your target: a Hyper Lavasioth. I'm sure this goes without saying, but be careful.

name: Minion Audition Imposition
flavor_text: If you really want to be Cha-Cha's minion, you must prove yourself-self! In the Marshlands, Hyper Yian Kut-Ku and Shogun Ceanataur need hunting! Cha-Cha will be watcha-latching you!

name: Barioth Hunt
flavor_text: *sigh* Can NOTHING save me from the depths of my boredom? I got it! I want the so-called "white demon," the Barioth! Such a cold-hearted creature might ALMOST amuse me, so hop to it, peasant!

name: A Cure for Cowardice
flavor_text: Hmph, the Chief might get angry with me, but there's no way I'm apologizing... Yeah, well, if someone ever managed to hunt down a Gravios in the Volcanic Hollow, maybe then I'd have a change of heart and be nice to my sis! (Ha, fat chance of that!)

name: Stop the Wheel
flavor_text: I've only known the gods from their legends -- never did I expect to see one in my lifetime. Dare you attempt to halt the cycle of death and etch your own name into legend, Hunter?

name: A Gathering of Wyverns
goal_text: Hunt an Astalos and a Rathian
flavor_text: You'll never guess what I saw! An Astalos trying to pick up a Rathian! Clearly, this is a case of forbidden love... Or it is in my book! This is simply too scandalous! Please do something!

name: A Song of White and Lapis
goal_text: Hunt a Mizutsune and a Malfestio
flavor_text: I had a dream where I was covered in white bubbles and surrounded by lapis-colored feathers. When I woke up, I saw a Mizutsune and a Malfestio fighting. Please drive them off so I can sleep!

name: A Cold Set of Armor
goal_text: Hunt a Gammoth and a Zamtrios
flavor_text: I've heard that monsters in the Frozen Seaway have armor of ice and snow. If I knew their secrets, I could make some truly splendid armor. I'm not a fighter, so could you do some research on my behalf?

name: Rocked and Rolled
flavor_text: Ever take a knockout punch? I know a monster who packs a wallop. And don't get me started on its sticky goop. Good thing it came off before I went down for the count. You up for a round?

name: So Notable: Seregios
flavor_text: I need your help ASAP! I've got a fresh notebook page just screaming to be filled with facts, and I know just what will do the trick: a freshly captured Seregios! Good luck!

name: Hammer vs. Blade
goal_text: Hunt a Glavenus and an Uragaan
flavor_text: I found two monsters in the Volcanic Hollow, both wielding finely honed weapons: a sharp sword and a crushing hammer. Dangerous weapons like those must be apprehended.

name: A Roar to the Heavens
goal_text: Hunt a Zinogre and a Tigrex
flavor_text: I ran into a Tigrex in the Frontier, and then a Zinogre jumped out, too! Just when I thought I was done for, the Tigrex charged the Zinogre, and I made a break for it! I can't take much more of this!

name: The Hapless Bodyguard
flavor_text: If I'm gonna follow this plan to a T, I'm going to need all the materials I can get! And I can't get them with a bunch of Rajang hanging on my back. That's where you come in!

name: Seer of Swords
flavor_text: Seregios, or the "Wyvern of One Thousand Blades," has made an appearance. Razor- sharp scales and strength that may even surpass that of Rathalos. Keep your wits about you, young Hunter.

name: The Yukumo Gal Special
flavor_text: That Quest the Yukumo Gal recommended to me was ridiculous! Did she really expect me to take on a pair of Zinogres by myself!? Be a pal and take this Quest off my hands!

name: Repaying the Favor
flavor_text: My apprentice in Bherna got into some trouble. I want to repay the kind purrson who bailed him out with Brachydios materials, but my paws are tied with work! Could you go instead?

name: You Bet Your Life
goal_text: Hunt a Deviljho and a Rajang
flavor_text: "Nobody can handle a Rajang and a Deviljho," they said. "Impossible," they said. So I made an impulse bet with my life savings. Now I have gambler's remorse. Mind evening the odds for me?

name: Wyvern's Way
goal_text: Hunt a Yian Garuga and a Tigrex
flavor_text: I hear there's a foreign sport where participants compete to see who can most elegantly dodge a charging beast. I'd like to see it for myself, so I've prepared the beasts. Now, give me a good show!

name: Bewitching Heat
goal_text: Hunt a Glavenus and a Mizutsune
flavor_text: There are two mighty beasts at the Forlorn Arena. One harbors extreme heat as it cuts opponents to ribbons, while the other bewitches its opponents with its spry movements. Stay alert!

name: The Mountain God's Lightning
goal_text: Hunt an Astalos and a Gammoth
flavor_text: There are two mighty beasts at the Forlorn Arena. One attacks by freezing its foes to their very core, while the other fires electric blasts to stun its prey. Steel yourself for the battle ahead.

name: A Man's Arena is His Castle
flavor_text: I walk away for five minutes and the place is crawling with monsters! Lagombi, Blangonga, Zamtrios, and a Gammoth! Someone's gotta teach 'em their proper place! Hm? You're saying that's my job?

name: The Hunter Games
goal_text: Hunt all large monsters, not including Seltas
flavor_text: We've got an intense lineup for everyone today! Foxes, beasts, fish, and even bugs! This gauntlet's sure to have challengers quaking in their booties. Hahaha! Well, have fun out there!

name: The Flames of War
flavor_text: The Arena is blazing with action today! Why, you ask? Because it's stoked with lava, exploding rocks, flaming breath, and red-hot blades! Got what it takes to burn through the competition?

name: A Shocking Revelation!
flavor_text: Every time I walk around, I get zapped with static! Mom says it's 'cause there's so many Thunder monsters around. I dunno about that, but I do know that these shocks hurt! Please help!

name: The Gathering Storm
flavor_text: Wyverns have gathered in the Sanctuary, casting dark shadows over it as they split the earth and rip through flesh. Will you be the one to face these foul beasts?

name: Hellfire Star
flavor_text: Attention all hunters. Slaying Nakarkos is now the Wycademy's top priority. Combine your efforts and bring this task to fruition. May luck be with you.

name: Putting the Gore in Magala
flavor_text: We've received word that a Hyper Gore Magala is in the Ancestral Steppe. I'd like for you to head out there right away. A Hyper specimen of Gore Magala is a deadly foe. Be careful out there.

name: Tigrex, Tigrex, Burning Bright
flavor_text: A certain...someone...needs you to complete this highly classified Quest. Even I am not sure why. Your target: a Hyper Tigrex. I'm sure this goes without saying, but be careful.

name: A Thousand Blades of Wrath
flavor_text: S-Somebody help us! A H-Hyper Seregios showed up and... Ahhh! Wh-What should we d-do!? S-Somebody get rid of that thing!

name: A Fiery Temper
flavor_text: Help! A Hyper Rathalos is in the Volcanic Hollow! I told the Kokoto Gal that if we didn't act now, we'd all be done for, but she just laughed! I can't be the only one who thinks we're in big trouble!

name: The Unassailable Seltas Queen
flavor_text: I was asked to hunt a Seltas Queen, but my hunting skills were insufficient for the task. It isn't like regular Seltas Queens, but I-I must train harder. Please fulfill the task in my stead, Hunter.

name: Savage Sword of the Desert
flavor_text: It was so hot, the air itself hissed as if burned. That was no ordinary blade, but one expertly forged for battle. If I face it again, I fear it will shatter my trusted blade. I must leave the rest to you.

name: Wyvernlit Evening
flavor_text: That intimidating crest and its sharp gaze cutting through that menacing dark glow... These things are terrifying! What could they be planning? No! I-It can't be! It's coming toward us! P-Please, help!

name: Wyverns All Around Us
goal_text: Hunt a Rathalos and a Rathian
flavor_text: You look ready to rumble with some tough monsters! Lucky for you, a pair of Hyper wyverns are tearin' through the Verdant Hills. Dangerous, sure, but I'm sure you can handle 'em!

name: Wild Gods, Calm Rangers
flavor_text: The god of the mountains, Gammoth, is threatening a nearby village. Is there anyone who can stop its footsteps that rupture the earth, its breath that com- mands the fury of winter?

name: Into the Maelstrom
flavor_text: De wa, to prove how effective is your training, I propose little test! This Lagiacrus is more abunai than average. Extra danger! The sea breeze says you'll need to give it your all!

name: The Lithe and Unbreaking
flavor_text: The Mizutsune moves with power and fluidity, strength and beauty. And the aura this one gives off is almost ethereal. Do you think you even have a chance of defeating it?

name: The Peril of the Land
flavor_text: A Hyper Duramboros is running amok, ripping out trees and threatening to reduce our mountains to ruins... Please! Defeat this beast and save our beautiful land!

name: The Wolf and the Footbath
flavor_text: Our footbath has been flourishing! The only thing is, the equipment hasn't held up. If you could take care of the Hyper Zinogre roaming about, we could get materials to fix it up!

name: The Thieving Gypceros
flavor_text: That hammer... I poured my heart and soul into it, only for those Gypceros in the Marshlands to swipe it from me! Get rid of 'em for me, and I'll get it back once the coast is clear!

name: Steam and Smoke
flavor_text: To purrvide our patrons with a more soothing footbath experience, we need some Volcanic Ore. Unfortunately, an especially fierce Brachydios is in the way. Please help, Hunter!

name: The Glowing Embers
flavor_text: As if its lava coating weren't enough, that Agnaktor had some glowing crud all over it! And when those parts hit me, I might as well have been wearing paper armor! Please, finish it off for me!

name: Primal Forest Defense
goal_text: Hunt all large monsters, not including Seltas
flavor_text: Some good friends of ours are in trouble after a buncha Hyper Monsters showed up in the Primal Forest! I got a feelin' yer the only one who can help. You're the one to get it done!

name: The End of the Trials
flavor_text: I've got a big favor to ask. I need you to hunt down a Tigrex and a Seregios. They're both Hyper, so I know that ordinary hunters wouldn't stand a chance. But you're no ordinary hunter!

name: The Descending Fog
flavor_text: I have a request for the famed Wycademy Hunter. A group of Hyper Monsters has descended upon the Verdant Hills. You may be our only hope. Our trust is in you!

name: Searching for Secret Baths
flavor_text: We found the purrfect purrlace to build a fabulous mew hot spring. The purroblem is, it's overrun with Hypurr Meownsters. Could you make them vacate the purremises?

name: Show Me Your Shaka-Strength
flavor_text: Cha-Cha hear voice, and it tell Cha-Cha that if can defeat a red wyvern, turquoise wolf, and blue leviathan, then all be made clear! You no laka-look busy. Help Cha-Cha out!

name: The Marshlands Nightmare
flavor_text: Aha! Perfect timing! I've got just the Quest for a hunter of your *hic* talents! How d'ya feel about some Hyper monsters? Thass the ticket! Now, go and ssshow me what yer made of! *hic*

name: The Birds of Prey
flavor_text: Beware the beaks that bite, the claws that catch! The shrieking Yian Kut-Ku; the colorful Malfestio; and the war machine, Yian Garuga! Slay these beasts and bring safety to the skies!

name: The Fanged Beasts
flavor_text: Beware the beasts that pierce with tusk and fang. The giant Gammoth; the erratic Kecha Wacha; and the wily Blangonga! Can you avoid the skewer of these sharp challengers?

name: The Winged Wyverns
flavor_text: Beware the skies and those that rule it! The new rival, Astalos; the divebombing Rathalos; and the flesh- tearing Seregios. Do you have what it takes to reclaim the skies?

name: The Foes of the Deep
flavor_text: Beware the creatures of the deep! The bewitching bubble fox, Mizutsune; the torrential blasts of Plesioth; the all- devouring Nibelsnarf; and the thunderous Lagiacrus! Will you sink or swim?

name: The Beasts of Brawn
flavor_text: Beware the beasts of strength and savagery! The massive Uragaan; the whirling might of Duramboros; the brute strength of Brachydios; and the razor-bladed Glavenus. Who will reign king?

name: Ring of the Silver Sol
flavor_text: I saw it with my own eyes! Two suns blazing up in the sky, except one was all silvery. I couldn't make this stuff up if I tried! It's up to you to get to the bottom of this!

name: Ring of the Golden Lune
flavor_text: *Sigh* Life as king is just one council meeting after another. I long to see the wonders of the world, like the golden wyvern from my minstrel's ballads. Bring it to me, Hunter!

name: Usurpers of the Throne
goal_text: Hunt a Silver Rathalos and a Gold Rathian
flavor_text: The king robed in silver, and the queen wrapped in gold. Those who defeat them can truly claim to have usurped the throne of Hunterdom. I await with a toast to your success, Hunter.

name: Child of Destruction
flavor_text: The Rajang has shown its true colors at last. Left un- checked, it will visit utter destruction upon us. I must entrust you with its defeat, as I have another task, and dear ones awaiting my return.

name: A Shock in the Dark
flavor_text: The moon is especially beautiful here. Nature is at its best when untouched by mankind... However, you must beware, as this very nature may visit its wrath upon the unsuspecting.

name: Triumphant Rage
flavor_text: Even within the Loc Lac Guild, there is one monster that keeps us all on our toes...the Deviljho! You are perhaps the only hunter capable of taking it on! Defeat this foul beast!

name: The Frozen Dictator
goal_text: Slay a Kushala Daora or repel it
flavor_text: I saw it! I know I did! A pair of black wings among a flurry of snow... Then a gust of wind nearly blew me off the mountain! Take my advice and don't even go near that thing!

name: Kushala Daora Strikes
goal_text: Slay a Kushala Daora or repel it
flavor_text: Blizzards have been striking with increasing frequency. We've managed to identify a Kushala Daora as the cause. The storms are growing...and may consume us all. Please, Hunter, you must help us.

name: The Elder Dragon of Mist
goal_text: Slay a Chameleos or repel it
flavor_text: I sensed a strong presence and turned around, but there was nobody there. There's no way anything could have sneaked up on us from our vantage point, but still... Keep your guard up, Hunter!

name: Beyond the Silence
goal_text: Slay a Chameleos or repel it
flavor_text: A mysterious elder dragon has appeared, but no one has set eyes upon it. Of course, seeing it may be the last thing you do... We need you to eliminate it, but please be careful!

name: Emperor of Flame
goal_text: Slay a Teostra or repel it
flavor_text: I beg of you, help me in carrying out my last task. I've chased a Teostra to the Volcano. Beware its flames, for they may roast you alive if you are careless. Godspeed, Hunter!

name: The Fires of Devastation
goal_text: Slay a Teostra or repel it
flavor_text: When I was a child, a Teostra attacked our village. Now, that foul beast has come again to rain destruction down upon us. Please! Put an end to this evil presence!

name: Grim Tidings
flavor_text: Uh-oh. Our observers over at the Volcano have gone silent. Their last message mentioned something about a "black god." That can't be good. We need someone to investigate.

name: Absolute Zero
flavor_text: An Ukanlos appeared in the Polar Field and is headed towards this village. But we've got one hope, and that's you. Everyone here believes in you. Please, save our village!

name: The Looming Calamity
flavor_text: We have met many times, and you have never failed to impress me with your courage in the face of adversity. Now, with Amatsu threatening our village, we need your bravery more than ever.

name: The Brilliant Darkness
flavor_text: "None can foresee disaster. In darkness, it comes; among despair, it departs. Now is such a time, when all may struggle...and in the end, perish." Catchy, eh? My aide wrote it. Anyway, save us!

name: Legendary Skills?
flavor_text: Are you ready to prove yourself to me, darling? A Diablos is attacking the neighboring settlements from its lair in the Dunes. Beware its two-horned charge, and watch for when it bursts from the ground too. It knows no mercy!

name: Steppe in the Right Direction
flavor_text: On my travels across the Ancestral Steppe, I stumbled upon a fearsome Deviljho! I ran as fast as I could, but now my legs have given out. I entrust this message to a Kelbi I befriended on the way -- even though it didn't seem too keen on the idea at first!

name: Rajang's Black Spirit
flavor_text: It was all so sudden. It just came rushing out of the undergrowth. Mane flowing, wrapped in some dark aura... Wouldn't want to head back in there for fear of meeting that again. We'll have to wait for the Guild to take care of it.

name: Following the Fallen
flavor_text: I first met my husband in the Jurassic Frontier when he rescued me from a Silver Rathalos. So if I can find a Rathalos, maybe I could meet him again... If anyone reads this, please don't come looking for me. I won't give up on him. I can't...

subquest.goal_text: Wound Silver Rathalos's head and wings

name: Fool's Gold
flavor_text: Urgently requesting help in Misty Peaks. Reports of rare Rathian breed attacking patrols from nearby villages. Hunters gone to help now missing. Bad situation we're in. Send help to deal with Rathian!

subquest.goal_text: Wound Gold Rathian's head and wings

name: Shining Examples
goal_text: Hunt a Silver Rathalos and a Gold Rathian
flavor_text: A Gold Rathian and a Silver Rathalos... How fierce, how exciting, how beautiful! I can't take my eyes off them... And what better chance to see them again than in the Arena! Don't be shy, get in there!

name: Harvest Tour: Ruined Pinnacle
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
