flavor_text: Oh, hello, darling. My intuition tells me that you'd love to go gathering up at the Ruined Pinnacle. Am I wrong? Well, I have just the Quest for you. Go and satisfy your gathering urges, and just deliver a Paw Pass Ticket when you're done. It's as easy as that.

name: Harvest Tour: Desert
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Hello, darling. I can sense that you're yearning for a taste of the Desert's rich bounty. Don't try and hide it! Go, take this Quest, and scratch that itch. Deliver a Paw Pass Ticket when you're satisfied. That's all.

name: A Brush with Bugs
flavor_text: Waaa! I can't... Eww! I need a shower... I was at the Jurassic Frontier, and this absolutely enormous vile insect came flying at me! And then another one, even worse, to top it off! Get out there and squish them! Please! Oh no, is one of them on me!?

name: Riverside Rumble
flavor_text: Hey, have you got a sec? I wanted to check out the fish from that pretty river they've got in Yukumo, but there was one of those Arzuros things going wild at the Misty Peaks. I can't concentrate on fish with one of those things about. Can you go and whack it for me?

name: Survival of the Biggest
goal_text: Hunt a Giadrome and a Bulldrome
flavor_text: A Giadrome and Bulldrome have turned up at the Arctic Ridge and they're beefing over territory. It's getting in the way of my observation activities, so do you think you could snuff them out for me? But be careful... They're pretty beastly.

name: Pecking Order
flavor_text: Oh, geez, this is really... I mean, this bird thing was just poking at me with its beak... It didn't really hurt, but it was just like... I can't really describe it. I think it would be best all round if you just went and got rid of it for me.

name: Enough Monkeying Around
flavor_text: Well I never! That vile primate thing came at me in the Primal Forest. I've had it up here with its pranks and tomfoolery! Hunter, could you please take care of it before I do something I regret?

name: The Killer Rabbit of Arctic Ridge
flavor_text: Don't tell my brother, but I snuck up the mountain to see the bunny. It looked so darn...ANGRY! All my hopes and dreams, dashed in an instant! Where is my cute fluffybun!? Put that abomination somewhere I can't see it, ever!

name: Lost, But Not for Long
flavor_text: Waaaah! This is just *sob* terrible! My *sniff* my super important survey report... I was out on the Ancestral Steppe when this *hic* Gypceros stole it! My academic career will be OVER!!! You gotta get my report back, *sob* pleeeease!

name: Pleasantly Sozzled
flavor_text: I've obtained infurmation through completely lawful means on some ingredients in the Jurassic Furrontier which I need for my plan. Unfurtunately a Tetsucabra is in the way... Could you lend me a paw by hunting the monster while I swipe the goods? Nya!

name: Surprise!
goal_text: Hunt a Cephadrome and a Daimyo Hermitaur
flavor_text: Okay, just breathe, just breathe... Is this place trying to kill me!? I'm just out traipsing through the sand when a Cephadrome AND Daimyo Hermitaur pop out! I'm not sure how much more I can take... Hunter, can you sort this out before I have an arrest?

name: A Berry Dubious Idea
flavor_text: Hunter, Hunter! Are you familiar with the Tropical Berries that grow in the Desert? I just came up with a way to make them really tasty! They're going to be HUGE! I think I smell money... I'll split the profits with you if you collect some for me. 70-30?

name: Daimyo Hermitaur Flambé
flavor_text: I am determined to teach ma langue divine to tolerate ze heat! Zere is but one purroblème. Fur ze heat, I must be in ze Desert. But in ze Desert, zere are ze meownsters... I love ze crab cakes, but zis Daimyo Hermitaur is too much for me to handle...!

name: Ruined Pinnacle, RUINED
flavor_text: Th-This is terrible! Because of the intense methane buildup from all the Congas, the Ruined Pinnacle stinks! They just won't stop farting! How are we supposed to do any research under these conditions!? Can you thin their numbers a bit? ...Puaah!

name: Sweetheart's Pick: Lofty Ludroth
flavor_text: Thanks for accepting this Quest, Hunter! This time you'll be fighting a Royal Ludroth at the Ruined Pinnacle. It's a bit similar to the crazy one my apprentice, the Yukumo Gal, was thinking of. Just, you know, made a bit more sane. I really appreciate your help!

name: Harvest Tour: Ancestral Steppe
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Interested in gathering at the Ruined Pinnacle, are we? I know just the Quest. Gather away, darling, gather away. Just remember to be a dear and deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're done.

name: Harvest Tour: Primal Forest
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: So you're looking to gather at the Primal Forest, are you? This Quest should be perfect for you, then, darling. Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're done and we'll gladly pick you up.

name: Harvest Tour: Jurassic Frontier
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Gathering in the Jurassic Frontier certainly has its appeal. I'll pull up a Quest for you. Don't be out too late, though, darling -- you'll need to deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're done.

name: Harvest Tour: Dunes
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: The Dunes hold all sorts of curiosities, don't they? Well now, I've got just the Quest to sate your foraging appetite. We will, of course, pick you up as soon as you deliver your Paw Pass Ticket.

name: Harvest Tour: Verdant Hills
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Gathering in the Verdant Hills? That brings back memories... Let me fetch a Quest for you, darling. Enjoy your gathering, and remember to deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're done.

name: Harvest Tour: Arctic Ridge
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Gathering at the Arctic Ridge, are we? Well, I hope you'll wrap up warm. Here's your Quest. Enjoy! Oh, and let me remind you that we'll come and pick you up when you deliver your Paw Pass Ticket.

name: Harvest Tour: Misty Peaks
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: The Misty Peaks? Gorgeous place for gathering. I'll find a Quest for you right away, darling. You go ahead and enjoy yourself. Just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket when you're ready to come home.

name: After That Bird!
flavor_text: A precious Felyne friend with whom I am extremely close, has today become the victim of a wicked Gypceros! It pilfered such a precious gift; it's given him such grief! But now all that is going to change -- Hunter, go smite that thief!

name: Fangs for the Bath
flavor_text: Mrowwwww! The worst has happened! Two infurnal Arzuros at the Ruined Pinnacle in a furrenzy! We hid in a cave but we got soaked to the skin! We look like something the cat dragged in! Someone, blow them out of the water!

name: Just Five Morel Minutes...
flavor_text: We're doing some pretty important research here! Namely, how to shed the human need for sleep using the power of mushrooms! So we need some Tall Mushrooms from the Ruined Pinnacle. Wake us when you're back. We're just resting our eyes.

name: Face Two Face
flavor_text: What a conundrum! I was minding my own business on the Ancestral Steppe when I spotted two monsters with the exact same face! This must be some Kecha Wacha voodoo -- I'm sure of it!

name: Antony and Tetsucabra
flavor_text: O Hunter, keen of brain and stout of heart; Frontiers Jurassic shall not throw your search, Nor leaping beasties dash you on the rocks (Though lesser hunters, mewling, would flee home.) But catch this toxic monster, let me see; How hunting frogs may yet the hunted be.

name: The Bird Who Wood Be King
flavor_text: ...Well, I'm in a pickle and no mistake. Went down to the Verdant Hills to gather wood, and got myself chased off by a Yian Kut-Ku. If I can't get wood, then I can't keep a roof over my head. Can somebody fix this birdbrain's wagon for me?

name: Water Fight
flavor_text: Oh my gosh, two Royal Ludroth have been seen in the Misty Peaks! I have never ever seen two of them in the same place before. EVER! They're so territorial...this can't end well! Get in there and put them down before all hell breaks loose!

name: Harvest Tour: Jungle
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Ah, hello, darling. If you're interested in gathering in the Jungle, I have a Quest that you simply must try. Just deliver a Paw Pass Ticket when you've had enough and want out. Bye for now!

name: I See It Rollin'...
flavor_text: That stupid overgrown fanged tumbleweed! This dumb Volvidon just won't stop trundling around after me. If only there was some brave, strong hunter who could teach it a lesson once and for all... Oh...? You'll take care of it? Seriously? How sweet!

name: Not Mushroom to Swing a Congalala
flavor_text: You can get real good mushrooms in the Jungle. But lately, them Conga- whatsits have been hogging all the good ones. And that's not the half of it. The Congadoodahs stink so much that you can barely sniff out the mushrooms! You know what to do.

name: Dirty Deals
flavor_text: Here's a job from one of my regulars. Apparently a Barroth is causing a ruckus in the Desert, and the trade routes are in complete disarray. Go get that muddy scoundrel, and watch out, okay? They move a lot quicker than you'd expect!

name: That's No Rock...
flavor_text: The rock! It was m-m-moving! It was alive, I swear! I've never seen anything so uncanny... I'll never forget it, ever, but maybe if you get rid of whatever's behind the mystery, I'll find a way to live with the trauma...

name: Treasure Pinnacle: Rice
flavor_text: I can tell you got the treasure trembles! And yer want a bit of my extra-good Chomoran Rice, don't yer? No? Well, then don't go up to the Ruined Pinnacle and hunt a Malfestio. Simple enough. Don't do it if you don't want it, but don't not do it if you do want it.

name: Through Thick and Fin
flavor_text: I heard about some of the life habits of Zamtrios and thought "Eureka! This is perfect for the Hunter Art I'm working on!" And it is! And you'll see too, because you're going to hunt it for me in the Frozen Seaway! Give me the details when you return.

name: Chilled to the Marrow
flavor_text: We're hoping to give our footbath a boost with an extra special, zippy zappy electric bath! Purrovided we can come up with the right meowterials. Want to help? Then we'll need you to hunt a Khezu at the Arctic Ridge. Nothing has as much zap!

name: Feeding Time
flavor_text: I went to feed the Nerscylla, and it started getting a bit bitey. I made haste, but unfortunately, I dropped my notes. Could you take care of the beast so I can retrieve them? Just remember, it's more scared of you than you are of it.

name: Sky Tribe: Savior of the Skyway
flavor_text: Oh, Hunter, we're in trouble! A big dumb Rathian has staked out its territory right in the path of the Soaratorium. Can you go to the Jungle and fix it so it, uh, doesn't have any more birthdays?

name: Share the Load (and the Reward)
flavor_text: You gotta help me with a Quest the Master of Style gave me! What I need you to do is hunt a Nibelsnarf in the Desert, while I take care of the other monster! This is gonna be Radalos!

name: Shadows in the Desert Lake
flavor_text: I was fishing in the Desert, like you do, when I caught a Plesioth. Wouldn't you know it, he wasn't too pleased? Now he's gone a little bit crazy and our caravan's in a tizzy. Any more of this and we won't have anywhere to go back to. Can you help out?

name: Earn Your Strength
flavor_text: If you want more power...you have to prove...prove that you're strong enough... Blangonga...in the Arctic Ridge... If you're not strong enough... you'll fail.

name: Feeling Generally Crabby
flavor_text: AAAARGH! DAMN IT!!! I was all ready to get back to questing, but my guts are STILL acting up. I better pass this one on to you, Scrawn. Gotta hunt a Shogun Ceanataur in the Volcano. Even you can manage that, right? HAHAHA!

name: A Coil to Arms
flavor_text: You know, you shouldn't laugh when a girl tells you embarrassing yet formative traumas, like getting a monster wedgie! DON'T LAUGH! ...Um, maybe I just shouldn't have told you. Oh, and your mark is in the Verdant Hills.

name: Face-off in the Jungle
flavor_text: This time we'd like you to hunt a Nargacuga in the Jungle. You should be able to pick up a few things you'll need for some new Hunter Arts, but we'll save that for when you come back victorious. Just keep an open mind and you'll learn a lot.

name: Poisoned Primal Forest
flavor_text: Oh dear... A pack a Ioprey in the Primal Forest is getting poison everywhere, and villagers could be in danger. We wanted to take care of this ourselves, but at this rate, we'll even have to start asking Felynes for help. Oh, is there nobody capable of doing this Quest?

name: Hit the Lights
flavor_text: My eyes! My eyeeees! Those blasted Great Thunderbugs are so bright, I think they've blinded me! There's a great swarm of them here in the Jungle. Please, make them go away before they leave me with permanent retinal damage!

name: Shelling Out for Fashion
flavor_text: Shell-based accessories are, like, the trendiest things right now in the city. I'm an urban gal at heart, so this is pretty much a life and death matter for me! So, uh, can you get me the materials I need from the Jungle?

name: Harvest Tour: Frozen Seaway
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: I can see you're determined to go gathering at the Frozen Seaway. Well, watch you don't catch a death of cold, darling! I'll let you go, but only if you promise me to deliver your Paw Pass Ticket when you're finished.

name: Harvest Tour: Deserted Island
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: So you'd like to do some gathering on the Deserted Island, would you? Let me just get your Quest ready. When you find enough things worth your while, just deliver the Paw Pass Ticket and we'll gladly pick you up.

name: Harvest Tour: Marshlands
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Gathering in the Marshlands? Well, watch where you step, darling. All right, I've got your Quest here. Deliver your Paw Pass Ticket whenever you feel you're done and we'll pick you up.

name: Harvest Tour: Volcano
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Gathering at the Volcano, are we? I'll give you the Quest, darling, but you're not to stay in there too long. We've had enough hunters coming back with heat stroke already. Deliver your Paw Pass Ticket as soon as you're done, do you hear?

name: The Legend of King Apple
flavor_text: Ever since I heard about 'em, I've been questin' my butt off lookin' for those legendary apples. And now, at last, I found 'em! Hangin' from some trees at the Ruined Pinnacle. All I need now is for you to shift the darn Volvidon blockin' 'em!

name: Smithy Business
flavor_text: Every waking moment I spend working on equipment, forging slowly ahead. Every day, it's head down, nose to the grindstone, hammering away. The anvil is my life. I've no time to be fetching Comet Rocks from the Ruined Pinnacle! You can do that!

name: Royal Assassination
flavor_text: What are we travelers to do now that a Rathian's taken up occupancy at the Ancestral Steppe? Health and Safety are sure to have something to say about this! Unless of course, you'd like to deal with the matter?

name: Zamite Fright
flavor_text: So there I was, mining away at the Frozen Seaway, when suddenly I felt something sharp stick me from behind. I tell you, when I saw those odd spiky beasts, I ran like the wind! Even now, I walk around covering my backside... Those Zamites have to go!

name: Fishing's Lure
flavor_text: Nothin' beats fishing. It's just like being a kid again! You should take a load off and catch some Goldenfish. You'll find a glimmer of the good ol' days in the glitter of water in the Frozen Seaway!

name: The Next Stage of E-Volvi-lution
goal_text: Hunt a Volvidon and a Great Maccao
flavor_text: On my way home from the Jurassic Frontier I was spotted by a Volvidon and a Great Maccao! Luckily I threw myself into a series of somersaults and I think they've accepted me as one of them. I think they like me! Unfortunately I'm super dizzy already, so help...?

name: Brute of the Sands
flavor_text: There's something mighty abnormal out there in the Dunes. It's so tough it can't be hurt with normal weapons, and covers itself in mud. It's all very fascinating! There's still so much we don't know about this majestic creature. Could you catch me one?

name: Trade Dispute
flavor_text: Our usual trade route is being terrorized by a Nibelsnarf! We'd just tough it out, but Nibelsnarfs will eat anything, and I can't afford to lose another shipment! Please teach the brute it's not okay to steal! Theft isn't a victimless crime!

name: We've Reached Peak Blangonga
flavor_text: I saw...ulp...a Blangonga on the mountain. Not so weird, you might think. But when...urk...I saw the second one emerge from the ground, I high-tailed it to a cave. This is altogether too many Blangongas for one person to deal with! Please...ulp...deal with it for me!

name: Please Plesioth Me!
flavor_text: Everyone in Cheeko Sands is in trouble! A Plesioth has made an appurrance and is furolicking very destructively! It's rampaging around the Misty Peaks, and the people of Cheeko Sands asked if you'd purrlease hunt it.

name: Jumping at Shadows
flavor_text: Oh my gosh! I totally just saw a huge black shadow jump into a tree! I think it's going to attack the village! Arghhh! The problem is, no one believes me! You have to help my village! And then tell them I was right and they should take me more seriously in future!!!

name: The Owled Man and the Sea
flavor_text: Welp, I guess this old-timer's plumb out of luck. Thought it'd be nice to retire in the sun on the Deserted Island, but the place has a Malfestio problem and it's got its owl dust all over everything. Oh, don't worry about me, I'm just old and useless. I'm sure I'll be fine. I'll manage.

name: The Shadow in the Cave
flavor_text: We were doing some research in the caves when all of a sudden, something really creepy and gross plopped down behind us. We managed to escape, but we can't do any research with that thing up there!

name: March Melancolico
flavor_text: The stage: the darkest marshlands, damp with haunting melancholy! Our villain: the ultimate Najarala! Our hero: a hunter of legend! ...That would be you. Go earn us a standing ovation! Break a leg!

name: Interruption: Conga Line
flavor_text: Give me strength! If there's a village where they sell a cure for idiocy, please tell me where it is. What kind of Guild Gal runs off to take on a couple of Congalalas? Please make sure you get to them first.

name: Commission: Basarios
flavor_text: Hey, so I just got a request to hunt down a Basarios, but I'm incredibly busy doing an important, uh, other thing. I'd be very grateful if you could take it on for me. I'd hurry if I was you, or you might not make it to the Volcano in time!

name: Great Ore Discovery
flavor_text: Great news! A new Coal bed has been discovered in the Volcano, and as much as I'd like to get in on that action, the place is Basarios turf. Care to go mining for me, Hunter?

name: Minion's Devotion
flavor_text: Recently, minion's sense of duty has been lacka-wacking! Cha-Cha has prepared Quest to solidify minion's devotion! Go bash many monster in aka-arena! If minion not up to challenge, come tell Cha-Cha, okay?

name: So Notable: Hyper Hermitaur
flavor_text: The next page of my notebook is whispering to me, Squiggle. And do you know what it's saying? It's saying HYPER MONSTERS! So, I figure I should give it what it wants! Could you hunt down a Daimyo Hermitaur while I watch from a safe distance?

name: Revenge from the Skies
flavor_text: Oh, that Yian Kut-Ku had such an aura... I've never seen the likes of it before! I'll bet it was some kind of spectral manifestation of the unquiet spirits of its hunted brethren! What's certain is it was totally consumed by rage! Be careful when you hunt it!

name: Commission: Hyper Kecha Wacha
flavor_text: There's so much to learn from those so-called "Hyper" monsters, but there's nobody I trust to bring back the kind of data I'm interested in...except you, hunter. Could you go to the Ancestral Steppe and hunt down a Hyper Kecha Wacha for me, please?

subquest.goal_text: Wound Kecha Wacha's ears and tail

name: Frog's Face, Demon's Heart
flavor_text: The mug on that Tetsucabra is as scary as any demon. How can I put the nature of its fierce, defiant aura into words...? Anyway, I've got the feeling that it's going to take a hard-bitten Hunter like you to have that beast on the boat to Hades.

name: The Hype is Royal
flavor_text: I'm researching Hyperosity in monsters, and my experiments call for a Royal Ludroth. Aren't you the least bit interested to know how one would look all Hypered up? Sure you are! Go find me one of those babies and let's find out! For science!

subquest.goal_text: Wound Royal Ludroth's head and mane

name: The Verdant Hills Are Alive
flavor_text: I'm sort of concerned about this Hyper Gypceros running wild over the Verdant Hills... It's pretty inconvenient, and the monster just seems happy as a pig in mud. It's really raising my stress levels, so do you think you could maybe convince it to behave? Or just hunt it?

name: Queen of the Ruined Pinnacle
flavor_text: I got lost, and after wandering for ages I found myself in a strange fantasy land. Or so I thought. Actually, it was the Ruined Pinnacle, and I'd stumbled into Rathian territory. Me and another lost traveler are hiding from it now. Help!

name: Afro Soul Is a Way of Life
flavor_text: Oh baby! If you want to truly funk up your soul, there's only one place to go: the Volcano! Hot hot HOT, baby! You got this! You're gonna dip your soul in some o' that Lavasioth magic, baby!

name: Naked Aggression
flavor_text: There was a hunter in town walking about in only his drawers! Naturally I had to protect the townspeople, so I questioned him. He claims a Ceanataur ripped up his clothes! I need you to verify his claims, and eliminate the monster. If there is one.

name: The Unapproachable Yian Garuga
flavor_text: Please, Hunter, I need you to hunt a Yian Garuga! It's been on the most wanted list for so long now, I've lost count of how many other hunters it's taken down! I think its nest is in the Ruined Pinnacle. Go give that big chicken a real good basting!

name: Uragaan Grief
flavor_text: I got sent to the Volcano on a meownster-hunting expedition but a big, furrocious Uragaan purrevented us from going any further! I can see it even meow, looming befur me... Purrlease, Hunter, meowst it from that place!

name: The Lost Expedition
flavor_text: I'm worried, Hunter. We haven't heard a peep from one of our Frozen Seaway-expedition teams. Mind investigating? It's a cold, cruel region, so gird those loins before you go! Pave the way for our exploration.

name: The Royal Guard
flavor_text: A Seltas Queen is nesting in the Jurassic Frontier! Rumor has it "her majesty" relies on a soldier-like male of the species for protection. I could write a book about their relationship. Help me!

name: Predator in the Hills
goal_text: Hunt a Rathalos and a Rathian
flavor_text: I was herding a flock of Moofahs in the Verdant Hills, when suddenly along came a Rathian and a Rathalos! I hid the moment I saw them, but I was too scared to move, and so were my babies! Please, save us before we end up on their plate!

name: The Sun, Also Wyverns
flavor_text: Welp, looks like this old-timer's outta luck again. It's such a nice day, I thought I'd go for a dip in the sea, but a Lagiacrus popped up and shocked me. No, save your concern. I'll just lie here and not move until I die and stop being such a hindrance to you young folk.

name: Return from the Pinnacle
flavor_text: We came to survey the Ruined Pinnacle, but had a run-in with a very tetchy Zinogre. We tried to evacuate all the researchers, but the unfamiliar terrain is really making that difficult. Could you remove the Zinogre, please?

name: A Certain Gravitas
flavor_text: Ah, Volcanic Hollow, bereft of life, where not a blade of grass grows nor cheerful swallow sings. The only thing that stirs is the bubbling magma... and the furiously rampaging Gravios, of course. Actually, you should probably do something about that.

name: Water Kerfuffle
flavor_text: My meowster, ever the romeowntic, said he met the meowst wonderful lady in a dream. He said something about her "wondrous bubbles" and "lustrous pink crest"... Oh my stripes and whiskers, he's fallen in love with a Mizutsune, hasn't he? Help!

name: Pinnacle Pioneering
flavor_text: Howdy, everybody! The King requested a thorough cataloging of the Ruined Pinnacle. Just when I was thinking how completely normal and uninteresting it was, POW! SHAZAM! You're up, Hunter!

name: Ice Recovery
flavor_text: Let me tell you about the most amazing thing the Frozen Seaway has to offer. Imagine: ice from Gammoth snowballs that's been trampled down to become part of the ground. Ugh, so post-modern! I must have some! Will you help me?

name: The Boiling Broiling Desert
flavor_text: Blazing sun! Earth dry as a bone! And to top it off, the flaming breath of a Glavenus! It's too hot to stand! Unless someone does something about that beast, I won't make it out of this desert. How about you, Hunter? Or is the challenge too hot to handle?

name: Eclipse at Jurassic Frontier
flavor_text: Boy, has my luck run out today. I was fleeing through the Jurassic Frontier when I tripped and fell. I cried out in pain, and a disgusting black creature sidled up to me. This is it, I'm done for. Heavens help me! I promise I'll change my ways!

name: A Pinnacle Just for You
flavor_text: My acquaintance says hunters love to pursue their prey as long as they've got the stamina to do so. Naturally, I was inclined to discover whether there was any truth to this. Would you mind popping up to the Ruined Pinnacle to demonstrate for me?

name: The Phantom Beast!
flavor_text: That thing we spotted up on the Arctic Ridge must have been the Phantom Beast. It radiated a faint light as it slid along the ground. Whoever hunts it down is in for some pretty sweet loot, that's for sure!

name: Reality or Fantasy?
flavor_text: Ugh... The Jurassic Frontier... Yes, that's where the horned phantom showed itself... And unless that white beast's fury is stopped, the land will be plunged into disaster! Hunters of the Oracle, hear me! Defeat the Phantom Beast and fulfill the prophecy!

name: Giant Dragon Invasion
goal_text: Slay a Lao-Shan Lung or repel it
flavor_text: An urgent report from the Schrade region came in. A Lao-Shan Lung has been attacking settlements there. I'd like you to help defend a fort on one of its regular attack paths. Pay attention to barricade integrity, and of course, keep an eye on the monster!

name: Trial by Fart
flavor_text: So, not to brag or anything but I'm a pretty big deal in my hunter class. They expect great things of me. So I thought I'd go prove them all right by hunting something awesome! Uh, I didn't realize Congalala are so hard to hunt though. Can you come save my reputation?

name: The Mud Must Flow
flavor_text: Here's a tip: the most amazing thing from the Dunes is obviously the mud a Barroth flings off itself, once it's all dried in the sun! Ugh, just talking about it makes me want some. Hey, can you help me snag some?

name: The Pinnacle of Good Records
flavor_text: Howdy everybody! Out on the road I saw huge boulders cracking together and something came lumbering out! It gave off a sort of black aura, and I thought, well darn, this is gonna make for one heck of a record! You wanna get over here and help me record it?

name: Sweets for My Sweets
flavor_text: I wanna repay everyone who helped advertise my business by making a super awesome dessert! All the secret ingredients I need are in the Jurassic Frontier, but what is also there is a Malfestio! Eek! Hunty, pleeease help get rid of it? I'll give you cake? Please?

name: Zamtrios, Right Ahead!
flavor_text: It's unsinkable, they said. Enjoy the maiden voyage of this decadent ship, they said. It definitely won't be split in half by a marauding sharkbeast, they said. Look, can someone hunt this thing? The carpets are getting ruined in first class. I can't even look at steerage.

name: Frozen Seaway Horror Story
flavor_text: I was crawling around a cave on the Frozen Seaway, looking for something, as one does, when I became aware of a presence. A white face floated in the dark behind me. A jagged mouth...a long...long...neck... -- Here the record ends --

name: Temnoceranophobia
flavor_text: My master is an awesome hunter... most of the time. One day he just blurted out that he can't deal with "creepy Nerscylla" -- something about their eyes? -- and now he's just not the same to me. Can you wipe this stain from his honor by taking over the hunt?

name: The Pinnacle of Terror
flavor_text: I'm spending time in the company of some Lynians at the Ruined Pinnacle. See, they took me in when I was chased by a Hyper Rathian. I'm a live and let live kind of hunter, but these Lynians might still be in danger. Can you take out the Rathian? I'll just chill here.

name: Eat in Pieces
flavor_text: I have this kind of embarrassing habit whenever I eat, so I thought what better place to eat in privacy than the Desert, right? WRONG. I nearly turned into dinner when this Nibelsnarf with a seriously dark aura turned up! I just want to eat in peace!

name: Diabolical Deluge
flavor_text: The worst has happened. A Hyper Plesioth arrived in the Jungle and has flooded the river. Six villages are underwater! Communication is cut off due to the damage. We need an outstanding hunter to get in there and sort this mess out!

name: Shhhhut Up
flavor_text: *psst* We had some heavy snow, now everyone is terrified there'll be an avalanche. We have to be super quiet! Even this writing is in a whisper. We can hold out, but there's a Hyper Blangonga nearby who could ruin everything! Could you maybe shut it up?

name: It's a Miner's Life
flavor_text: 'Ey up. Been trouble down t'mine. No sooner did we start work than a bleedin' great Lavasioth turned up! We miners're no stranger to danger, but we're not idiots. If you could duff it up or summit so we can get back to work, that'd be grand. Ta!

name: No Place to Run
flavor_text: I was walking down the safest road I know to get back home, nothing bad's ever happened on this road and you know where I'm going with this, don't you? Hyper Shogun Ceanataur. You gotta get rid of it or I'll never get back to my village. Please help!

name: ...Or Just Wait for It to Poop
flavor_text: What I'm about to tell you is absolutely true, I swear. It sounds crazy, but my armor-crafting friend made a suit of hermetically sealed armor and...well, got swallowed whole by a Hyper Najarala. Please do something, Hunter!

name: Nargacuga in the Jurassic Frontier
flavor_text: The Jurassic Frontier. All is shrouded in darkness. Suddenly, crimson splits the gloom on wings of shadow! The fearsome Nargacuga stands, wrapped in fog and illuminated by a single shaft of moonlight... Then you come out of nowhere and beat it up. Okay?

name: Harvest Tour: Volcanic Hollow
goal_text: Survive until time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Ah, gathering time again? Then I've got just the Quest for you, darling. Gathering up as much as you can, and deliver a Paw Pass Ticket when you've had enough.

name: Paralyzing Peril
flavor_text: I came here with my meowster, but as we were exploring I felt a tingle in my meowstache. Then we were attacked by the tingle king himself, Lagiacrus! We got purralyzed before we could blink! Purrlease help!

name: Problem at the Pinnacle
flavor_text: The Ruined Pinnacle hides so many secrets, but my efforts to uncover them have been met by more than a little resistance from the resident Gore Magala. Any chance you could, you know...make it go away?

name: Strutting the Royal Runway
flavor_text: The spotlight beckons! For my next performance, I am to dance gracefully upon the shell of a Neopteron. Our props team is too stingy to make one, so fetch me the real thing instead. Break a leg!

name: Hunt-a-Thon: Yian Garuga
flavor_text: A pair of Yian Garuga have reared their ugly heads, and it seems the Jungle isn't big enough for both of them. They're just screaming their heads off and smashing things up! Hunter, please put a stop to their pathetic squabble!

name: Primal Forest Fears
goal_text: Hunt a Nerscylla and a Malfestio
flavor_text: While traversing the Primal Forest, I've realized something very strange. I should have been going east this whole time, but I've clearly gone west. I...I can't move my feet! Oh no...no, it can't be... It's a-- -- Here the record ends --

name: Hunt-a-Thon: Gravios
goal_text: Hunt 2 before time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: An' ole pal o' mine asked if this here Caravaneer could take a gander at some Gravios a-nestin' in the Primal Forest. Normally I'd be happy to oblige the feller, but I can't handle 'em on my ownsome. Can ya handle maybe two of 'em?

name: Hunter Dojo: Tail-do
flavor_text: You seek the way of the hunter, do you? Then you must hone your abilities! Your mind must be as sharp as the tail of Glavenus-sensei! And when we are finished, you will have a smoldering battle instinct to rival the beast itself!

name: It's Gotta Be Coal
flavor_text: Do they expect me to work my culinary magic using a wood fire, like some kind of common COOK? I am a chef! I require Coal! You! Fetch me some from the Volcanic Hollow. You should really know how to make a pickaxe by now -- Mystery Bone and Iron Ore, remember?

name: PR Disaster
goal_text: Hunt a Rathian and a Glavenus
flavor_text: There's been sightings of a serious threat to Bherna's tourist industry! And people, I guess. We've got a Glavenus on the ground and a Rathian in the sky... We're basically inaccessible as it stands! Please, do something! Our PR hangs in the balance!

name: I Hope It's Not Barioth Flavored
flavor_text: Discovery of the century! A machine that CREATES SORBET! I'll call it... "Sorby McSorbface". Or something. I can decide on a name after you get back from Barioth hunting. Oh, did I forget to mention that? I need you to go hunt a Barioth. Snap to it!

name: Hunter Dojo: Tusk-fu
flavor_text: Push, shove, heave, and then some! To join our dojo, you must first capture Gammoth-sensei! There are no clever tricks. You must become one with the mountain. Firm! Strong! Resolute! And being really darn stubborn can't hurt either!

name: Howl at the Moon
flavor_text: I'm trying to remember something I saw in a dream long ago... You know what might help me recall it, Hunter? If you could purrchance go to the Misty Peaks and hunt a Zinogre. That news is sure to jog my memory, nya!

name: Hunter Dojo: Bubble-jitsu
flavor_text: So, you would master the way of the hunter? Let's journey on the path to hunterdom together! A true hunter has total mastery of their techniques, making each hunt a bewitching dance. Go and study under Mizutsune-sensei to learn how to move with grace!

name: "Kiken" Means "Danger"!
flavor_text: I see it! Up above ship! Biiiig kage! Kage means "shadow"! In all the blue sky, a Rathalos flying. Not rumor! I see it with own eyes! It appear in single minute, DOKAAAAN! That why you must hunt! I relying on you!

name: Hunter Dojo: Lightning Wushu
flavor_text: Hey, bro! Another acolyte on the road to hunterlightenment? I dig it. A hunter's gotta be aggressive, know what I'm sayin'? Strike like lightning, instill fear like thunder, all that jazz. You wanna learn how to do that? Go talk to Astalos-sensei. By which I mean "hunt".

name: Heavenly Fire, Earthly Flame
goal_text: Hunt a Lavasioth and a Rathalos
flavor_text: What's happening!? First a monster comes flying out of the volcano and then another monster comes bursting out from the earth! Where can I hide!? And I'm all out of Cool Drinks! I'm at the end of my rope here!

name: Frontier Fisticuffs
flavor_text: I feel like the local monsters are mocking our efforts to settle this land! A couple more of them have appeared to do their worst, but we're not giving up! This is our land and they can't have it! We'll build our settlement over their dead bodies!

name: Down With This Sort of Thing
flavor_text: What on earth is going on!? Monsters are just going about willy-nilly making the worst racket on MY Ancestral Steppe! This kind of noise pollution has to stop! Somebody contact the Guild and get this mess fixed!

name: Searing Sands
flavor_text: Wind's getting hot... Big storm's coming, like we've not seen for years. Round about now a whole bunch of monsters'll gather together. If you like a challenge I can tell you where to find them. Of course, if you end up biting the hot gritty dust that's your own concern.

name: Arena Bakalaka-Battle! Woo!
flavor_text: Happy day-day! Hunter now eligibbible for become minion. But minion of Cha-Cha or Kayamba? Final-final test at hand. In Quest, think-alink of all your true-true leader did for you and make decision. Shaka-laka!

name: Material Old Girl
flavor_text: Young'uns need to know the fun of getting materials from monsters to upgrade their armor! You look like you know your way around different armors, so I'm going to ask you to take down a Hyper Basarios and a Hyper Shogun Ceanataur in the Volcano!

name: Let the Games Begin
goal_text: Hunt a Kecha Wacha and a Nerscylla
flavor_text: Ladies, gentlemen, Lynians and Temnocerans! Welcome to this special surprise show of mine! We've got a Kecha Wacha full of beans and a Nerscylla that's even more aggressive than usual, and they're both gonna make a beeline for you! Good luck!

name: Sky Render
goal_text: Slay a Valstrax or repel it
flavor_text: Well, darling, this one will be hairy with a capital H. Your target? It tears through the sky, leaving red trails, and all who see it relay tales of woe and misfortune. In short, it's a Valstrax. Don't let your guard down for a second.

name: Lavaclad Beast
flavor_text: Agnaktor surround themselves in lava that cools and hardens to form a protective armor, right? I was wondering why I couldn't use that principle for my own armor... Could you take one on while I watch and make notes? From a safe distance...

name: Battle of 1001 Blades
flavor_text: Heh heh heh... Did you know the scales of a Seregios are as sharp as any blade? I wonder what'd it be like to cut something with one of those babies... How'd you like to hunt a Seregios and test out those scales for yourself? Heh heh heh...

name: Misty Opportunity?
flavor_text: There's a lovely little spot in the Misty Peaks that's nice and warm, purrfect for a catnap! Or it would be, except there's a dumb Duramboros making everything cold and shady with its massive bulk! You gotta save my catnap before it's too late!

name: Tracing the Family Tree
flavor_text: *cough* I'm trying to trace the evolution of *cough* flying wyverns by examining the primitive *sniff* skeletal structure of the Tigrex. Would you hunt one for me? After all, it's not like-- *splutter* not like I could-- *hack* *wheeze* It's not like I-- *haaark*...

name: Beware Twin Horns on the Sand
flavor_text: I've got a good test for you, darling. A Diablos is lurking around the Desert, blocking us off from some precious resources, so it needs to be removed. If you're who I know you are, you'll be able to take care of this with style. Make it one to get my heart fluttering!

name: Slam Gunk
flavor_text: You know about the Brachydios that live in the Volcanic Hollow? Course you don't. I'll keep it simple: they can somehow activate the slime, which makes it explode. I need to know how they do this, and you're going to catch one for me. Think you can manage?

name: Ends of the Earth
flavor_text: I saw it! A monster with golden scales making its way to the Sanctuary! I'm getting all kinds of premonitions... I wish I could say it was nothing, just the ramblings of an old man, but I fear destruction will follow, just like in the legends... We have to do something.

name: Paint It Gold
flavor_text: I simply adore things that are decked out in glittering gold. I've heard stories about the Rajang's golden hair. I would love to acquire some for my collection, so would you hunt the beast at the Ancestral Steppe for me, perhaps?

name: Everything in Moderation
flavor_text: Dearie me! What a to-do! A Deviljho in the Marshlands! It'll gobble up all the lovely Aptonoth if we're not careful! Then there'll be none left for me to eat! I will not stand for such a thing, you hear? Please take care of that Deviljho and save my Aptonoth!

name: Heaven and Hell
flavor_text: I've seen many a monster in my time, but I've never seen such a disgusting one before. Seems like a bad omen if you ask me... Hey, young 'un, why not take care of that beast? You know, before something bad goes down...

name: Blizzard Blower
goal_text: Slay a Kushala Daora or repel it
flavor_text: Forecasts says it should be clear, yet the blizzard goes on and on. I suspect that the appearance of that Kushala Daora is responsible for the sudden changes in weather. It'd be quite a challenge for us to get rid of it... Do you think you could look into it?

subquest.goal_text: Wound Kushala Daora's head and wings

name: Steel Yourself
goal_text: Slay a Kushala Daora or repel it
flavor_text: Hey, have you heard anything about this steel dragon doohickey in the Jungle? I need it. I need to make a sword out of a dragon. I've never needed anything more in my life. I also need you to take care of it while I pick up the materials, okay?

subquest.goal_text: Wound K.Daora's head and sever its tail

name: Out of Thin Air
goal_text: Slay a Chameleos or repel it
flavor_text: While out on a mission, I got that feeling I was being followed. I spun round but there was nothing there. Spooked me for sure, but just as I was thinking it was all my imagination, the beast suddenly revealed itself! No time to explain further, just get out there and slay it!

name: Into Thin Air
goal_text: Slay a Chameleos or repel it
flavor_text: The other day, I came across one of those Elder Dragons you hear about in the stories. Thought I was about to bite it, but then it just vanished! Hey! Don't give me that look! I know what I saw! Vanished right into nothin'! I hope you, or someone else, can take care of it...

subquest.goal_text: Break Chameleos's horn and sever its tail

name: Explosion Marks the Spot
goal_text: Slay a Teostra or repel it
flavor_text: I came here looking for lost treasure at the Volcano, but unfortunately it seems to be well guarded! The treasure's just out of reach, and unless we can avoid the beast's explosions, we'll never lay hands on it. So...fancy helping me fulfill my dream of riches?

name: Sandblasting
goal_text: Slay a Teostra or repel it
flavor_text: Big explosions have been spotted sending huge plumes of sand into the air. Might be the work of a Teostra. It'll be a dangerous mission, but if we want to keep nearby villages safe, we'll need a skilled hunter like you to help. We pray you're up to the challenge!

subquest.goal_text: Wound Teostra's head and sever its tail

name: Silver-Tongued Storyteller
flavor_text: I used to love my granny's tales of the Silver Rathalos...but I never imagined it actually existed. The stories usually ended up with a nearby village being attacked, so best not to ignore this one... A skilled hunter, such as yourself, could take care of it.

subquest.goal_text: Wound Silver Rathalos's wings and back

name: Gold Digger
flavor_text: Listen! There's been a Gold Rathian! You know, the one with the golden scales! Made of gold! Sweet, precious gold! Wow! I smell an opportunity to make some serious dough! I hear you can handle yourself. Fancy taking her on for me?

subquest.goal_text: Wound Gold Rathian's wings and back

name: The Jungle VIP
flavor_text: I was in the Jungle pursuing a monster, but this crazy golden furball came leaping out at me. It wasn't like your usual Rajang, either. It was furious, attacking anything that moved! You gotta get rid of it for me, please! I'm gonna get flashbacks...

name: Deranged Desert Deviljho
flavor_text: I can't believe this. We've clearly claimed this land and now some Deviljho's shown up to attack us and our little town. I'm not gonna let it eat all our hard work! Now the odds might be bad, but as long as we look to the future we'll be fine! Who's with me!?

name: Brachydios Brute Squad
flavor_text: We were visiting Ingle Isle when we were attacked by some creepy monster covered in slime, which slapped its creepy slime-arms in a flash of light and sent us all flying! This isn't how you treat a defense squad! Go on, teach it some manners!

name: Trial by Akantor
flavor_text: The Hunter's Guild has massed its forces and managed to corner an Akantor. All that remains is to hunt it down now. Of course, this is a highly dangerous task, so we're looking for experienced hunters to take the job. Think you've got what it takes?

name: Polar Peril
flavor_text: I have another confidential job for you. It's rather private, but important. I'd appreciate your discretion. The job entails you putting down a certain Ukanlos in the Polar Field. It's a dangerous one for sure, so if you want we can discuss worst-case scenarios?

name: Who Will Hunt the Rain?
flavor_text: I can't remember the last day it didn't rain. We're all out of dry firewood, and even if we had any, the wind would just blow out our fires. Please, I can't stand this storm anymore! Help us, before we all catch pneumonia!

name: A Bone to Pick
flavor_text: My whole village vanished in a single night. All my friends who lived by the sea, even their newborn child, all gone. For some reason I was spared, and since then I have cherished one hope, and one hope only: that someone'll turn that bag of bones into literal bones.

name: Castle on the Run
flavor_text: Ahtal-Ka, you know, the monster that's rumored to be a moving fortress? Well, it seems to have vanished somewhere round the Forlorn Citadel. Can something so big just disappear like that? Now's our chance to find out. Set course for battle!

name: Setting the Barioth High
flavor_text: I rode out to the Frozen Seaway to challenge a white knight who is said to dwell there, but instead I found myself faced with an odd black-glowing knight in place of the white. I thought to challenge him regardless but, alas, was bested. Go in my place, I beg you!

name: Neopteronophobia
flavor_text: My master is an awesome hunter...most of the time. He let slip that he can't stand how Seltas Queens crunch up Seltas. It would be super embarrassing to be the apprentice of an insectophobe, so could you get rid of the bugs so he can stop shuddering?

subquest.goal_text: Wound S.Queen's head and sever her tail

name: Let's Get Igneous
flavor_text: The Volcano really does have the most striking rock formations! There's one in particular I would love to get my hands on, but it has to be toasted by a Hyper Rathalos and left to simmer in magma to get the full effect. Does that strike you as doable?

name: Seeking the Sea King
flavor_text: Hey there, kid! Remember when I gave you those weapon blueprints? Well, it just so happens I remembered another one of 'em, and I think you'd like it! Go hunt me down a Hyper Lagiacrus in the Jungle and I'll slap some of my smithly wisdom on ya!

subquest.goal_text: Wound Lagiacrus's chest and sever its tail

name: Marshland Fandango
flavor_text: Now there's a Gravios on my tail! Why does this keep happening to me!? Why am I not in the lab looking at it under a microscope!? I'm no hunter. I could take on all the Mosswine you want, but this? Nu-uh. YOU do the hunting, Hunter!

name: It Takes Mizutsune to Tango
flavor_text: I must have more pupils! Through me, the ancient dance of our ancestors lives on: the dance of the Hyper Mizutsune! Is it not dazzling enough? I'll simply have to go and refresh my skills from the source. I can use the experience to solicit more followers!

subquest.goal_text: Wound Mizutsune's head and sever its tail

name: If These Rocks Could Talk
flavor_text: Very clever of that hunted Hyper Astalos to slip away in the Jungle like that. Very clever indeed. But not clever enough! I've located an outcrop where the rocks have been deformed by high electrical currents. Shall we go and pay our friend a visit?

name: The Big Push
flavor_text: We undergo rigorous training day and night to protect our people. So why can't we beat this one lumbering Gammoth!? We hate to admit it, but you're the best for dealing with Hyper monsters like this guy. Go take him down and keep our land safe!

name: All Creatures Cleaved and Small
flavor_text: To learn the art of quick-draw, one's mind must be still as water. And yet, the Glavenus is seen to cut its prey skillfully yet in a profound rage. I begin to question my principles. Can you show me the beast's combat techniques to deepen my understanding?

subquest.goal_text: Wound Glavenus's back and sever its tail

name: Agnaktor's Deep
flavor_text: I was really getting very invested in my research at the Volcanic Hollow. If only that Hyper Agnaktor hadn't shown up and ruined everything! It even made me drop a rare Wycademy book on archaeology! I can get it back, I think, but I'd need your help.

name: Something Wicked
flavor_text: What is with that disgusting freak of a monster!? They already look bad to begin with, but this one had a big, creepy aura around it! That thing needs to be hunted before someone gets seriously injured! Well don't just stand there -- GO!

subquest.goal_text: Wound G. Magala's wingarms and wings

name: Seregios Exposé
flavor_text: A Seregios, presumed Hyper, has been sighted in the Dunes. Any and all hunters capable of tackling the creature are being scouted as we speak. This has been your average bystander chugging Cool Drinks, reporting live from the scene.

name: Appeal from Authority
flavor_text: Hunter, I ask this on behalf of all the chiefs in this region: Please hunt the Hyper Duramboros currently rampaging through our villages. (Ugh, the stress. Once I've rebuilt my house and bought a new bed, I'm going to nap for a week.)

name: Tigrex Trap
flavor_text: Some criminal with a grudge against the Guild managed to lure some hunters out to the mountain with a false SOS call. Now they're being menaced by a Hyper Tigrex! The criminal was re-apprehended, but the Tigrex is still at large and causing mayhem!

subquest.goal_text: Wound Tigrex's head and sever its tail

name: Backwater Battle
flavor_text: A Diablos with a strange, dark aura has been seen wandering this desolate place. But we're not going to let a little thing like that deter us. We didn't come here just to turn tail and run at the sight of a terrifying rampaging monster! If it thinks it can scare us away, it's wrong!

name: Even Brachydios Need A Holiday
flavor_text: A Brachydios has started loiterin' around the Deserted Island. It's makin' it very difficult for people to use the seaways, not to mention makin' us Moga people mighty nervous. Why does it even want to be there? There's nothing to do!

subquest.goal_text: Wound Brachydios's head and sever its tail

name: Path of the Hunter
flavor_text: You are approaching true huntlightenment. But there is still a ways to go yet, Hunter! You already have the strength you need -- you just need to learn to wield it to your maximum potential. Find your center, and everything will flow from there!

name: Fade to Black
goal_text: Slay a Fatalis or repel it
flavor_text: The black dragon of legend is no longer just a legend. Make use of what you find within the ancient castle and you might stand a chance. The fate of our nation lies in your hands!

name: Glory Glory Alatreon
flavor_text: Disasters befall us, lives are lost. In the wake of the dragon, only death remains. Its coming means ruin. Repent, people! Repent of your sins! Unless some brave hunter wants to come and slay this thing for us?

name: The End Is Nigh
goal_text: Slay a Fatalis or repel it
flavor_text: It's come! The time has come! Not to mention the dragon! Its scales are steeped in blood! It leaves hellfire in its wake! Hunter, if you think you can stop it, then now is the time to give it a whirl!

name: Old Fatalis
goal_text: Slay a Fatalis or repel it
flavor_text: Hohoho, the time is ripe! The hour is come! Now the party begins and we must all dance, dance, dance! Put on your best armor, pick up your best weapon and greet your partner! Don't forget to bow! Ahahahaha!

name: Supersonic
goal_text: Slay a Valstrax or repel it
flavor_text: You know what? My ship's a ton faster than that piece of junk over there. But we ended up gettin' chased by some superfast monster, and the shockwave it left behind dropped us right outta the air. Nobody hurts my ship like that, nobody! Can someone take him out?

name: Hunter Dojo: Valstrax-ryu
goal_text: Slay a Valstrax or repel it
flavor_text: You're looking pretty huntlightened, we must say. Feel like training? One of a hunter's most important weapons is resourcefulness, a quick wit, like the ability to read Valstrax's attacks in its wingtips. Think you've got it? Go see Valstrax-sensei and see what happens!

name: Scales of Justice
goal_text: Slay a Valstrax or repel it
flavor_text: So I was on my way to hunt up a shipment of Popo fur when a Valstrax passed by me. I hovered around for a bit just to see if it hadn't dropped a shiny, shiny scale...when it spotted me. I don't need to explain what happened next, do I? Just avenge me, please!

name: Deviljho Hunt
flavor_text: Yeah, I used to be a hunter. I loved the job, too. But then one day this massive beast came out of nowhere... Almost did me in. I quit the biz. I couldn't hack it. But you -- I bet you could take that monster on...

name: Price Freeze
flavor_text: Navigating the Frozen Seaway isn't this sailor's idea of fun, but I could have done without the Tigrex playing hide and seek around the place. You need to put a stop to it before my prices freeze for good!

name: Seregios Scuffle
flavor_text: I really didn't deserve any of this. I was just observing some volcanic activity here, when a Seregios showed up and started whaling on me. Like, dude, if the Volcano blows it'll take you with it! We're on the same side here! Not any more, though. Wanna hunt it for me?

name: Diabolical Delight
flavor_text: Bwahahaha, I can't believe it! I heard stories long ago about the terrifying Diablos, and now I'm actually in one! Can't tell you how happy that makes me! So, are you gonna be the one to carve your name into history and capture one of these bad boys?

name: Emergency at the Arctic Ridge!
flavor_text: Urgent. Signs of Rajang detected in Arctic Ridge. Civilian travel routes in danger. People stranded on mountain also at risk. Proceed immediately to Arctic Ridge with all haste.

name: Brachydios Bypass
flavor_text: This Brachydios came out of nowhere so me and my friend had to hide in a cave. I was hurt so my friend acted as a decoy so I could get away...but he hasn't returned! I'm gonna go to the Volcano to find him. Can you cover me by hunting the Brachydios?

name: A Very Long Engravement
goal_text: Hunt a Glavenus and a Gravios
flavor_text: An airship's gone missing in the Volcano region...and my fiancée was on board. I know lots of Glavenus and Gravios live in the region... I know it looks grim, but I can't give up. Can you hunt the monsters while I lead the search party?

name: A Titanic Clash
goal_text: Hunt an Agnaktor and a Duramboros
flavor_text: Uh... I may have, uh, done a bad thing. I let an Agnaktor and a Duramboros into the Arena at the same time, and the two of them just went crazy! It's like hell on earth in there! Please, somebody do something before more damage is done!

name: The Ol' Razzle Dazzle
goal_text: Hunt a Deviljho and a Rajang
flavor_text: You ready? You must be ready. Both monsters are waiting for you in what I can only assume is eager anticipation! I want you to give those beasties all you've got. Give me a fantastic show!

name: Quest of Friendship
flavor_text: Feh heh heh, if this Quest doesn't make us best buds I don't know what will! Time to show the other Guildmasters what you're made of with the mother of all Quests! The harder the Quest the deeper the bond, I always say!

name: Fiery Four-way Fracas
flavor_text: Hahahah! As soon as I heard how well my apprentice was doing, I knew I had to make some new armor to celebrate! Guess who gets to go to the Volcano and hunt every big sucker they can find in the search for materials? YOU! I'll keep the forge hot for you.

name: Pitched Pinnacle Battle
flavor_text: We're up at the Ruined Pinnacle on a survey but a Deviljho took us by surprise. It had some kind of dark aura and powerful attacks which are giving us some trouble. If there's a skilled hunter who can help us out of this, that would be great.

subquest.goal_text: Wound Deviljho's head, sever its tail

name: A Tragedy in Silver and Gold
goal_text: Hunt a Silver Rathalos and a Gold Rathian
flavor_text: My husband protected me from those fiends, those monsters! But they were Hyper monsters, and he was just one man... He never stood a chance. I've spent all my life searching for them, and I've tracked them to the Ruined Pinnacle. Please, put an end to this pain.

name: Rajang Against The Machine
flavor_text: Long ago I banished a man who turned out to be innocent, and he swore revenge. Now I fear that time has come, as he's leading a Hyper Rajang to my city! I'm eager to make amends with him and atone for my mistake, but you must defend the city!

name: What's Mine is Mine
flavor_text: You know how long it took us to find some high-quality ore? Long enough for an Uragaan to shuffle up next to us and then start rolling around wrecking the place! Get its Hyper behind outta here before the entire mine caves in!

name: A Jurassic Frontier Just for You
flavor_text: My acquaintance says that hunters' weapon arms tremble uncontrollably when up against a powerful enemy. Naturally, I was inclined to discover whether there was any truth to this. So how about you take a quick sojourn to the Jurassic Frontier and show me?

subquest.goal_text: Wound G.Rathian's head and sever its tail

name: By the Light of the Silvery Rath
flavor_text: I gaze here up at the moon in the Misty Peaks, and oh, how beautiful it looks! But wait...how strange. It shines silver, but it's no moon...and it's not particularly beautiful either. Or round! 'Tis an evil glow! Please, Hunter, make it leave!

subquest.goal_text: Wound S.Rathalos's head and sever its tail

name: Zinogre-enthusiasm
flavor_text: Looks like some Moga villagers got attacked by a Hyper Zinogre on their way to Yukumo. And I'm the one who invited them to begin with... Ugh, it's all my fault! I hate to be asking you, but could you go out to the Deserted Island and get them to safety?

name: Arctic Ridge Allegiances
flavor_text: The Guildmasters have been vying to see who gets the most attention from you lately. I don't really care for such nonsense, myself, so I'll just ask you to clean out the Hyper Monsters at the Arctic Ridge. Be careful -- they're all exceptionally strong!

name: Arena Allegiances
flavor_text: I hear the Val Habar Master has been proactive of late in trying to monopolize your talent. Well, I'm not going to sit idly by and let him have his way! I've prepared a Quest for you. Let your success demonstrate to whom you really owe your loyalty!

name: The Sun and the Moon
goal_text: Hunt a Silver Rathalos and a Gold Rathian
flavor_text: The sun and the moon are opposing entities, destined never to meet. But suppose they do? Why, it would spell the end of the world! And now the Silver Rathalos and Gold Rathian at the Ruined Pinnacle have come to bring ruin upon us all! Gods have mercy!

name: Primal Screams
flavor_text: We've just had word from the Primal Forest. It seems one of our expedition teams was attacked by an irregular type of Gore Magala. We'll need you to hunt it while we evacuate the team. It won't be easy, I know, but you're the only one we can turn to, Hunter!

name: Garuga's Comeuppance
flavor_text: Some jackanapes'd trashed up my veggies, an' I was of a mind to give 'em a real earful. 'Course, that was 'til I heard some overgrown birdfowl gone Hyper was what done the deed! Don't look like he's in the mood for a talkin'. Maybe see if a hunt'll do him good!

subquest.goal_text: Wound Yian Garuga's head and wingtalon

name: Jurassic Skulduggery
flavor_text: Our sources inform us that a close relative of the king has been abducted by a faction seeking to overthrow His Highness. They left by way of the Jurassic Frontier, which is now brimming with large monsters. Assist our rescue party, Hunter, we beseech you!

name: Verdant Hills Missive
flavor_text: I've had ENOUGH! I've already had it up to here dodging Yian Garuga beaks and Najarala tails. Now there's a Rathian and an Astalos!? This is my last chance. Entrusted this note to a friendly Mosswine. Go on without me, my Mosswine friend. Run free! Find help!

name: R.I.P.
goal_text: Hunt a Rathalos and a Rathian
flavor_text: We were finally ready to sign a peace treaty with the neighboring military powers, but just as we were putting pen to paper, along comes a pair of Hyper wyverns! They're no symbols of peace! Get them out of here, pronto!

name: Death at My Greaves
goal_text: Hunt a Gravios and a Nerscylla
flavor_text: The Primal Forest used to be a safe place...relatively speaking. Now? Nobody comes out of there alive. Save for one girl, who was delirious when we found her. Said she danced toe-to-toe with Death itself. Turns out "Death" is a pair of Hyper monsters!

name: Pinnacle Problems
flavor_text: We knew what we were getting into when we went to survey the Ruined Pinnacle. We were ready for literally anything...except THOSE! A Hyper Basarios, Zinogre, AND Astalos? It's a sight to behold, let me tell you. Hunter, trounce that terrible trio!

name: A Bed of Sand
flavor_text: My son never came back from his hunt. He knew what he was getting into...but that doesn't stop me from wanting something to remember him by. It's no small errand, but would you brave a den of Hyper monsters to bring me closure, Hunter?

name: Jungle Funk
flavor_text: Stay calm! An airship delivering a large consignment of Dung Bombs has crashed, and now the Jungle's covered in sh...*ahem*...shovel-loads of the stuff. Hyper Monsters fleeing the stench are hindering the recovery effort... What to do...?

name: Grudge Match: Malfestio
flavor_text: You DO know your left from your right, don't you? This Malfestio's got powers that'll make you forget. Watch yourself! Weapons: Great Sword, Sword & Shield, Hammer, Gunlance, Heavy Bowgun

name: Grudge Match: Khezu
flavor_text: Okay, Greenhorn. You're up against a Khezu. If its Thunder attacks don't paralyze you, its ugly face will. Weapons: Long Sword, Dual Blades, Switch Axe, Lance, Light Bowgun

name: Grudge Match: Najarala
flavor_text: Ten-hut! Greenhorn, you are about to face the fierce and highly skilled Najarala. Go teach it the meaning of pain! Weapons: Sword & Shield, Insect Glaive, Switch Axe, Charge Blade, Bow

name: Grudge Match: Rathalos
flavor_text: This time, you're up against a Rathalos. These flyin' pukes'll put you in a world of hurt with their fire and poison. Watch it! Weapons: Sword & Shield, Dual Blades, Hammer, Lance, Heavy Bowgun

name: Grudge Match: Kecha Wacha
flavor_text: Do your ears hang low? A Kecha Wacha's do, AND can cover its face for extra head protection! Watch out for it, Greenhorn! Weapons: Long Sword, Dual Blades, Hunting Horn, Insect Glaive, Heavy Bowgun

name: Grudge Match: Plesioth
flavor_text: Bring honor to our beloved Arena by downin' this Plesioth or I'll have you doin' PT until you're old and gray! Weapons: Great Sword, Sword & Shield, Hunting Horn, Gunlance, Light Bowgun

name: Grudge Match: Brachydios
flavor_text: Think you can bash the Brach, Greenhorn? Time to find out! Keep an eye on its slime: If it turns red... KABOOM! Weapons: Great Sword, Hammer, Charge Blade, Gunlance, Bow

name: Grudge Match: Barioth
flavor_text: Attention all brave hunters! A Barioth awaits your challenge! The shortest completion times hinge on breaking certain parts of its body... Oops! We're giving hints away, folks! Weapons: Long Sword, Insect Glaive, Charge Blade, Lance, Light Bowgun

name: Grudge Match: Yian Garuga
flavor_text: Hear ye, hunters! Who among you would slay the fearsome Yian Garuga? You won't have a moment's respite under its constant onslaught! Still interested? Then step up to the plate! Weapons: Dual Blades, Hammer, Insect Glaive, Switch Axe, Bow

name: Grudge Match: Uragaan
flavor_text: Your foe today, hunters, is the mighty Uragaan! It may not be the sharpest tool in the shed, but who needs brains when you've got an armored shell? Good luck finding the chinks in that! Weapons: Great Sword, Hunting Horn, Switch Axe, Gunlance, Heavy Bowgun

name: Grudge Match: Seregios
flavor_text: Do you strive for greatness, hunters? Well, if you're taking on a Seregios, you'll want to stock up on items for healing gaping slash wounds. Just hope you have the time to use them! Weapons: Long Sword, Hunting Horn, Charge Blade, Lance, Bow

name: Redhelm I: Hunt
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. The target: a Redhelm Arzuros, a beast remarkable for its large frame and the threateningly crimson shade of its fur. This monster is very dangerous. Be careful.

name: Redhelm II: Capture
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. A Redhelm Arzuros is in the Misty Peaks and the Wycademy wants it captured. Make sure you're equipped to capture it before starting.

name: Redhelm III: Hunt
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. Two Redhelm Arzuros have been sighted on the Deserted Island and must be hunted. This is an extremely dangerous Quest, so stay sharp.

name: Redhelm IV: Hunt
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. We need you to hunt a Redhelm Arzuros in the Misty Peaks. Be warned: This specimen may be stronger than any you've faced thus far.

name: Redhelm V: Hunt
goal_text: Hunt a Redhelm Arzuros and a Malfestio
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. Your main target is the Redhelm Arzuros that appeared on the Deserted Island. A Malfestio rampaging in the same area also needs to be taken out.

name: Redhelm VI: Hunt
goal_text: Hunt 2 before time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. There have been reports of multiple Redhelm Arzuros in the Misty Peaks. Alleviate the threat by hunting at least two of them.

name: Redhelm VII: Capture
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. A Redhelm Arzuros is on the Deserted Island, and we need it captured alive. Supplies for capturing will be provided. Use them wisely.

name: Redhelm VIII: Hunt
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. We need you to hunt a Redhelm Arzuros in the Forlorn Arena. Be warned: This specimen may be stronger than any you've faced thus far.

name: Redhelm IX: Hunt
goal_text: Hunt a Redhelm Arzuros and a Deviljho
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. Your main target is the Redhelm Arzuros that appeared on the Deserted Island. A Deviljho rampaging in the same area also needs to be taken out.

name: Redhelm X: Hunt
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. Two Redhelm Arzuros and an Arzuros are in the Forlorn Arena. It would be disastrous should they group up, so please hunt them at once.

name: Redhelm G1: Capture
flavor_text: This Quest is for experienced Special Permit holders only. We need you to capture a Redhelm Arzuros from the Jungle. Supplies will be delayed, so make sure to take everything you need with you.

name: Redhelm G2: Hunt
flavor_text: This Quest is for experienced Special Permit holders only. We've received word of two Redhelm Arzuros on the Deserted Island. Please hunt them both, and make sure you take every precaution.

name: Redhelm G3: Hunt
goal_text: Hunt a Redhelm Arzuros and a Congalala
flavor_text: This Quest is for experienced Special Permit holders only. We've got sightings of a Redhelm Arzuros and a Hyper Congalala in the Jungle. We need you to head over there and deal with them however you see fit.

name: Redhelm G4: Hunt
flavor_text: This Quest is for experienced Special Permit holders only. Your target is a Redhelm Arzuros in the Misty Peaks. Careful, though -- if you faint even once you'll lose your reward and fail the Quest, so keep an eye on your Health.

name: Redhelm G5: Hunt
flavor_text: This Quest is for experienced Special Permit holders only. We've two Redhelm Arzuros on the Sacred Pinnacle that need hunting. Watch out for a Furious Rajang joining the fray, too. Good luck, Hunter!

name: Redhelm EX: Hunt
flavor_text: This Quest is reserved for only the most trusted Wycademy hunters. We have confirmed reports of a Redhelm Arzuros on Sacred Pinnacle. I must warn you that this beast is far worse than others of its kind. Steel yourself. It won't be easy.

name: Snowbaron I: Hunt
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. The target: a Snowbaron Lagombi, noted for its dark fur and belligerent nature. This monster is very dangerous. Be careful.

name: Snowbaron II: Capture
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. A Snowbaron Lagombi is in the Arctic Ridge and the Wycademy wants it captured. Make sure you're equipped to capture it before starting.

name: Snowbaron III: Hunt
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. Two Snowbaron Lagombi have been sighted in the Arctic Ridge and must be hunted. This is an extremely dangerous Quest, so stay sharp.

name: Snowbaron IV: Hunt
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. We need you to hunt a Snowbaron Lagombi in the Frozen Seaway. Be warned: This specimen may be stronger than any you've faced thus far.

name: Snowbaron V: Hunt
goal_text: Hunt a Snowbaron Lagombi and a Bulldrome
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. Your main target is the Snowbaron Lagombi that appeared in the Arctic Ridge. A Bulldrome rampaging in the same area also needs to be taken out.

name: Snowbaron VI: Hunt
goal_text: Hunt 2 before time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: This Quest is for hunters with Special Permits. There have been reports of multiple Snowbaron Lagombi in the Frozen Seaway. Alleviate the threat by hunting at least two of them.
