name: Bloodbath EX: Hunt
flavor_text: This Quest is reserved for only the most trusted Wycademy hunters. We have confirmed reports of a Bloodbath Diablos on Ingle Isle. I must warn you that this beast is far worse than others of its kind. Steel yourself. It won't be easy.

name: Prowler's First Errand
flavor_text: My! Why, aren't you a cutie! Tough as any hunter, you say? I see... In that case, could I trouble you to bring me some Unique Ferns from the Jurassic Frontier? Good luck, dear!

name: Jurassic Fungologist
flavor_text: You like kinoko? Jumbo Village love kinoko! Villagers ask Neko to gather Abyssal Mushrooms from Jurassic Frontier. Saa! Do me this favor and kinoko trade get better, too! "Kinoko" means mushroom!

name: Lucky Frontier Cat
flavor_text: Ah, a Prowler! You came at the right time! Would you be willing to collect me some points in the Jurassic Frontier? Deliver whatever items you like. Oughta be a breeze for you, eh?

name: Verdant Hills Bully
flavor_text: I refuse to stand by and see my precious Felynes bullied! Oh, I'm talking about those cursed Melynx running amok. If you can help me out, I'll teach you how to easily employ more Felynes!

name: Lucky Hills Cat
flavor_text: Ah, my good Prowler friend! I've had nothing but good luck since our last little encounter. Now, I need you to collect points in the Verdant Hills. Deliver any items you like. Oughta be a breeze for you!

name: The Mining Drag
flavor_text: Girl, this Balmstone Piece smells something FIERCE. If I had more, I could carry them around as perfume and REALLY work it! Get some for me, would you? Good luck, and DON'T screw it up!

name: Felyne Fishing Weekly
flavor_text: We Felynes love fishing, but we need to purrform more studies if we want to discover the secrets of fishing and share them with the world! Those big pink Premium Sashimi should be purrfect for our research!

name: Grooming the Moofahs
flavor_text: Okay, just a little off the...ack! Cutting Moofah fur is like trying to trim a hairball! Do me a solid and show me how you deal with it! ...You DO have a Cutting weapon, don't you? Every good fur stylist needs one!

name: Bug Reports
goal_text: Slay a total of 10 Vespoid or Hornetaur
flavor_text: Saikin, lately, Marshlands filled with giant insects. Ruining seinokei, ecosystem of Moga Village! Get rid of bugs, they ask. Come with Neko to turn the mushi into mush! "Mushi" means bug!

name: Great Maccao Headbreaker
flavor_text: Hey, how about a friendly little competition? Let's see if either of us can wound the head of one of those gaudy Great Maccao! If you succeed, then I'll teach you how to hire more Palicoes!

name: Dash It All
flavor_text: No matter how many times a Bullfango charges me, I can never evade it. And I'm not lion, I'm trying real hard! I just turn around, and run straight! What am I doing wrong!?

name: An Offer You Can't Refuse
flavor_text: Hey, Prowler. You'll help a kit in need, right? I need a Gargwa Egg. Why? 'Claws I said so! Less talkin', more egg-straction! Here's a tip: poke it from behind, and maybe it'll leave an egg for ya. I'm countin' on you!

name: The Secret Ingredient
flavor_text: The secret to cooking is to waste as little time as possible and blast everything at high heat! Then, just top it with my secret ingredient... What? I'm out of stock!? Please, get me some more!

name: Marshlands Fishing?
flavor_text: Tanzia Market have freshest sakana. "Sakana" means fish! Shikashi! But! If you scout out good fishing spots, we ensure good supply! Sure to make trade for oishii fish improve, too! "Oishii" means tasty!

name: Arctic Point Expedition
flavor_text: I found the cutest Felynes, dear! But first they want some points, I fear. If you can help with Point collection then we'll have better Scout selection!

name: Blood Red Marshlands
flavor_text: Prowler, heed my request! There's an Iodrome in the Marshlands I've been hunting, but a gang of Ioprey keep getting in the way! Do you think you could lend me a hand out there?

name: An Offer You Can't Relieve
flavor_text: Hey, Prowler! You'll help a kit in need, right? I need a Wyvern Egg! Little dangerous, but that's purr for the course for you, nya? That egg should be nutritious enough to... Uh, nevermind! Just get that egg!

name: Uroktor Hide 'n Seek
flavor_text: I was playing hide-and-seek at the Volcano when Uroktor burst from the ground -- talk about a surpurrise! Luckily, I burrowed before they could see me. If you run into trouble, be sure to hide as soon as possible!

name: Into the Volcano
flavor_text: Ugh... I took this job, but I'm having a little trouble finishing it. Help me out? Remobras hate loud noises, so use that to your advantage. Also... They're ravenous carnivores. Good luck!

name: Kut-Ku Earbreaker
flavor_text: Was delivering new trade cart when spotted by Yian Kut-Ku! Prowler, find dishonorable beast and attack its big mimi! "Mimi" means ears! Then Neko can finally deliver new cart to help with trade! Yakusoku!

name: The Right Cattitude
flavor_text: Wow! That talent! It's hard to believe you're a Felyne like me! Maybe you could handle an Arzuros, too? Nah... No way just a Felyne could take one of those on... Huh? You'll try it!? My hero!

name: D. Hermitaur Shellbreaker
flavor_text: Hey, how about a friendly little competition? Let's see if either of us can smash the shell of a Daimyo Hermitaur! I'll even give you a tip: try mounting it first! If you win, I'll give you some more tips!

name: Surrounded by Blue and Green
flavor_text: Shimatta... Was delivering new cart when fell victim to cowardly kougeki. "Kougeki" means attack! Prowler, get rid of dishonorable beasts and Neko give beloved cart for kind help! Yakusoku!

name: Poison and Fangs
goal_text: Hunt a Bulldrome and an Iodrome
flavor_text: I found some Felynes strong and wise. I'm sure they'd make for great allies! Go forth to aid them without pause and maybe then they'll join our cause!

name: Prowler's Second Errand
flavor_text: My! I hear you're taking on ever more difficult Quests, young Prowler. Well done, well done! Do you think you could take on another one from me? Word has it there are Tall Mushrooms up at the Ruined Pinnacle. Bring a few back for me, there's a dear!

name: Conga Line
flavor_text: Hello there, Prowler! You've come right in time to purrovide help! A herd of Conga are blocking the way through the Jurassic Furontier. Do you think you could thin their numbers and open it up? Mates' rates, right, furiend?

name: Dashing Velocidrome
flavor_text: Huh, what? Another hint for how to employ Felynes is that what you want? Haha! Well, maybe you need to prove your worth on the battlefield again, no? Go hunt a Velocidrome in the Primal Forest, then I'll tell you want you want to hear!

name: Eggcellent Surprise
flavor_text: Nya! Prowler! I need you to get something fur me! Herbivore Eggs! OK? Why, you ask? I'm secretly making a gift fur my brother who nursed me back to health! Can you help?

name: Cold-Blooded Giadrome
flavor_text: I spotted a herd of Giaprey led by two Giadrome up here at the Arctic Ridge. I nervously weighed up whether I could take them on, but in the end I chickened out. So much for peace, though -- they attacked me! Help!

name: Picturesque Pinnacle
goal_text: Slay a total of 20 Konchu or Altaroth
flavor_text: I worked so hard to reach the Ruined Pinnacle and take in the beauty of its view. My heart was purified. However, the tranquility was ruined by those horrible Konchu and Altaroth. Slay them, slay them all! I must be allowed to enjoy the view in peace!

name: Congalala Crestbreaker
flavor_text: I found a young man in the Primal Forest, who told me he wanted a Congalala crest. If you help me get one, I'll let you see, some more furry friends chosen specially by me!

name: Innocent Curiosity
flavor_text: Nya... They're a little tingly, but Great Thunderbugs are so purretty, don't you think? One thing I don't get, though: how do they spurrkle like that? Hunt as many as you can and let meow know what you find out!

name: A Poison Paradise
goal_text: Hunt a Volvidon and an Iodrome
flavor_text: Now just where am I going to get fresh paralytic fluid and toxin from? If only a Volvidon and an Iodrome showed up at the Volcano right now and some incredibly helpful hunter decided to go hunt them down for me. Ah well. Oh, didn't see you there. Don't mind me.

name: Lucky Dunes Cat
flavor_text: Are you the lucky Prowler I've been told about? I don't really believe in luck, but whatever. He said you're the real deal. Please deliver some goods for me. Um, anything from the Dunes will do, I guess. Whatever you feel like delivering!

name: Basarios Chestbreaker
flavor_text: Hey, care to play a little game? I call it "Breaking Basarios". Basically, you have to smash a Basarios's chest plate, and you win if you survive. A free tip: you'll probably find it easier if you mount it. Win the game, and I'll share some more great tips with you!

name: Lucky Hills Cat
flavor_text: Hello Prowler! Recently I really feel like fortune is smiling on me. Maybe I should be more open to superstition, haha! Anyway, I have a request for you. Could you make a delivery in the Verdant Hills? Deliver...whatever. Just whatever items you like!

name: Ludroth Lunacy
flavor_text: Why are there so many Ludroth here all of a sudden? Did we do something to attract them? Did...did I do something to attract them? Are they...in love with me? Am...am I in love...with THEM? THIS IS TERRIBLE! Please, make them go away!

name: Duramboros Humpbreaker
flavor_text: Still interested in breaking body parts, brah? Good, good, that's what I like to hear. How about we tackle a Duramboros hump next? Try not to get distracted by its big, juicy tail -- just topple it and get that hump!

name: Snow Festival
goal_text: Hunt a Giadrome and a Lagombi
flavor_text: Brrrr! I am COLD. I can't feel my toes anymore... Getting lost in the Frozen Seaway was bad enough, but two great stinking monsters popped up out of nowhere and attacked! I tried to hit back at them but I ended up getting frozen like a popsicle. Help!

name: Drome Rush!
flavor_text: I'd found a helper, I was sure -- but he found the Arena held more allure. If you do his Quest and hunt the foes, maybe it will help my woes.

name: Dance: The Final Frontier
flavor_text: I wish to hold a ball in the Jurassic Frontier, but some ruffians have crashed the venue, and their clothes are simply atrocious... Ooh, I can't stand it! Would you be a darling and drive them off?

name: Taste the Mountains
flavor_text: For today's menu, Mountain Herbal Soup! Highly nourishing and purromotes good blood circulation. Now, it's quite easy to make, but I do need lots of Mountain Herbs. Meow get moving!

name: Lucky Mountain Cat
flavor_text: Ah, my good Prowler friend! It must be fate that brought us together again! This time, I want you to collect points in the Misty Peaks. Deliver whatever items you like. Oughta be a breeze for you, eh?

name: Running with the Night
flavor_text: I'm studying the nighttime ecology of the Jurassic Frontier, but some Rhenoplos keep getting in my way. Can you help me? They like to charge foes, so try luring them into walls to stun them!

name: A Cricket to Love
flavor_text: Hi there, Prowler! Seen any Silver Crickets around here? No? Aww... I hear there are tons of them on the Deserted Island, but my parents won't let me go on my own... Can you go and get some for me!?

name: A Resplendent Dance
flavor_text: We've secured the venue for our ball, but alas, I have yet to find my partner... Ah, you there! Would you join me for a dance? My, what large feathers yo-- a Great Maccao!? Help!

name: Hot Scales & Sharp Pincers
goal_text: Slay a total of 15 Ceanataurs or Uroktor
flavor_text: I took a request to take out some Ceanataurs, but once I got there, the place was full of Uroktor as well! I don't really care which, but can you help me thin out their numbers a bit? Please! I need your help!

name: There's Always Room for Fish
flavor_text: Oh... I'm so hungry I could eat a Plesioth! But I'd be satisfied with some smaller fish... Could you bring me some? Preferably Goldenfish! Their golden scales are so purrty, I bet they taste pawsitively delightful!

name: Out of the Frying Pan
flavor_text: Aaand the challenger... A Prowler!? Cute! Daring! Not afraid of a Bulldrome, eh? How about going toe to toe with an Arzuros right after? No?

name: The Grandmeowster's Trials
flavor_text: As Meowster of Moves, the time has come for me to give you the ultimate test. Muster all your strength! Show no weakness! Now go, and do me purroud!

name: We Cat All Be Heroes
flavor_text: To a Palico, there's nothing cooler than a Seltas. Just seeing one gives me the chills! You think you're tougher than a Seltas? Purr-lease! If you really think so, go purrove it!

name: Fois Gras Faux Pas
flavor_text: You can't cook a meal without the proper ingredients! And the ones we need today come from sand monsters... What are we making with the ingredients? No idea! I'll figure that out once you get them!

name: Splash in the Moonlight
flavor_text: Ahh, perfect weather for a romantic evening with my beloved, just the two of... Huh!? Where did these Ludroth come from!? Don't worry darling, I'll bring back help!

name: Calm, Cool, and Collected
flavor_text: Purrhaps they don't scare hunters much, but we find them apawling! There're bigger beasts out there, but the sight of them pouncing on poor little Felynes is just pawful! Please, get rid of them for us!

name: Kecha Wacha Earbreaker
flavor_text: Sure, you're decent at targeting body parts, but you could still learn a thing or two from "the Partbreaker"! For practice, try smashing some Kecha Wacha ears! 'Course, you can't reach 'em while it's hanging on vines!

name: Fish On!
flavor_text: Whoa! I finally caught the big ones -- two whole Silverfish! Hm? Why ya looking at me like that? You may like fish, but you'll never beat my record. Let's see if you can catch three of them at the Deserted Island!

name: Lucky Volcano Cat
flavor_text: Ah, my favorite Prowler! Fate brings us together once more! I want to ask you to collect points at the Volcanic Hollow. Deliver whatever items you like. Oughta be a breeze for you, eh?

name: Under the Blazing Sun
flavor_text: The Dunes are home to Felynes bold, yet proud and fierce, if truth be told. Aiding them with this hunt, I expect, will be more than enough to earn their respect!

name: Everywhere You Look
flavor_text: Yikes! What are those things!? Twins? I thought I was seeing double! Even if you can catch them on their own, they'll call the little ones and purrolong the fight. At any rate, don't get in over your whiskers!

name: Malfestio Headbreaker
flavor_text: Hey, brah! Smashin' tons of parts lately? See those scales everywhere? Guess no one told Malfestio not to litter. So smash it in the head 'til it gets the message! If you can't get close, use your 'rang, brah!

name: The Snow Must Go On
flavor_text: I went to the Frozen Seaway in search of some flowers, but when I found them, a giant bunny kept tossing snowballs at me! The flowers are too delicate for such violence! Put a stop to it!

name: Big Bro's Benevolence
flavor_text: Hey, just the Prowler I need! That egg you got me did the trick! My adorable lil' sis... she's all better! Now that she's Felyne fine, I wanna give her rare stones as a purresent. Only the best for my sis!

name: The Ball's in Your Court
flavor_text: Hey, Prowler! I've got the perfect job for you. All you've got to do is play with this ball. It's not yarn, but I promise you it's just as fun! I've made all the preparations. Now, go enjoy yourself!

name: Uragaan Shellbreaker
flavor_text: Hey, brah! Smashin' tons of parts lately? You must be itchin' for a real challenge, so try rockin' a rock-solid Uragaan head! Tough even for pro bros like me, but try bustin' out some bombs!

name: Poison, Poison, Go Away
flavor_text: And now for the weather in the Frozen Seaway. The fair skies take a turn for the worse as Remobras cloud the skies and bring a chance of poison showers. Don't forget your umbrella!

name: Meownster Hunter
flavor_text: The time has come to test your skills. Remember what I have taught you, commit your body and soul to this challenge, and overcome your limits. Now go, and do me purr-oud!

name: Bnahabra in the Stomach
flavor_text: The wings! They're so loud, I can hear them even meow! The Ruined Pinnacle is full of the purrvasive sound of Bnahabra! It just sets my fur on end! How about you have a little extermination party?

name: Lucky Steppe Cat
flavor_text: Ohhh, you're the prowler who does requests, right? Perfect. Anyway, I'm sorry this is a little short notice, but could you do something for me in the Ancestral Steppe? Just a delivery. Of what? Oh, I don't know. What do you want to deliver? Just pick any old thing!

name: Desert Furrontier
flavor_text: Prowler, we're in need of a helping paw! We've managed to corner a pack of Genprey, but they've turned out to be more furrocious than we expected. Can you help us out and hunt them down before they break out and start rampaging?

name: Primal Furrontier
flavor_text: Prowler, once again we're in need of your purrowess to help us out. We've been playing cat-and-mouse with some Congas and they're finally good and cornered, but we need that last bit of oomph to win the day. Think you've got time for a hunt?

name: Thank-You Gift
flavor_text: I want to go collecting! And I know just what I want to purrocure! There's a special mushroom in the Verdant Hills, and I want some! I'll fry them with eggs and make a delicious breakfast for my favorite littermate! Purrlease say you'll find some for me!

name: Royal Ludroth Manebreaker
flavor_text: What up, brah! How's your part-smashin' game? Feelin' good about it? Hey, you ever tried a royal smash? It's a blast, brah. Find a Royal Ludroth and just smash its mane like there's no tomorrow. Seriously, take your Boomerang and give it a bash, brah.

name: Laughter is Not the Best Antidote
flavor_text: GAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA! I went into a hunt in the Marshlands unprepared and just as I thought, the place was full of poison! Gahaha, poison central! I was supposed to take care of an Iodrome but really, that poison! Gahahaha! Would you mind hunting in my place?

name: Volcano Furrontier
goal_text: Slay a total of 18 Ceanataurs or Uroktor
flavor_text: You purrobably know the drill by meow, Hunter, but we need to ask you for help again. This time it's Uroktor and Ceanataurs. It seemed like a good idea at the time! Anyway, we're really hoping to have the last laugh on this one, so...help? Purrlease?

name: Lucky Jungle Cat
flavor_text: Oh, it's the lucky Prowler again. If you believe in such things. Luck, I mean. Obviously, I believe in Prowlers... Anyway, will you do me a favor? I'm so in love with the Jungle recently, so will you make a delivery there for me? Just deliver whatever, it's not important.

name: Nerscylla Hidebreaker
flavor_text: How's the part-breaking going, brah? Great! That's excellent to hear. Next up I think you should tackle a Nerscylla. Mount it or use a Boomerang, that's my advice to a fellow breaker! Hope you're not afraid of spiders! Haha...ha ha...ha...*shudder*.

name: Lagiacrus Headbreaker
flavor_text: I found a boy, but he just said "Lagiacrus! Break its head!" Would it be too much to ask for you to take this violent task?

name: Ninjadromes
flavor_text: Using the snow as cover for their hostile incursions? These beasts have more guile than I gave them credit for. Almost ninja-like in their cunning! I fear you will need all your wits to take them out, Prowler.

name: Seltas Spat
flavor_text: Y'know, Prowler, even husbands out in nature have it tough. The other day, in the Jurassic Frontier, I saw a poor Seltas being literally manipulated by his wife. I believed in love, Prowler! Tell me it gets better than this! Listen, how about you hunt that Seltas for me?

name: Gravios Backbreaker
flavor_text: Hey brah! Still smashin' those parts? That's what we like to hear! I think you're ready to take on some Gravios armor! Even I have trouble with this one -- no, no, it's true! Just try and mount it and see what happens, that's my best advice to you, brah.

name: Meownster Hunter Ultimate
flavor_text: I have nothing left to teach you. My part in your journey may be over, but I have no doubt that you will continue to improve and climb higher and higher. So go! Go and show the world what a real Prowler can do!

name: Grudge Match: Great Maccao
flavor_text: To think, lil' Greenhorn taking on a Great Maccao! I'm moved... Just like YOU should do when a Great Maccao tries to jump-kick you in the face! Support: Fighting, Protection, Healing, Bombing, Gathering

name: Grudge Match: Gypceros
flavor_text: This time, you're up against a Gypceros! Be careful: They're clever, and will sometimes play dead. Don't end up as monster chow! That's an order! Support: Charisma, Fighting, Protection, Healing, Gathering

name: Grudge Match: Bird Wyverns
goal_text: Slay a Gendrome and an Iodrome
flavor_text: All right, Greenhorn! You're up against not one, but TWO Bird Wyverns that use Poison and Paralysis! Shaking in your boots? If so, bring a friend! Support: Charisma, Fighting, Healing, Bombing, Gathering

name: Grudge Match: Barroth
flavor_text: Looking to push yourself beyond your limits? Then try this Barroth on for size! If the mud bothers you, you should be upping your Palico Skill game! Support: Charisma, Protection, Assisting, Bombing, Beast

name: Grudge Match: Tetsucabra
flavor_text: Want to ensure your legend lives on forever? Then just take down this Tetsucabra and your wish will be granted! Keep an eye on your foe to spot shortcuts to victory! Support: Fighting, Assisting, Healing, Gathering, Beast

name: Grudge Match: Congalala
flavor_text: Ever wanted to show off your full strength regardless of all propriety? The Congalala knows how you feel! This fragrant foe has many aromatic advantages, so use your head! Support: Charisma, Protection, Assisting, Bombing, Beast

name: A Season for Lava
goal_text: Hunt 2 before time expires or deliver a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: Hehehe! This is quite the haul! A group of Uragaan've shown up near the Volcano! We can pick 'em off at our leisure! Although, there're a few too many for me to face alone. Think ya can give me a hand?

name: Crows: The Black Crows
flavor_text: There's some weirdos makin' trouble in this area. I don't care why they're here, they just need to get gone! Think you can do somethin' 'bout it? If you do, I might give you somethin' good.

name: Yowamushi Pedal: Princess
flavor_text: I can't deliver this jersey to its destination with these large beasts in my way! Please, Hunter! Take care of them and clear a path for me so I can get moving again! I beg of you!

name: Baki: Biggest vs. Strongest
flavor_text: In the red corner, we have the Immovable Mountain: the one and only Gammoth! And from the blue corner we have the brave hunter who refuses to lose! Our winner will receive a fabulous prize, so good luck!

name: CoroCoro: Rolling Bowlers
flavor_text: It's so fascinating to see these monsters rolling about. And just as I was thinking how grand it would be to see three of them at once, here they are! If you're able to hunt these monsters, I'll give you a special present.

name: Ushio & Tora: White Mizutsune
flavor_text: I'm smelling the worst smell from somewhere... It doesn't seem to be coming from a monster, but it stinks nonetheless. Think you could go deal with it for me? Oh, and if you could remove this spear for me, that'd be great.

name: Magi: Rescue from the Fall
flavor_text: There's an evil force about... The darkness is encroaching upon him. But it's okay! With your help, we'll be able to keep him from harm. Now, let us work together to dispel the darkness!

name: The Exploding Flame King
flavor_text: This Quest should really fire you up! Teostra: cloaked in flame, it burns everything in its path... Phew! If you can beat the heat, I'll reward you with an item that'll let you forge some special gear!

name: Yu-Gi-Oh: A Beautiful Wyvern
flavor_text: It's time for the final match... This dragon is quite strong, but you've got the unbreakable bonds of friendship on your side! Now, get ready... It's time to d-d-d-duel!

name: Jump: Boiling Magma
flavor_text: A Hyper Lavasioth is a worthy opponent indeed. We pirates tend to be at our best when we face a powerful foe. If you pass our little test, we'll give you a ticket for making some legendary pirate weapons!

name: Famitsu: Mizutsune Feature
flavor_text: The Editorial Department here heard about a new monster resembling a fox, and we'd like for you to get some info on it. Oh, you'll need to hunt it too, naturally! We'll reward you with materials for new weapons!

name: Dengeki: Turbulent Seas
flavor_text: Here's a little challenge from the Dengeki editors! The target: a Hyper Lagiacrus, in all of its electric fury! If you manage to avoid a shocking defeat, you'll receive a ticket good for making a brand new weapon!

name: Uniqlo Shock Fest
flavor_text: I've come up with the perfect idea for a look that's stylish AND casual! Getting the materials may be a bit of a challenge, but if you can help me, we'll shock the fashion world!

name: Star Fox: Battle at Arctic Ridge
flavor_text: This is Star Fox! I've spotted a Hyper Monster near the Arctic Ridge! However, this sector is unstable and I'm unable to land. I need you to get in there and neutralize it. You'll be properly rewarded! Good luck!

name: The Three Virtues
flavor_text: A large number of big baddies have come crawlin' out and are causin' quite the commotion! We need yer wisdom, strength, and courage to drive off these scoundrels! We'll make it worth yer while with a special item!

name: Metroid: Special Mission
flavor_text: Something is plotting to steal the galaxy's most powerful weapon! Scanning... That beak, that ominous purple skin... Could it be!? Please, Hunter! Hurry to the Volcanic Hollow before it's too late!

name: The Steel Vanguard
flavor_text: Can you hear me...? A force bent on tearing the world asunder is closing in. Stand tall against this deliverer of chaos, and grant this great land eternal peace.

name: The Voracious King
flavor_text: Can you hear me...? An evil has awakened, threatening to plunge the world into darkness. Stand tall against this devourer of light, and grant this great land eternal glory.

name: DMC: The Seltas Queen's Cry
flavor_text: Hey, can you hear that? One of the monsters fled that way. Well, I guess it's not really much of a monster, more of a bug, actually. Anyways, if you can take care of it for me, I'll be sure to make it worth your while.

name: Mega Man: Yellow Devil
flavor_text: The Royal Ludroth is a royal pain. Every time a hunter gets rid of one, it seems another pops up in its place. Reminds me of a certain evil scientist. No matter how many times he's defeated, he keeps coming back!

name: Capcom: Brilliant Orchestra
flavor_text: I have THE WORST writer's block right now. I want to compose a song that depicts the emotion of a hunt, but I have zero inspi- ration. I bet if I saw you in action, the notes would come pouring out of my pen.

name: Felyne Village: The Tourney
flavor_text: Nya, nya, nya, nya, nya! I'm here to give you a super cool deluxe purresent! Although, nothing comes for furree! You need to win the little hunting tournament we're purrlanning! Now, let's get started, nya!

name: Fan Club: Great All Stars
flavor_text: Hey, buddy! There's nothing like takin' on the best of the best in a little tussle! Better yet, you'll get an item that lets you make special weapons and armor! I'm so glad I joined the MH Fan Club! Best decision I ever made!

name: Fan Club: Remobra Removal
flavor_text: Hello, everybody! Our foe this time around is a large pack of Remobras! Once you've taken 'em out, I'll give you an item that you can trade for some special MH Fan Club armor! Good hunting!

name: Capcom: White & Black
flavor_text: A group posing as us showed up in the Misty Peaks and totally wrecked the place! What'll we do if people think it's us!? We're begging you, Hunter! Help us out and we'll give you a special ticket as a present!

name: Capcom: The Ruler's Rage
flavor_text: A wyvern that once attacked my kingdom has returned, causing the land to tremble beneath it as it strikes without warning. I need your strength, brave hunter. Please slay this beast and restore peace to the land!

name: Moonlit Tryst
goal_text: Hunt a Silver Rathalos and a Gold Rathian
flavor_text: The time is ripe! We are having a large banquet tonight! Come forth, you reckless hunters! The moon demands fresh blood! Do what you can to survive this night of madness and revelry!

name: Raging Twins
flavor_text: H-H-Hey! What are you doing? I absolutely, positively, WOULD NOT go in there, if I were you. There are not one, but TWO Rajang in there. Hey! Did you even here what I said? Two of them, you crazy bat!

name: All's Hair in Glove & War
flavor_text: I am absolutely LIVID right now. I JUST ordered a set of gloves made from quality hair, when what do I see but even BETTER hair on a Hyper Rajang! I won't stand for it! Get me that hair!

name: A Golden Moon Rises
flavor_text: Maah bah baaaah brah baaaaah bah bah baaaah. Meh meh... Ba-baaah baaaah bah... Braah braah brah bah bah♪ Mah Mah, brah bah bah♪ (Message by Carrier Moofah)

name: Silver and Gold
goal_text: Hunt a Silver Rathalos and a Gold Rathian
flavor_text: Two Hyper Raths are roaming about in the Forlorn Arena. It is a thing of beauty to see them in their many-colored splendor. I do not think you could ask for a better stage to raise the curtain on this majestic tale of war.

name: Secret Nibelsnarf Hunt
flavor_text: Day in and day out, I dream of a glorious victory against a monster. Alas, father is not having any of it. *sigh* Well, don't let that Hyper Nibelsnarf in the Dunes go to waste...

name: The Obvious Choice...
flavor_text: Shhh... Don't make any noise! We want to observe it in its natural habitat undisturbed... Ah, what a unique specimen. I doubt we'll ever find another one like it!

name: It Would Be a Shame If...
flavor_text: Would you just look at it... Take it all in... To think, a specimen such as this has gone THIS long without being hunted. Well, I can only think of one thing to do... Go get it Hunter!

name: Not Stepping One Foot...
flavor_text: What was THAT all about? Look, I know ol' Brachy, and what I just saw was totally weird. Something had it all worked up, and I'm not even getting close enough to find out what it was. That's what I've got YOU for!

name: Picturesque Encounter
flavor_text: Picture it: a Hyper Zinogre in the Frozen Seaway, locked in an epic struggle against a powerful hunter... Wouldn't that make an amazing piece? Of course it would! Go make it happen, wouldja?

name: Absolute Power
flavor_text: As if those things could get any more aggressive, this Tigrex seems especially amped up. Our walls are useless against them. You must stop it before it lays waste to everything in its path!

name: A Land Draped in Fantasy
flavor_text: Is there anybody willing to face the majestic Kirin that has just manifested in the Forlorn Arena? Nothing has prepared you for the likes of this beast. If you wish to experience a land filled with dreams, please step forth.

name: The Formless One
flavor_text: Numerous observers have found signs of a Chameleos around the Forlorn Arena. The Guild has also received reports of people being hit with poison from an unseen foe. Hunter, please investigate these strange incidents.

name: The White God Returns
flavor_text: Lately, in the deepest reaches of the polar region, the earth has been shaking tremendously. The people fear the very ground will open up and swallow them whole. Their fears may become reality if something is not done.

name: Evil Descendeth Upon Us
flavor_text: From the heavens descended a being bathed in light from a sacred mountain. With it, came a storm that plunged the world into calamity. Someone, deliver us from this evil, lest we exist in darkness forever.

name: Where Gods Fear to Tread
flavor_text: Long time, no see, hunters. I've prepared a test for you all. This day your opponent is an Alatreon. Which will emerge victorious in battle, you? Or the beast feared by the very heavens themselves!?

name: Harbinger of Death
flavor_text: I've received an urgent request from the Wycademy. It seems that another Nakarkos has been spotted in Wyvern's End. I'd like to avoid a situation like before. Hunter you must face and defeat that Nakarkos!

name: No Party Poopers!
flavor_text: I'm throwing a party featuring some of my very favorite pets. I'm bringing a Kecha Wacha, Blangonga, and a Rajang to the fray! Don't come to this throwdown if you ain't gonna throw down!

name: The Five Kings of Destruction
flavor_text: And so it begins! Having honed their fangs over the years, five masters of disaster have just appeared near the Forlorn Arena. Will they prove to be the end of you, or will you overcome them and be the ultimate hunter!?

name: How It's Done
flavor_text: My home's constantly in danger, meaning lot's of kids grow up to be hunters. Unfortunately, there aren't any master hunters around to train the newcomers how to hunt Hyper Monsters. Care to show them the ropes?

name: Unbridled Rage
flavor_text: As a hunter, you gotta know your limit. For me, ol' Deviljho is mine. That crazy pickle just about did me in on more than one occasion. I heard some nutty hunter is gonna take on two of 'em today.

name: Insanity and Destruction
goal_text: Hunt a Deviljho and a Rajang
flavor_text: Recently, I've been wondering about something... You hunters always carry out my requests without hesitation, but I am curious as to the extent of your strength. I've prepared a little test to see what you can do!

name: Volcano Item Delivery
flavor_text: Hey, you there! Yo know what they say about idle hands... Don't just sit on 'em, go to the Volcano and gather us some Account Items. Don't matter what, just make sure you put 'em in the Delivery Box!

name: Anything For a Buck
flavor_text: One of my biggest clients came to me with a request. She saw a Great Maccao and just HAD to have its hide as a throw rug... Weird, but business is business. Help a guy out?

name: A Mammoth Mistake
flavor_text: Gammoths are so cute and cuddly! Least I thought so 'til I tried to hug one. It attacked me and now I can't even move my arms. I just wanted some wooley lovin'! Why's it gotta be so cold?

name: The Untamed Mountains
goal_text: Hunt a Duramboros and a Gammoth
flavor_text: One is a great peak covered in moss and spins like a tornado, while the other is covered in snow and buffeted by gusts of wind. Conquer these two peaks and you will never fear another mountain again.

name: The Best of the Best
flavor_text: There is nothing left to say. If you wish to claim the title of the strongest hunter, you must go forth and forge your own path to glory. Destiny waits for no one, Hunter!

name: The Greatest Hunter
flavor_text: Want to be a part of hunting history? Think you got what it takes to face all of the most popular monsters in a row? Prove yourself and your name will echo within the hall of legends!

name: Retreat Run-in
flavor_text: I set up this place to celebrate the health and happiness of my beloved children, but it's been overrun by monsters! I need you to go out there and strike them down with the ferocity of a dragon!

name: Overcome with Awe
flavor_text: Hunter, I don't think I've ever seen anybody hunt with as much style and grace as you! I am hoping that you will put your superior skills on display in the Arena! It truly is an honor to meet you!

name: The Hammer and the Pike
goal_text: Hunt an Uragaan and an Agnaktor
flavor_text: The Princess just set out for the Arena, saying something about becoming a hunter! The palace guards went after her, but they're no match for any monster! Please hunter, get them before they get her!

name: Jump: The Desert Crown
flavor_text: Legend says that in the great sand sea of the Dunes slumbers a precious crown. But watch for the mud attacks that follow it. That crown is your "ticket" to making some legendary pirate weapons!

name: Strider: Frozen Mission
flavor_text: This is headquarters. Your mission: hunt a Deviljho. Your reward, should you prove successful: some sweet duds. Don't forget: it's either hunt or be hunted. Now, get to work.

name: The Legend of Zelda: Power
flavor_text: Adventurer, you have done well to reach this place. If you pass my trial of power, I shall bestow upon you the means to acquire a weapon of great potency.

name: Fire Emblem: Warding Despair
flavor_text: A silver wyvern is wreaking destruction. It's horrible... It's as though we were under the tyranny of the Shadow Dragon once more. Lend us your strength, Hunter, and as reward I will lend you mine!

name: Okami: Most Wanted
flavor_text: Some monster that looks just like Nechku is causin' a mess out there... Heh, what're you sharpening your weapon for? You think you can take it, eh? Well then, show me what you got, Hunter!

name: Ghosts 'n Goblins: Seeing Red
flavor_text: I have to save the princess, but that RED demon is in my way again... If only I weren't turned into a frog, I'd spear him in a second! If anyone out there can help me out, I'll make sure you're rewarded!

name: Case Closed: Desert Arrest!
flavor_text: The monster thought to be at the center of a spate of nasty incidents absconded to the Desert. Fierce resistance is expected, but we must take it alive!

name: Kingdom: Test of the Best!
flavor_text: I heard that the strongest being in this land was some giant crab. Are you not a hunter? Will you stand for that? Go beat him! Prove your worth! Show me that nothing under heaven will stop you!

name: Shonen: Winged Nocturne
flavor_text: Do you like Malfestio, the night flier with wings like deep starry skies? Yeah? Then get out on the Jurassic Frontier, hunt the night away, and I'll give you an item to help forge some special gear!

name: Drifters: Isle of Lost Souls
flavor_text: The hunt is the true measure of a man. The culmination of all his actions and desires. Show me your hunting prowess, and take no item into battle with you. I want to see only your wits and your strength!

name: Famitsu: Kecha the Scoop!
flavor_text: After hearing about a rampant Kecha Wacha at the Vertical Slayground, our editing team rushed over to get the deets, only to find ourselves under attack! Help us and we'll give you exclusive weapon tickets!

subquest.goal_text: Wound Kecha Wacha's claws and tail

name: Dengeki: Top of Old Sparky
flavor_text: We at Dengeki would like to challenge you to hunt the mystical Kirin at the newly discovered Ruined Pinnacle! Clear our ELECTRIC Quest and we'll give you tickets to really make some sparks fly!

name: The Legend of Zelda: Courage
flavor_text: Adventurer, you have done well to reach this place. If you pass my trial of courage, I shall bestow upon you the means to acquire armor to match your gallantry.

subquest.goal_text: Wound K.Daora's wings and sever its tail

name: Into the Maw of Darkness
flavor_text: Got a little job for ya from the den: a Hyper Zinogre. It's a real tough cookie with a wicked aura, like a Makai Knight. Are you the Golden Knight or aren't ya? C'mon, cut that guy down to size!

name: Fan Club: Climbing The Ranks
flavor_text: Greetings, underling! So you think you can slack off, eh? How the blazes are you gonna beat G-rank Quests with that attitude!? Time for a test. Go beat a Hyper Lagiacrus and I might just promote you!

name: URGENT: COAL MINERS NEEDED
goal_text: Deliver 10 pieces of Coal or a Paw Pass Ticket
flavor_text: -- JOB AVAILABLE -- Delivery of coal from Volcanic Hollow. Job ends once required amount is delivered. Bonus reward for extra items beyond required amount. CAUTION: Harsh conditions. We take no responsibility for any injuries.

name: Frozen Free-For-All
goal_text: Hunt a Zamtrios and a Tetsucabra
flavor_text: I haven't seen my brother in days. Not since he went to the Frozen Seaway to fish... A fisherman told me he saw him, but he also mentioned a Zamtrios and a Tetsucabra having an earth- shaking fight. That means my brother's somewhere in the middle! Help!

name: Nerscylla Nightmare
flavor_text: Here at the Slayground today I'm proud to present our Terrible Twosome! One's a Hyper Nerscylla, the other's...also a Hyper Nerscylla! If you're a fan of dark auras and giant creepy-crawlies, then you're gonna love facing these two!

name: It'll Come Out in the Wash
flavor_text: Hunter, we've got a stellar lineup for you, with all kinds of abnormal status fun! We've got mud, poison, and my personal favorite: FARTING! Everything to make a hunt really interesting! So...yeah, better pack some Deodorant, eh?

name: "My Love is Like a Chill Wind...?"
flavor_text: This amazing girl saved me from being stranded in the Arctic Ridge... Now I need to find her and confess my love for her! Girls like when you do that in the snow, right? We just need some privacy from the monsters, okay? I hope the ring is the right size...

name: A Solid Argument
goal_text: Hunt a Basarios and a Gravios
flavor_text: You know, I look at the rocky armor on Basarios and Gravios and I just think, "Man, nature can be so useful!" Gives me ideas for some ultra durable armor, but you'll need to run some field tests for me, i.e. hit the monsters as hard as you can!

name: Glimmers of False Hope
goal_text: Hunt a Silver Rathalos and a Gold Rathian
flavor_text: I was doing my nightly round of the Misty Peaks, same as ever, only this time it seemed a whole lot lighter out. Then I looked up -- Hyper wyverns! There's no telling what'll happen if they get to the village! Please, Hunter, stop them!

name: Violence in the Verdure
flavor_text: We have a situation on our hands concerning a Hyper Astalos in the Verdant Hills. It's only getting more aggressive with time. Could you stop its rampage, Hunter? Else I fear we will have to cordon off the hills entirely...

name: Paws Off My Fish!
flavor_text: This is unfurgivable! I've been meowsted from my favorite fishing spot by a Mizutsune! My furiend suppawses it's a Hypurr type. People call me hypurractive but that doesn't give me reclaws to be a jerk!

subquest.goal_text: Wound Mizutsune's top fin and sever its tail

name: Big, Bad 'n' Woolly
flavor_text: "i think gamot iz a big meeny and i want it to go fol in a hoal!" My daughter's spelling notwithstanding, she was chased by a Hyper Gammoth when she was out playing and now she's afraid to go out. Can you hunt it so she can feel safer?

name: Blade Blazing Brightly Black
flavor_text: We tried hunting a Glavenus after it made an attack on a nearby colony, but it was so vicious and gave off such a terrible aura that we couldn't even scratch it. That said, there's no way we're letting it hang around any longer. Show us your stuff, Hunter!

name: Forewarned is Four-Horned
flavor_text: I haven't been able to sleep for fear that the frightful Diablos out there will turn their rage on the people...! Please, won't you teach the two of them some manners? I do so need my beauty sleep!

name: Meat is Murder
flavor_text: I s-s-saw a... No, I c-c-can't! It was at the Ancestral St-t-teppe, a...a D-D-Deviljho! It just...ate the other animals! Nature is the w-w-worst! What kind of circle of l-l-life is this!? I want no p-part in it. And I d-d-don't want that Deviljho to have a p-p-part in it either!

name: The Cry of Chaos
flavor_text: Ahhh, the weeping... The sound lingers in the ears. He has strayed from the path of righteousness... Who will end this cycle? Only in thorough defeat will he be humbled and leave the confusion and chaos of the past behind him.

name: Brutal Brachydios
flavor_text: Our vessel has crashed! We're located on Ingle Isle. A Brachydios was sighted near the crash site and has us cornered. Looks like a Hyper monster. It lifted its glowing red arms and an explosion has cut off all our escape routes. SOS! Mayday!

name: Bequest Quest
flavor_text: Ugh... This is it for me. Received a distress call from...the Sanctuary... A Rajang causing trouble... I went to put it down but...ugh...it was just too...strong... There must be a hunter out there...who can finish the job... Tell him I sent you...

name: Forget Valstrax, Big Sis is Scarier!
flavor_text: We're the Justice Alliance! Big Sis told us to go an' deal with Valstrax 'coz it's been terrorizin' people. But BOY OH BOY is he scary! We just turned tail an' ran right outta there. Argh, but Big Sis is gonna be emm ay dee! Someone hunt Valstrax so she won't murder us!

name: The Gloom of 1,001 Nights
flavor_text: A storm of dust   a writhing darkness A ruined fortress      rebuilt Walls     veterans of many battles In the depths  a guarded treasure A dancing golden charm        sand A queen at her spinning wheel    challenge her    a fool, or a hero?

name: A Terrible Light
flavor_text: Light which envelops the world is not always a light which brightens the world. The Shagaru Magala that has been sighted at the Sanctuary is a calamitous presence indeed. Take up arms, Hunter, and douse its terrible light!

name: Legitimate Soaratorium Quest
flavor_text: Ah. Yes. Hello, person whom I definitely know and have seen before. It's me, your good friend the Soaratorium Gal. This next Quest is a totally legitimate Quest that I happened to forget about until now and which you have to keep a total secret, OK? Oh my gosh. Totes.

name: Lord of the Volcanic Hollow
flavor_text: Pursued by Teostra [STOP] Awaiting rescue behind big rock [STOP] Holding breath [STOP] Hoping Teostra doesn't see me [STOP] Getting closer [STOP] I think it saw me [MESSAGE ENDS ABRUPTLY]

name: Welcome Back To Hell
flavor_text: You're not going to like this, but I have an urgent Wycademy report saying another Nakarkos has reared its ugly heads in Wyvern's End. Our man on the ground says this one's the worst that's ever been recorded!

name: Monster on a Crusade
flavor_text: Akantor is waging war against me to steal my birthright! I'm secretly a prince, you see -- the son of the gods of light and darkness! I can hear his call... Could you fight in my stead? I can use my holy powers to help you from afar...

name: Ukanlos-Made Global Cooling
flavor_text: When the Ukanlos appears, all the warmth bleeds from the world and life withers in the cold. Now we have to face not only an avalanche, but Ukanlos as well. Its every step cracks mountains, blows snowy gales. At this rate it'll freeze the whole world! Help!

name: Lao-Shan Lung Time No See
goal_text: Slay a Lao-Shan Lung or repel it
flavor_text: We've got ourselves an emergency! A Lao-Shan Lung is approaching as we speak! I can't believe this is happening again! We're managing to hold him off, but we can't last much longer, and the village is in danger! Urgently requesting backup! Like, right now!

name: Alatreon and Alack
flavor_text: The embodiment of light and darkness. Clad in armor that defies the heavens, it looses white lightning and black fire. Don't succumb to the disasters it unleashes. Duck and weave. Pursue. Attack. Left unchecked, it will cause a darkness lasting till the end of time.

name: End of a Dark History
flavor_text: When I was a child, I heard stories about an empire that suffered a tragic fate. Now, everything is starting to happen as I was told. Please, stop this calamity from bringing ruin upon us all! This is not how our story ends!

name: To Slay a Legend
flavor_text: Fate may be written in the stars, but it is our armor and our own merits that become us. The wyvern of legend stands before you. But fear not, for the hunters of old watch over you now. Stand proud, Hunter; this is your hour.

name: Defy the Prophecy
flavor_text: When the Great Dread emerged from the depths of the world, none could hope to oppose it. None, that is, until the Bravest of Hearts appeared. Despair turned to hope, and with it, the chance to turn the tides. Hunter, the glory is all yours.

name: Monster Hunter Channel I
flavor_text: The hunter's spirit will never die! Howdy, folks! Today with me in the Arena, we have a very special guest ready to be pitted against our fang-tacular menagerie! Are you excited yet? I know I am! Okay, let's get this show on the road!

name: Monster Hunter Channel II
flavor_text: The hunter's spirit will never die! Howdy, folks! I've got a hunch today's episode is going to be pretty darn exciting! This time our intrepid hunter will be up against some real legends! I don't know about you, but I am STOKED for this! Let's. Get. HUNTING!

name: Event: Slay a Mizutsune
flavor_text: Today you face a Mizutsune. Don't let its foam and bubbles fool you. That thing will rip your face right off. Weapons: Long Sword, Hunting Horn, Charge Blade, Lance, Light Bowgun

name: Event: Slay a Glavenus
flavor_text: I have trained you to become a hardened warrior. Today you prove yourself against the mighty Glavenus! Weapons: Great Sword, Insect Glaive, Hammer, Switch Axe, Bow

name: Event: Slay a Gammoth
flavor_text: Today, you will face a Gammoth. It will stomp you into next week if you're not careful. I will too if you don't defeat it! Weapons: Long Sword, Hunting Horn, Switch Axe, Gunlance, Heavy Bowgun

name: Event: Slay an Astalos
flavor_text: The Astalos is a formidable opponent. It will stop at nothing to achieve its goal of ripping you a new one! Weapons: Sword & Shield, Lance, Charge Blade, Insect Glaive, Bow

name: Event: Slay a Lagiacrus
flavor_text: Did you get lost on the way to daycare? Am I here to take care of you? No? GOOD! Now go take out that Lagi! Weapons: Long Sword, Dual Blades, Hammer, Gunlance, Light Bowgun

name: Event: Hunt-a-thon 1
flavor_text: Your path to glory begins with a Tigrex, a Zinogre, and a Nargacuga. Honor our beloved Arena with your victory! Weapons: Great Sword, Lance, Charge Blade, Insect Glaive, Light Bowgun

name: Event: Hunt-a-thon 2
flavor_text: Today, you will fight a Rajang and a Deviljho. You may find Glory, or you may draw your last breath. Weapons: Long Sword, Sword & Shield, Hunting Horn, Switch Axe, Bow

name: Event: Hunt-a-thon 3
flavor_text: Glory is at hand, Greenhorn! It is yours if you slay a Gammoth, an Astalos, a Mizutsune, and a Glavenus! Weapons: Great Sword, Dual Blades, Gunlance, Charge Blade, Heavy Bowgun

name: Event: Slay a Zinogre
flavor_text: This Challenge Quest requires you to slay a Zinogre. Do not underestimate this handsome beast's nimble movements. Weapons: Long Sword, Lance, Hammer, Insect Glaive, Light Bowgun

name: Event: Slay a Gore Magala
flavor_text: The Gore Magala's Frenzy virus spreads like the perfume of a beautiful woman. Weapons: Sword & Shield, Hammer, Insect Glaive, Charge Blade, Light Bowgun

name: Event: Slay a Tigrex
flavor_text: There is a certain grace to the Tigrex's brutality. Try not to get caught up in its majesty. Weapons: Long Sword, Dual Blades, Hunting Horn, Bow, Gunlance

name: Event: Slay a Rathalos
flavor_text: A sight to behold to witness a Rathalos dance across the sky... In this Challenge Quest, I hope your form can compete. Weapons: Great Sword, Charge Blade, Switch Axe, Hunting Horn, Heavy Bowgun

name: Event: Slay a Nargacuga
flavor_text: This is a Challenge Quest to slay a Nargacuga. Watch its movements and strike with conviction, or this will be our last conversation. Weapons: Long Sword, Sword & Shield, Hammer, Lance, Bow

name: Event: Hunt-a-thon 4
flavor_text: Welcome to the Arena. We've prepared four monsters for you today, with the elements of Ice, Water, Fire, & Thunder. Weapons: Great Sword, Dual Blades, Hunting Horn, Gunlance, Light Bowgun

name: XX Trials: Dreadqueen
flavor_text: Welcome to the Arena! Today we've got a real treat in store for you. A dread-treat! A treat with a sting in the tail! Literally! Seriously, watch out for her tail. It's pretty venomous. Weapons: Sword & Shield, Dual Blades, Hammer, Gunlance, Heavy Bowgun

name: XX Trials: Thunderlord
flavor_text: Welcome to the Thunderlord! Haha, I've always wanted to say that. He won't welcome you. He'll just shock you and knock you out like that! So don't get too close! He's just not touchy-feely. Weapons: Great Sword, Dual Blades, Switch Axe, Insect Glaive, Bow

name: XX Trials: Silverwind
flavor_text: I hope you've done your stretches, because your foe today is a strapping Silverwind Nargacuga who's spoiling for a fight! Watch his tailsword, he's pretty handy with it! Weapons: Long Sword, Sword & Shield, Charge Blade, Lance, Heavy Bowgun

name: XX Trials: Dreadking
flavor_text: Hey, do you think it's regicide if you slay a Dreadking Rathalos? I sure hope not, because I've been saving this one for you! We'll be watching this fight with anxiety-- I mean anticipation! Weapons: Long Sword, Dual Blades, Hammer, Insect Glaive, Heavy Bowgun

name: XX Trials: Grimclaw
flavor_text: Well, it's Grimclaw past Tigrex o' clock here in the Arena, and that means it's high time you were here! Try not to get him mad! He's just a big, heavily-armed, dragon-shaped softy deep down. Weapons: Sword & Shield, Hammer, Switch Axe, Gunlance, Bow

name: XX Trials: Gravios
flavor_text: Think you're good enough to go toe to toe with a Gravios, Hunter? Tough nut to crack with those rock-hard scales. Tell me how that works out for ya! Weapons: Sword & Shield, Charge Blade, Hunting Horn, Insect Glaive, Light Bowgun

name: XX Trials: Elderfrost
flavor_text: You like the cold, Hunter? Well, you're in for a treat, 'cause old Elderfrost here's gonna bring along the next ice age! But what's a little wind and snow when you're breaking a sweat? Weapons: Great Sword, Hunting Horn, Charge Blade, Gunlance, Light Bowgun

name: XX Trials: Hunt-a-thon I
flavor_text: A Boltreaver and a Soulseer? Can't say I can see that going well for you. But you seem to have a good head on your shoulders, so I reckon we'll soon see, won't we? Weapons: Great Sword, Dual Blades, Switch Axe, Gunlance, Light Bowgun

name: XX Trials: Hunt-a-thon II
flavor_text: A Hellblade and a Bloodbath, AND a Valstrax to top it all off? Hunter, if this is some idea of a joke, then I... No? Hah. Struggling against impossible odds, is it? I like your style! Weapons: Long Sword, Sword & Shield, Hunting Horn, Lance, Bow

name: XX Trials: Stonefist
flavor_text: For this Stonefist Hermitaur fight, you get extra brownie points for style. Yes, that rock-hard shell is going to need some elegant smashing... Weapons: Sword & Shield, Dual Blades, Charge Blade, Gunlance, Heavy Bowgun

name: XX Trials: Drilltusk
flavor_text: The challenge this time is to dispatch a Drilltusk Tetsucabra with style and grace. He may be tough and powerful, but you'd be surprised what a little charm and precision can do! Weapons: Dual Blades, Hammer, Switch Axe, Insect Glaive, Bow

name: XX Trials: Redhelm
flavor_text: It's time to prove you can slay a Redhelm Arzuros with panache. Don't merely dodge, but dance away from those claws! Plié, plié, grand jeté! Weapons: Great Sword, Sword & Shield, Hunting Horn, Charge Blade, Heavy Bowgun

name: XX Trials: Deadeye
flavor_text: Asymmetry is very much in vogue right now, so your challenge is to show us a battle with a Deadeye that's also a feast for the...living eyes? Anyway, make it spectacular is what I'm saying. Weapons: Great Sword, Long Sword, Hammer, Lance, Light Bowgun

name: XX Trials: Snowbaron
flavor_text: Time to take a challenge worthy of the Snowbaron Lagombi's noble name and fight it with flair! Take your cue from the charming dance of the Lagombi in the snow, and crush it with grace! Weapons: Long Sword, Dual Blades, Switch Axe, Insect Glaive, Bow

name: XX Trials: Hunt-a-thon III
flavor_text: This will be the utmost test of your style. A graceful Nightcloak Malfestio and an angry, though elegant, Brachydios? I'm sure you can style this one out, Hunter. Weapons: Great Sword, Hammer, Lance, Gunlance, Light Bowgun

name: CoroCoro: Lost in the Swamp
goal_text: Slay a total of 20 Ceanataurs and Iopreys
flavor_text: I came here with Zombie to try and collect some insects! Wow! This place is huge! There're probably all kinds of bugs to find! ...Zombie? Where'd you go? I-It's kinda scary all alone... Help!

name: The King of Lynians!
goal_text: Defeat a total of 20 Felynes and Melynxes
flavor_text: I've prepared a tournament to decide who's the REAL King of Lynians! Knock out the other Felyne and Melynx contenders to claim the title of champ, AND an item that'll let you make some special Palico gear!

name: Jump: Crimson Strongmen
flavor_text: I know about powerful people in small packages. I would like to ask your help hunting two red monsters running wild near the Volcano. In return, I've prepared an item that will let you make some nice pirate gear.

name: Initiate: Operation Moofah
flavor_text: ENERGY LEVELS...FALLING. WITHOUT...MONEY...PARTS ARE INOPERABLE. COLLECT MOOFAH FUR AND I COULD... SELL IT FOR LOTS OF MONEY. HELP ME, PROWLER. YOU ARE MY ONLY HOPE.

name: The Uniqlo Avant-garde
goal_text: Slay a total of 20 Vespoids and Bnahabras
flavor_text: What Felynes need is a great look FOR Felynes, BY Felynes, and I've got just the thing! I'll need your help gathering the materials, but just think how snazzy you'll look in my design!

name: Nakayoshi: Silver Crystal
flavor_text: I've just heard that the Ore we've been looking for is in a cave in the Marshlands! Say you'll help verify the rumor! If you do, I'll reward you with an item you can use to forge special Palico gear!

name: CoroCoro: Big Bad Bugs
flavor_text: I can teach you how to protect yourself from dangerous bugs. Let's practice using those big ones over there! Just use your death ray to take 'em out! Wha!? You Prowlers don't have a death ray!?

name: A Hero's Return
flavor_text: There's a monster out there running wild and keeping me from getting anything done! I want you to go and smash its fangs in! If you help me out, I'll give you an item to make some great new Palico gear!

name: Mario: The White Donkey Kong?
flavor_text: We've got trouble! There's a Donkey Kong doppelganger on the loose and it just stole my precious mushroom! If you help me out, I'll reward you with an item that'll enable you to make the perfect gear!

name: Animal Crossing: Picnic Day
flavor_text: It's a great day for a picnic! Go and visit a bunch of places to get us some goodies! When you get back, I'll reward you with an item that can be used to make special Palico gear.

name: SF: Ultimate Entrance Exam
flavor_text: Hm... Are you here to join us? In that case, let's get the exam started! You must take on my most dedicated disciples! If you can beat them, I just might let you become my newest student!

name: Fan Club: Arena Action
flavor_text: Oh my gorsh! I'm finally a MH Fan Club member! I'm schuper pumped! I can't believe I get to fight four Fanged Beasts right off the bat! If we beat 'em we'll be able to make some schuper cute Palico gear!

name: Making the Cut
flavor_text: Argh! Every time I fight a Rathian, I can't cut off her tail! She's always doing that flippy thing and then I get poisoned. Can you help a girl out and show me how it's done?

name: Catch a Rathalos by the Tail
flavor_text: Yo, what up, brah! Still bringin' the pain to the monster game? You know I have, but my lil' breaker-in-trainin' can't seem to get the hang of cuttin' off tails. Drops some science on her, wouldja?

name: Too Hot to Handle
flavor_text: I have a lil' purroblem, Prowler. This Powderstone is too hot for me to get my paws on. I could really use a Palico with heat- resistant Palico Skills, or one who can quickly recover after taking damage.

name: Case Closed: Monster Files
flavor_text: Help! There's a total hullaballoo going off at the Arena, and my little friends are trapped! I'm told only a Prowler can get the job done. I'll be sure to provide a reward!

name: Baki: Deadly Claws
flavor_text: Prowler! Your opponent this time is the deadly Glavenus. If you manage to take the tail of that foul fiend, then I will grant you the title of Kaioh! After all... what do I care!

name: WORST: Skull Motif
flavor_text: You got what it takes to step up to a Lagombi? Yeah? How about two of 'em? Get it done, and I'll give you a little memento of someone I know you look up to.

name: CoroCoro: Fart of Darkness
flavor_text: Hey, you! Will you help out an old geezer? I need you to hunt a monster with dangerous farts! You can hack a few farts, right? Burn 'em up with a death ray or somethin'!

name: Turnabout Takedown
flavor_text: Young Prowler! I have two Giadromes in the Arena who both say they're innocent, but this court sees no reason to further prolong the trial. Both defendants are... G U I L T Y

name: Capcom: Prowler's Spirit
flavor_text: Ah, nothing like making pals with a monster you're hunting! Usually. This time I wanted to get pally with a Gravios, but something seems odd. It's got this hatchling or something? Can you go investigate?

name: The Legend of Zelda: Wisdom
flavor_text: Adventurer, you have done well to reach this place. If you pass my trial of wisdom, I shall bestow upon you the means to acquire Palico equipment to further your knowledge.

name: Event: Slay a Volvidon
flavor_text: Today, Prowler, you're up against a Volvidon. Come back victorious or don't come back! That's an order! Support: Charisma, Protection Healing, Bombing, Gathering

name: Event: Slay a Royal Ludroth
flavor_text: The Royal Ludroth is a vicious creature with a sponge-like mane. Be careful or I'll need it to mop up what's left of you. Support: Charisma, Fighting, Protection, Healing, Bombing

name: Event: Slay a Lagombi
flavor_text: What'll it be today, Prowler? Glory for our beloved Arena or monster chow? Get out there and slay that Lagombi! That's an order! Support: Protection, Bombing, Charisma, Fighting, Gathering

name: Event: Slay a Yian Kut-Ku
flavor_text: Prowler! Your chance at glory is at hand. Make our beloved Arena proud by slaying a Yian Kut-Ku. Hooooah! Support: Fighting, Protection, Healing, Bombing, Gathering

name: Event: Slay an Arzuros
flavor_text: Ten-hut, Prowler! Today, you'll be facing an Arzuros. Under- estimate it and you'll be in a world of hurt! Support: Charisma, Fighting, Protection, Bombing, Gathering

name: Event: Hunt-a-thon 5
flavor_text: True Prowlers test themselves in a Hunt-a-thon! This time, you'll face a Yian Kut-Ku, a Velocidrome, and an Arzuros! Make us proud! Support: Charisma, Fighting, Protection, Healing, Gathering

name: XX Trials: Rathalos
flavor_text: Good to see you back in the ring, Prowler! Now, let's see if a bout with the King of the Skies won't put some meat on those scrawny bones! Support: Charisma, Assisting, Healing, Bombing, Gathering

name: XX Trials: Tigrex
flavor_text: Well, well, well. Looks like the lil' Greenhorn's all ready to wrestle a Tigrex! Just be quick on your toes or things're gonna go pancake-shaped! Support: Charisma, Fighting, Protection, Assisting, Beast

name: XX Trials: Nargacuga
flavor_text: So, today you're up against a Nargacuga. You'll need to keep those shiny peepers peeled since they're fast critters, but I reckon you're faster on your paws, so hup to it! Support: Fighting, Protection, Assisting, Bombing, Beast

name: XX Trials: Zinogre
flavor_text: Felyne, it's time for you to fight a Zinogre! It builds up an electric charge when it howls, so prick those ears up, you hear? Support: Fighting, Assisting, Healing, Bombing, Beast

name: XX Trials: Brachydios
flavor_text: The gunk on a Brachydios's arms is bad news. Don't ask me what it is. Just don't touch it, or else... BOOM! Say g'night, Prowler! Support: Fighting, Protection, Assisting, Gathering, Beast

name: XX Trials: Hunt-a-thon IV
flavor_text: Greenhorn, you've really come along in leaps and bounds. But now comes your greatest test: Take on a Great Maccao, a Malfestio, and a Glavenus, and I might just be impressed! Support: Charisma, Fighting, Protection, Healing, Beast
